sql1:
WITH SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS order_total,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_custkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS rn
    FROM
        orders o
    JOIN
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days'
    GROUP BY
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate
)
SELECT
    r.r_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS total_customers,
    SUM(COALESCE(rs.total_available, 0)) AS total_available_parts,
    AVG(COALESCE(rs.avg_supply_cost, 0)) AS avg_supply_cost,
    SUM(roi.order_total) AS total_recent_order_value
FROM
    region r
LEFT JOIN
    nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
LEFT JOIN
    customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
LEFT JOIN
    SupplierStats rs ON rs.s_suppkey IN (
        SELECT ps.ps_suppkey FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
        WHERE l.l_quantity > 10
    )
LEFT JOIN
    RecentOrders roi ON roi.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE
    r.r_name LIKE 'North%'
    AND c.c_acctbal > 1000
GROUP BY
    r.r_name
ORDER BY
    total_recent_order_value DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    r.r_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS total_customers,
    SUM(COALESCE(rs.total_available, 0)) AS total_available_parts,
    AVG(COALESCE(rs.avg_supply_cost, 0)) AS avg_supply_cost,
    SUM(roi.order_total) AS total_recent_order_value
FROM
    region r
LEFT JOIN
    nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
LEFT JOIN
    customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available,
            AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
        FROM
            supplier s
        JOIN
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY
            s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    ) rs ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM partsupp ps2
        JOIN lineitem l2 ON ps2.ps_partkey = l2.l_partkey
        WHERE l2.l_quantity > 10
          AND ps2.ps_suppkey = rs.s_suppkey
    )
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_custkey,
            o.o_orderdate,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS order_total,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_custkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS rn
        FROM
            orders o
        JOIN
            lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE
            o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days'
        GROUP BY
            o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate
    ) roi ON roi.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE
    r.r_name LIKE 'North%'
    AND c.c_acctbal > 1000
GROUP BY
    r.r_name
ORDER BY
    total_recent_order_value DESC

sql1:
WITH SupplierPerformance AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_name,
        n.n_name AS nation_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY n.n_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rank_by_supply,
        AVG(c.c_acctbal) AS avg_customer_balance
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN 
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    JOIN 
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    JOIN
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE
        l.l_shipdate >= DATE '2023-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate <= DATE '2023-12-31'
    GROUP BY
        s.s_name, n.n_name
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s_name, nation_name, total_supply_value, total_orders,
        avg_customer_balance,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC) AS overall_rank
    FROM 
        SupplierPerformance
    WHERE 
        total_orders > 5
)
SELECT 
    t.s_name,
    t.nation_name,
    t.total_supply_value,
    t.total_orders,
    t.avg_customer_balance,
    t.overall_rank,
    CASE 
        WHEN t.total_supply_value IS NULL THEN 'No Supply'
        WHEN t.avg_customer_balance > 5000 THEN 'High Value'
        ELSE 'Standard Value'
    END AS supplier_status
FROM 
    TopSuppliers t
WHERE 
    t.overall_rank <= 10 
ORDER BY 
    t.total_supply_value DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    t.s_name,
    t.nation_name,
    t.total_supply_value,
    t.total_orders,
    t.avg_customer_balance,
    t.overall_rank,
    CASE
        WHEN t.total_supply_value IS NULL THEN 'No Supply'
        WHEN t.avg_customer_balance > 5000 THEN 'High Value'
        ELSE 'Standard Value'
    END AS supplier_status
FROM (
    SELECT
        sp.s_name,
        sp.nation_name,
        sp.total_supply_value,
        sp.total_orders,
        sp.avg_customer_balance,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sp.total_supply_value DESC) AS overall_rank
    FROM (
        SELECT
            s.s_name,
            n.n_name AS nation_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value,
            COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
            AVG(c.c_acctbal) AS avg_customer_balance
        FROM
            supplier s
        INNER JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        INNER JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
                              AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
                              AND l.l_shipdate <= DATE '2023-12-31'
        INNER JOIN part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
        INNER JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        INNER JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        GROUP BY
            s.s_name, n.n_name
        HAVING
            COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) > 5
    ) sp
) t
WHERE
    t.overall_rank <= 10
ORDER BY
    t.total_supply_value DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderdate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
), 
CustomerStats AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        AVG(o.o_totalprice) AS avg_order_value
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey
), 
SupplierPartInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        supplier s
    INNER JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey
)
SELECT 
    cs.c_name,
    cs.total_spent,
    cs.total_orders,
    cs.avg_order_value,
    spi.s_name,
    spi.total_available,
    spi.total_supply_cost,
    ro.o_orderstatus
FROM 
    CustomerStats cs
LEFT JOIN 
    SupplierPartInfo spi ON spi.total_supply_cost > 1000
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedOrders ro ON ro.o_orderkey = cs.total_orders
WHERE 
    cs.total_spent IS NOT NULL AND
    (cs.avg_order_value > 500 OR cs.total_orders > 10)
ORDER BY 
    cs.total_spent DESC, 
    spi.total_available DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    cs.c_name,
    cs.total_spent,
    cs.total_orders,
    cs.avg_order_value,
    spi.s_name,
    spi.total_available,
    spi.total_supply_cost,
    ro.o_orderstatus
FROM 
    (SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        AVG(o.o_totalprice) AS avg_order_value
     FROM 
        customer c
     LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
     GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
     HAVING 
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) IS NOT NULL AND
        (AVG(o.o_totalprice) > 500 OR COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) > 10)
    ) cs
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
     FROM 
        supplier s
     INNER JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
     GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
     HAVING 
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) > 1000
    ) spi ON 1=1
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderdate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
     FROM 
        orders o
     WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    ) ro ON ro.o_orderkey = cs.total_orders
ORDER BY 
    cs.total_spent DESC, 
    spi.total_available DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2022-01-01'
),
TotalSales AS (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
    FROM 
        lineitem l
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY 
        l.l_orderkey
),
SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        COALESCE(SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty), 0) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        supplier s
    LEFT JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
)
SELECT 
    r.r_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS total_customers,
    AVG(ts.total_sales) AS avg_sales,
    MAX(sd.total_supply_cost) AS max_supply_cost
FROM 
    region r
JOIN 
    nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
LEFT JOIN 
    TotalSales ts ON ts.l_orderkey IN (SELECT o.o_orderkey FROM RankedOrders o WHERE o.rn <= 10) 
LEFT JOIN 
    SupplierDetails sd ON sd.s_suppkey IN (
        SELECT ps.ps_suppkey 
        FROM partsupp ps 
        JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey 
        WHERE l.l_orderkey IN (SELECT o.o_orderkey FROM RankedOrders)
    )
WHERE 
    c.c_acctbal IS NOT NULL 
    AND c.c_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(c2.c_acctbal) FROM customer c2)
GROUP BY 
    r.r_name
ORDER BY 
    total_customers DESC, avg_sales DESC NULLS LAST
sql2:
SELECT
    r.r_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS total_customers,
    AVG(ts.total_sales) AS avg_sales,
    MAX(sd.total_supply_cost) AS max_supply_cost
FROM
    region r
JOIN
    nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
JOIN
    customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
CROSS JOIN
    (SELECT AVG(c2.c_acctbal) AS avg_bal FROM customer c2) cb
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            l.l_orderkey,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
        FROM
            lineitem l
        WHERE
            l.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE
            AND EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM (
                    SELECT o.o_orderkey,
                           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS rn
                    FROM orders o
                    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2022-01-01'
                ) ro
                WHERE ro.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey AND ro.rn <= 10
            )
        GROUP BY
            l.l_orderkey
    ) ts ON 1 = 1
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            COALESCE(SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty), 0) AS total_supply_cost
        FROM
            supplier s
        LEFT JOIN
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY
            s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    ) sd ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp ps2
        JOIN lineitem l2 ON ps2.ps_partkey = l2.l_partkey
        WHERE ps2.ps_suppkey = sd.s_suppkey
          AND EXISTS (
              SELECT 1
              FROM (
                  SELECT o2.o_orderkey,
                         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o2.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o2.o_orderdate DESC) AS rn
                  FROM orders o2
                  WHERE o2.o_orderdate >= DATE '2022-01-01'
              ) ro2
              WHERE ro2.o_orderkey = l2.l_orderkey
          )
    )
WHERE
    c.c_acctbal IS NOT NULL
    AND c.c_acctbal > cb.avg_bal
GROUP BY
    r.r_name
ORDER BY
    total_customers DESC, avg_sales DESC NULLS LAST

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    o.o_orderkey, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    part p 
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name, o.o_orderkey
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC 
LIMIT 100
sql2:
WITH line_orders AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey, l.l_orderkey,
           l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS net_price,
           o.o_orderkey AS orderkey
    FROM lineitem l, orders o
    WHERE l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
),
part_supp AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey, p.p_name, s.s_name
    FROM partsupp ps, part p, supplier s
    WHERE ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
      AND ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
)
SELECT 
    ps2.ps_partkey AS p_partkey,
    ps2.p_name,
    ps2.s_name,
    lo.orderkey AS o_orderkey,
    SUM(lo.net_price) AS revenue
FROM 
    part_supp ps2
    JOIN line_orders lo ON ps2.ps_partkey = lo.l_partkey
                        AND ps2.ps_suppkey = lo.l_suppkey
GROUP BY 
    ps2.ps_partkey, ps2.p_name, ps2.s_name, lo.orderkey
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    supplier s
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
    AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '2024-01-01'
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
      AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '2024-01-01'
),
order_lines AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey,
           l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS line_revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo
        WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    )
)
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(ol.line_revenue) AS revenue
FROM
    order_lines ol
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON ol.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND ol.l_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE
    EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM part p WHERE p.p_partkey = ol.l_partkey)
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'Europe' 
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '2023-01-01' 
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '2024-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
WITH european_partsupp AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM nation n
        JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE r.r_name = 'Europe'
          AND n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    european_partsupp eps ON p.p_partkey = eps.ps_partkey
WHERE
    l.l_shipdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '2024-01-01'
GROUP BY
    p.p_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '2021-01-01' AND '2021-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate BETWEEN '2021-01-01' AND '2021-12-31'
),
qualified_lines AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey,
           l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS line_revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    INNER JOIN filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp ps
        WHERE ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
          AND ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    )
)
SELECT p.p_name,
       SUM(ql.line_revenue) AS revenue
FROM part p
INNER JOIN qualified_lines ql ON p.p_partkey = ql.l_partkey
GROUP BY p.p_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH ranked_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(year, -1, CURRENT_DATE)
),
supplier_info AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS supply_parts
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
high_value_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    HAVING 
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 5000
)
SELECT 
    r.o_orderkey,
    r.o_orderdate,
    r.o_totalprice,
    r.o_orderstatus,
    s.s_name,
    s.total_supply_cost,
    s.supply_parts,
    c.c_name AS high_value_customer_name,
    c.total_spent
FROM 
    ranked_orders r
LEFT JOIN 
    supplier_info s ON s.total_supply_cost > (SELECT AVG(total_supply_cost) FROM supplier_info)
LEFT JOIN 
    high_value_customers c ON r.o_orderkey IN (
        SELECT o.o_orderkey 
        FROM orders o 
        WHERE o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    )
WHERE 
    r.order_rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    r.o_orderdate DESC, 
    r.o_totalprice DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    r.o_orderkey,
    r.o_orderdate,
    r.o_totalprice,
    r.o_orderstatus,
    s.s_name,
    s.total_supply_cost,
    s.supply_parts,
    c.c_name AS high_value_customer_name,
    c.total_spent
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_orderdate,
            o.o_totalprice,
            o.o_orderstatus,
            o.o_custkey,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
        FROM 
            orders o
        WHERE 
            o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(year, -1, CURRENT_DATE)
    ) r
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS supply_parts
        FROM 
            supplier s
        JOIN 
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY 
            s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
        HAVING 
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) > (
                SELECT AVG(t.total_supply_cost)
                FROM (
                    SELECT SUM(ps2.ps_supplycost * ps2.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
                    FROM supplier s2
                    JOIN partsupp ps2 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
                    GROUP BY s2.s_suppkey
                ) t
            )
    ) s ON 1 = 1
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
        FROM 
            customer c
        JOIN 
            orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
        GROUP BY 
            c.c_custkey, c.c_name
        HAVING 
            SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 5000
    ) c ON r.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE 
    r.order_rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    r.o_orderdate DESC, 
    r.o_totalprice DESC

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE
    r.r_name = 'ASIA'
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '2021-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '2022-01-01'
GROUP BY
    p.p_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

        JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA'
          AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,

FROM

JOIN

WHERE

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_acctbal,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) as rn
    FROM supplier s
), HighValueCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey, 
        c.c_name, 
        c.c_acctbal
    FROM customer c
    WHERE c.c_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(c2.c_acctbal) FROM customer c2)
), RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_custkey, 
        o.o_totalprice,
        DATE_PART('year', o.o_orderdate) AS order_year
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
), LineitemDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue,
        COUNT(*) AS line_count
    FROM lineitem l
    GROUP BY l.l_orderkey
)

SELECT 
    r.r_name AS Region,
    n.n_name AS Nation,
    s.s_name AS SupplierName,
    c.c_name AS CustomerName,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS TotalOrders,
    COALESCE(SUM(ld.revenue), 0) AS TotalRevenue
FROM 
    region r
JOIN 
    nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSuppliers s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey AND s.rn <= 3
LEFT JOIN 
    HighValueCustomers c ON c.c_custkey = (SELECT o.o_custkey 
                                              FROM RecentOrders o 
                                              WHERE o.o_orderkey = ld.l_orderkey 
                                              LIMIT 1)
LEFT JOIN 
    lineitem l ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN 
    LineitemDetails ld ON l.l_orderkey = ld.l_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    r.r_name, n.n_name, s.s_name, c.c_name
HAVING 
    SUM(ld.revenue) > 10000 OR COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) > 5
ORDER BY 
    TotalRevenue DESC NULLS LAST
sql2:
SELECT
    Region,
    Nation,
    SupplierName,
    CustomerName,
    TotalOrders,
    TotalRevenue
FROM (
    SELECT 
        r.r_name AS Region,
        n.n_name AS Nation,
        s.s_name AS SupplierName,
        c.c_name AS CustomerName,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS TotalOrders,
        COALESCE(SUM(ld.revenue), 0) AS TotalRevenue,
        SUM(ld.revenue) AS _raw_revenue
    FROM 
        region r
    JOIN 
        nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT 
            s2.s_suppkey,
            s2.s_name,
            s2.s_acctbal,
            s2.s_nationkey,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s2.s_nationkey ORDER BY s2.s_acctbal DESC) as rn
        FROM supplier s2
    ) s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey AND s.rn <= 3
    LEFT JOIN 
        lineitem l ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT 
            l2.l_orderkey,
            SUM(l2.l_extendedprice * (1 - l2.l_discount)) AS revenue,
            COUNT(*) AS line_count
        FROM lineitem l2
        GROUP BY l2.l_orderkey
    ) ld ON l.l_orderkey = ld.l_orderkey
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT 
            c2.c_custkey, 
            c2.c_name, 
            c2.c_acctbal
        FROM customer c2
        WHERE c2.c_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(c3.c_acctbal) FROM customer c3)
    ) c ON c.c_custkey = (
        SELECT o2.o_custkey 
        FROM orders o2 
        WHERE o2.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
          AND o2.o_orderkey = ld.l_orderkey 
        LIMIT 1
    )
    GROUP BY 
        r.r_name, n.n_name, s.s_name, c.c_name
) sub
WHERE 
    _raw_revenue > 10000 OR TotalOrders > 5
ORDER BY 
    TotalRevenue DESC NULLS LAST

sql1:
WITH SupplierPerformance AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS part_count
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
OrdersStats AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_price,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderstatus
),
TopOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.total_price,
        os.part_count,
        sp.total_cost
    FROM 
        OrdersStats o
    LEFT JOIN 
        SupplierPerformance sp ON o.o_orderkey = sp.s_suppkey -- Intentionally incorrect join for null logic
    LEFT JOIN 
        (SELECT 
            ps.ps_partkey, 
            COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS part_count
         FROM 
            partsupp ps
         JOIN 
            lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
         GROUP BY 
            ps.ps_partkey) AS os ON o.o_orderkey = os.ps_partkey
    WHERE 
        o.rank <= 10
)
SELECT 
    TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS benchmark_date,
    SUM(total_price) AS total_order_value,
    AVG(sp.total_cost) AS avg_supplier_cost,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM 
    TopOrders
WHERE 
    total_cost IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    benchmark_date
ORDER BY 
    total_order_value DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS benchmark_date,
    SUM(t.total_price) AS total_order_value,
    AVG(t.total_cost) AS avg_supplier_cost,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.o_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM (
    SELECT
        os.o_orderkey,
        os.total_price,
        sp.total_cost
    FROM (
        SELECT
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_orderstatus,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_price,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) DESC) AS rank
        FROM
            orders o
        JOIN
            lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        GROUP BY
            o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderstatus
    ) os
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT
            s.s_suppkey,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
        FROM
            supplier s
        JOIN
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY
            s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    ) sp ON os.o_orderkey = sp.s_suppkey
    WHERE
        os.rank <= 10
) t
GROUP BY
    benchmark_date
ORDER BY
    total_order_value DESC

sql2:
WITH ps_cnt AS (
    SELECT ps_partkey, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM partsupp
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) * pc.cnt AS total_quantity,
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_extended_price
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    ps_cnt pc ON p.p_partkey = pc.ps_partkey
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, pc.cnt
ORDER BY
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' 
    AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01' 
    AND n.n_name = 'GERMANY'
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY

sql2:

    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE n.n_name = 'GERMANY'
)
SELECT
    'GERMANY' AS n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    lineitem l
JOIN
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey

    german_suppliers gs ON l.l_suppkey = gs.s_suppkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
    AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        WHERE ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
          AND ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    )
GROUP BY
    n_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC

sql2:
WITH asian_part_supplier_count AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, COUNT(*) AS supplier_cnt
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM region r
        WHERE r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey AND r.r_name = 'ASIA'
    )
    GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey
),
part_lineitem_agg AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_partkey,
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS sum_quantity,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS sum_revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    GROUP BY l.l_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type,
    SUM(pla.sum_quantity * apsc.supplier_cnt) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(pla.sum_revenue * apsc.supplier_cnt) AS total_revenue
FROM part p
JOIN part_lineitem_agg pla ON p.p_partkey = pla.l_partkey
JOIN asian_part_supplier_count apsc ON p.p_partkey = apsc.ps_partkey
GROUP BY p.p_brand, p.p_type
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

part_lineitem AS (

supplier_nation AS (

    customer_nation cn ON o.o_custkey = cn.c_custkey
GROUP BY
    cn.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

    part p

    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey 
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey 
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey

WHERE

),
part_supp_detail AS (

sql1:
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    customer AS c
JOIN
    orders AS o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN
    lineitem AS l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN
    supplier AS s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    partsupp AS ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    part AS p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN
    nation AS n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
    AND p.p_brand = 'Brand#23'
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    FROM orders AS o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
),
branded_parts AS (
    SELECT p.p_partkey
    FROM part AS p
    WHERE p.p_brand = 'Brand#23'
)
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    lineitem AS l
JOIN
    filtered_orders AS o ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN
    customer AS c ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN
    supplier AS s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    nation AS n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp AS ps
        JOIN branded_parts AS bp ON ps.ps_partkey = bp.p_partkey
        WHERE ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    )
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_nationkey,
        s.s_acctbal,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) as rnk
    FROM 
        supplier s
), 

HighValueParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_brand,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supplycost
    FROM 
        part p 
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    GROUP BY 
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_brand
    HAVING 
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) > 100.00
), 

CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey
    HAVING 
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 5000.00
)

SELECT 
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cu.c_custkey) AS total_customers,
    COALESCE(SUM(tv.total_spent), 0) AS total_spent_by_high_value_customers,
    COALESCE(AVG(tv.total_spent), 0) AS avg_spent_per_high_value_customer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT rp.s_suppkey) AS suppliers_with_high_acctbal
FROM 
    nation n
LEFT JOIN 
    customer cu ON cu.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
LEFT JOIN 
    CustomerOrders tv ON tv.c_custkey = cu.c_custkey
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSuppliers rp ON rp.rnk = 1 AND rp.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    nation_name DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cu.c_custkey) AS total_customers,
    COALESCE(SUM(tv.total_spent), 0) AS total_spent_by_high_value_customers,
    COALESCE(AVG(tv.total_spent), 0) AS avg_spent_per_high_value_customer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT rp.s_suppkey) AS suppliers_with_high_acctbal
FROM 
    nation n
LEFT JOIN 
    customer cu ON cu.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey
    HAVING 
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 5000.00
    ) tv ON tv.c_custkey = cu.c_custkey
LEFT JOIN 
    supplier rp ON rp.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        AND rp.s_acctbal = (SELECT MAX(s2.s_acctbal) FROM supplier s2 WHERE s2.s_nationkey = rp.s_nationkey)
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    nation_name DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_name,
        s.s_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY n.n_regionkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_name, s.s_suppkey, n.n_regionkey
), TotalOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_custkey,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_order_value
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(year, -1, CURRENT_DATE) 
        AND o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_custkey
), CustomerSegmentStats AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_mktsegment,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS customer_count,
        AVG(coalesce(t.total_order_value, 0)) AS avg_order_value
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        TotalOrders t ON c.c_custkey = t.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_mktsegment
    HAVING 
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) > 0
)
SELECT 
    cs.c_mktsegment,
    cs.customer_count,
    cs.avg_order_value,
    ss.s_name,
    ss.total_supply_cost
FROM 
    CustomerSegmentStats cs
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSuppliers ss ON cs.c_mktsegment = (
      SELECT cm.c_mktsegment
      FROM customer cm
      WHERE cm.c_custkey IN 
          (SELECT t.o_custkey
           FROM orders t 
           WHERE t.o_orderstatus = 'O'
           GROUP BY t.o_custkey 
           HAVING SUM(t.o_totalprice) > 100000)
      LIMIT 1
    )
WHERE 
    ss.rank <= 5 OR ss.s_suppkey IS NULL
ORDER BY 
    cs.customer_count DESC, 
    cs.avg_order_value DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    cs.c_mktsegment,
    cs.customer_count,
    cs.avg_order_value,
    ss.s_name,
    ss.total_supply_cost
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            c.c_mktsegment,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS customer_count,
            AVG(coalesce(t.total_order_value, 0)) AS avg_order_value
        FROM 
            customer c
        LEFT JOIN 
            (
                SELECT 
                    o.o_custkey,
                    SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_order_value
                FROM 
                    orders o
                WHERE 
                    o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(year, -1, CURRENT_DATE) 
                    AND o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
                GROUP BY 
                    o.o_custkey
            ) t ON c.c_custkey = t.o_custkey
        GROUP BY 
            c.c_mktsegment
        HAVING 
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) > 0
    ) cs
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            s.s_name,
            s.s_suppkey,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY n.n_regionkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rank
        FROM 
            supplier s
        JOIN 
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        JOIN 
            nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        GROUP BY 
            s.s_name, s.s_suppkey, n.n_regionkey
    ) ss ON cs.c_mktsegment = (
      SELECT cm.c_mktsegment
      FROM customer cm
      WHERE EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM orders t 
          WHERE t.o_orderstatus = 'O'
            AND t.o_custkey = cm.c_custkey
          GROUP BY t.o_custkey 
          HAVING SUM(t.o_totalprice) > 100000
      )
      LIMIT 1
    )
WHERE 
    ss.rank <= 5 OR ss.s_suppkey IS NULL
ORDER BY 
    cs.customer_count DESC, 
    cs.avg_order_value DESC

    nation n

    customer c ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey

SELECT 
    n_name, 
    sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    lineitem 
JOIN 
    orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer ON o_custkey = c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey
WHERE 
    o_orderdate >= '1995-01-01' AND 
    o_orderdate < '1996-01-01' AND 
    n_name = 'GERMANY'
GROUP BY 
    n_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '1995-01-01'
      AND o_orderdate < '1996-01-01'
),
german_customers AS (
    SELECT c_custkey
    FROM customer
    JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey AND n_name = 'GERMANY'
)
SELECT
    'GERMANY' AS n_name,
    sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    lineitem
JOIN
    filtered_orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey
WHERE
    o_custkey IN (SELECT c_custkey FROM german_customers)
GROUP BY
    n_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC

        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost

)

JOIN

sql2:
WITH order_lines AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_orderkey,
        l.l_suppkey,
        l.l_extendedprice,
        l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem AS l
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp AS ps
        JOIN part AS p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        WHERE ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
          AND ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    )
)
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(ol.l_extendedprice * (1 - ol.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    order_lines AS ol
JOIN
    supplier AS s ON ol.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    nation AS n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN
    orders AS o ON ol.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN
    customer AS c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC

      AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '2023-12-31'
),
supplier_nation AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, n.n_name
    FROM supplier AS s
    JOIN nation AS n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
)
SELECT
    sn.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    filtered_orders fo
JOIN
    customer AS c ON c.c_custkey = fo.o_custkey
JOIN
    lineitem AS l ON fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN
    supplier_nation AS sn ON l.l_suppkey = sn.s_suppkey
WHERE
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp AS ps
        WHERE ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
          AND ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    )
GROUP BY
    sn.n_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey

JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE l.l_shipdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'

SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey
ORDER BY

sql2:
WITH lineitem_agg AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_partkey,
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS total_orders
    FROM
        lineitem l
    WHERE
        EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey)
    GROUP BY
        l.l_partkey
)
SELECT
    la.l_partkey AS p_partkey,
    la.total_quantity,
    la.avg_price,
    la.total_orders
FROM
    lineitem_agg la
WHERE
    EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM part p WHERE p.p_partkey = la.l_partkey)
ORDER BY
    la.total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS price_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '2022-01-01' AND DATE '2023-01-01'
),
SupplierPartInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        ps.ps_supplycost,
        p.p_brand,
        p.p_retailprice
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    WHERE 
        ps.ps_availqty > 0
),
CustomerStats AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey
    HAVING 
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 1000
)
SELECT 
    r.n_nationkey,
    r.n_name,
    COALESCE(SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)), 0) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS number_of_orders,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS unique_customers
FROM 
    region r
LEFT JOIN 
    nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
LEFT JOIN 
    supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
LEFT JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
LEFT JOIN 
    lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
LEFT JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE 
    l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    AND (s.s_acctbal IS NOT NULL AND s.s_acctbal > 0)
GROUP BY 
    r.n_nationkey, 
    r.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT 
    r.n_nationkey,
    r.n_name,
    COALESCE(agg.total_sales, 0) AS total_sales,
    COALESCE(agg.number_of_orders, 0) AS number_of_orders,
    COALESCE(agg.unique_customers, 0) AS unique_customers
FROM 
    region r
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        n.n_nationkey,
        n.n_name,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS number_of_orders,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS unique_customers
    FROM 
        nation n
    INNER JOIN supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    INNER JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    INNER JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    LEFT JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
        AND s.s_acctbal > 0
    GROUP BY 
        n.n_nationkey, n.n_name
) agg ON r.n_nationkey = agg.n_nationkey AND r.n_name = agg.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10

WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey

    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
      AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '2023-12-31'
),
revenue AS (
    SELECT s.s_nationkey,
           SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    INNER JOIN filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN customer c ON fo.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp ps
        INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        WHERE ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
          AND ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey

)

WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    FROM orders AS o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '2024-01-01'
),
order_lines AS (

    FROM lineitem AS l
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    )

SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(ol.l_extendedprice * (1 - ol.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    order_lines AS ol
JOIN

JOIN
    nation AS n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp AS ps
        JOIN part AS p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        WHERE ps.ps_partkey = ol.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    )
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM filtered_orders fo
        JOIN customer AS c ON c.c_custkey = fo.o_custkey
        JOIN lineitem AS l2 ON l2.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
        WHERE l2.l_suppkey = ol.l_suppkey
          AND l2.l_partkey = ol.l_partkey
          AND l2.l_extendedprice = ol.l_extendedprice
          AND l2.l_discount = ol.l_discount
    )
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) as supplier_rank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
), HighCostSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name,
        r.r_name, 
        r.r_comment
    FROM 
        RankedSuppliers s
    JOIN 
        region r ON s.s_nationkey = r.r_regionkey 
    WHERE 
        total_supply_cost > (SELECT AVG(total_supply_cost) FROM RankedSuppliers)
    AND 
        supplier_rank <= 5
), RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_custkey, 
        o.o_orderdate,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_order_value
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate
)
SELECT 
    r.s_name AS supplier_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    AVG(o.total_order_value) AS avg_order_value,
    SUM(COALESCE(o.total_order_value, 0)) AS sum_order_value
FROM 
    HighCostSuppliers r
LEFT JOIN 
    RecentOrders o ON r.s_suppkey = o.o_custkey
GROUP BY 
    r.s_suppkey, r.s_name, r.r_name
HAVING 
    SUM(COALESCE(o.total_order_value, 0)) > 100000
ORDER BY 
    avg_order_value DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    supplier_name,
    region_name,
    total_orders,
    avg_order_value,
    sum_order_value
FROM (
    SELECT
        hcs.s_name AS supplier_name,
        hcs.r_name AS region_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ro.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        AVG(ro.total_order_value) AS avg_order_value,
        SUM(COALESCE(ro.total_order_value, 0)) AS sum_order_value
    FROM (
        SELECT
            rs.s_suppkey,
            rs.s_name,
            rg.r_name
        FROM (
            SELECT
                s.s_suppkey,
                s.s_name,
                s.s_nationkey,
                SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS supplier_rank
            FROM
                supplier s
            JOIN
                partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
            GROUP BY
                s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
        ) rs
        JOIN
            region rg ON rs.s_nationkey = rg.r_regionkey
        WHERE
            rs.total_supply_cost > (
                SELECT AVG(inner_rs.total_supply_cost)
                FROM (
                    SELECT
                        SUM(ps2.ps_supplycost * ps2.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
                    FROM
                        supplier s2
                    JOIN
                        partsupp ps2 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
                    GROUP BY
                        s2.s_suppkey, s2.s_name, s2.s_nationkey
                ) inner_rs
            )
            AND rs.supplier_rank <= 5
    ) hcs
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_custkey,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_order_value
        FROM
            orders o
        JOIN
            lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE
            l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
        GROUP BY
            o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate
    ) ro ON hcs.s_suppkey = ro.o_custkey
    GROUP BY
        hcs.s_suppkey, hcs.s_name, hcs.r_name
) filtered
WHERE
    sum_order_value > 100000
ORDER BY
    avg_order_value DESC

WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01' AND o_orderdate < '2023-02-01'
),
revenue AS (
    SELECT l.l_suppkey, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    )
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM partsupp ps WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey AND ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey

)

    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
ORDER BY
    r.total_revenue DESC

sql1:
WITH SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_avail_qty,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) AS distinct_parts_supplied
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    GROUP BY
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
OrderStats AS (
    SELECT
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_order_value,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_partkey) AS distinct_parts_ordered
    FROM
        orders o
    JOIN
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE
        o.o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01'
    GROUP BY
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
),
NationSummary AS (
    SELECT
        n.n_nationkey,
        n.n_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS total_suppliers,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.c_acctbal IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE c.c_acctbal END) AS total_balances
    FROM
        nation n
    LEFT JOIN
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN
        customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
    GROUP BY
        n.n_nationkey, n.n_name
)
SELECT
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    ss.s_name AS supplier_name,
    os.total_order_value AS order_value,
    ss.total_avail_qty AS supplier_avail_qty,
    ss.avg_supply_cost AS supplier_avg_cost,
    ns.total_suppliers,
    ns.total_balances
FROM
    SupplierStats ss
JOIN
    OrderStats os ON ss.s_suppkey IN (
        SELECT ps.ps_suppkey
        FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
        WHERE l.l_shipdate <= CURRENT_DATE AND l.l_returnflag = 'R'
    )
JOIN
    NationSummary ns ON ss.s_suppkey IN (
        SELECT s.s_suppkey
        FROM supplier s
        WHERE s.s_nationkey = (
            SELECT n.n_nationkey
            FROM nation n
            WHERE n.n_name LIKE 'N%'
            LIMIT 1
        )
    )
WHERE
    os.total_order_value > (
        SELECT AVG(total_order_value) FROM OrderStats
    )
ORDER BY
    os.total_order_value DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    ns.n_name AS nation_name,
    ss.s_name AS supplier_name,
    os.total_order_value AS order_value,
    ss.total_avail_qty AS supplier_avail_qty,
    ss.avg_supply_cost AS supplier_avg_cost,
    ns.total_suppliers,
    ns.total_balances
FROM
    (
        SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name,
               SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_avail_qty,
               AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost,
               COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) AS distinct_parts_supplied
        FROM supplier s
        JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    ) ss
CROSS JOIN
    (
        SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey,
               SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_order_value,
               COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_partkey) AS distinct_parts_ordered
        FROM orders o
        JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE o.o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01'
        GROUP BY o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    ) os
CROSS JOIN
    (
        SELECT n.n_nationkey, n.n_name,
               COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS total_suppliers,
               SUM(COALESCE(c.c_acctbal, 0)) AS total_balances
        FROM nation n
        LEFT JOIN supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
        LEFT JOIN customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
        GROUP BY n.n_nationkey, n.n_name
    ) ns
WHERE
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
        WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = ss.s_suppkey
          AND l.l_shipdate <= CURRENT_DATE
          AND l.l_returnflag = 'R'
    )
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM supplier s
        WHERE s.s_suppkey = ss.s_suppkey
          AND s.s_nationkey = (
              SELECT n.n_nationkey
              FROM nation n
              WHERE n.n_name LIKE 'N%'
              LIMIT 1
          )
    )
    AND os.total_order_value > (
        SELECT AVG(oi.total_order_value)
        FROM (
            SELECT SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_order_value
            FROM orders o
            JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
            WHERE o.o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01'
            GROUP BY o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
        ) oi
    )
ORDER BY
    os.total_order_value DESC

        COUNT(l.l_orderkey) AS line_count,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_custkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS recent_rank
    FROM orders o
    INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
) o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey AND o.recent_rank = 1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rn
    FROM supplier s
    INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
) r ON r.rn <= 10
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp ps
        INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = r.s_suppkey
          AND p.p_size > 20
          AND p.p_retailprice < 100.00
    )
INNER JOIN nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE o.line_count > 5
ORDER BY c.c_acctbal DESC, r.total_cost DESC
OPTION (MAXRECURSION 100)

sql1:
SELECT s_name, SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) AS total_cost
FROM supplier
JOIN partsupp ON s_suppkey = ps_suppkey
JOIN part ON ps_partkey = p_partkey
GROUP BY s_name
ORDER BY total_cost DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:

FROM supplier
JOIN partsupp ON s_suppkey = ps_suppkey
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM part WHERE p_partkey = ps_partkey
)
GROUP BY s_name
ORDER BY total_cost DESC

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '2024-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '2024-01-01'
),
revenue AS (
    SELECT s.s_nationkey,
           l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS rev
    FROM lineitem l
    INNER JOIN filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM partsupp ps
        WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
          AND ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    )
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM part p
        WHERE p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    )
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM customer c
        WHERE c.c_custkey = fo.o_custkey
    )
)
SELECT n.n_name,
       SUM(r.rev) AS total_revenue
FROM revenue r
JOIN nation n ON r.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY n.n_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

sql1:
SELECT p.p_name, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM part p
JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA' AND l.l_shipdate >= date '1995-01-01' 
AND l.l_shipdate < date '1996-01-01'
GROUP BY p.p_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
WITH asian_suppliers AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    WHERE s.s_nationkey IN (
        SELECT n.n_nationkey
        FROM nation n
        WHERE n.n_regionkey IN (
            SELECT r.r_regionkey FROM region r WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA'
        )
    )
),
filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, l_extendedprice, l_discount
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
      AND l_shipdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
)
SELECT p.p_name,
       SUM(fl.l_extendedprice * (1 - fl.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM part p
JOIN filtered_lineitems fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
JOIN asian_suppliers asp ON p.p_partkey = asp.ps_partkey
GROUP BY p.p_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

WITH asia_suppliers AS (

    WHERE n.n_regionkey IN (SELECT r.r_regionkey FROM region r WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA')

asia_parts AS (

    FROM partsupp ps

SELECT

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, 
           o.o_orderdate, 
           o.o_totalprice, 
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS rank
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(year, -1, CURRENT_DATE)
), 
SupplierAggregates AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, 
           ps.ps_suppkey, 
           SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available, 
           AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
    FROM partsupp ps
    GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
), 
CustomerBalance AS (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, 
           c.c_name, 
           SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM customer c
    JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
)
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    s.s_acctbal, 
    ra.o_orderkey, 
    ra.o_orderdate, 
    ra.o_totalprice,
    ca.total_spent,
    COALESCE(sa.total_available, 0) AS available_qty,
    CASE 
        WHEN ca.total_spent IS NULL THEN 'No Purchases'
        ELSE CONCAT('Spent: $', CAST(ca.total_spent AS VARCHAR(20)))
    END AS customer_status
FROM part p
LEFT JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN RankedOrders ra ON ra.o_orderkey IN (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey 
    FROM orders o 
    WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'O' 
    AND o.o_orderkey IN (
        SELECT o2.o_orderkey 
        FROM orders o2 
        WHERE o2.o_orderdate IS NOT NULL
    )
)
LEFT JOIN CustomerBalance ca ON s.s_nationkey = ca.c_custkey
LEFT JOIN SupplierAggregates sa ON p.p_partkey = sa.ps_partkey
WHERE (s.s_acctbal IS NOT NULL OR 1=1)
  AND (p.p_size BETWEEN 1 AND 100 OR p.p_brand IS NULL)
ORDER BY ra.o_orderdate DESC, s.s_name ASC
sql2:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    s.s_acctbal, 
    ra.o_orderkey, 
    ra.o_orderdate, 
    ra.o_totalprice,
    ca.total_spent,
    COALESCE(sa.total_available, 0) AS available_qty,
    CASE 
        WHEN ca.total_spent IS NULL THEN 'No Purchases'
        ELSE CONCAT('Spent: $', CAST(ca.total_spent AS VARCHAR(20)))
    END AS customer_status
FROM part p
LEFT JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, 
           o.o_orderdate, 
           o.o_totalprice, 
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS rank
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(year, -1, CURRENT_DATE)
) ra ON EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM orders o 
    WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'O' 
      AND o.o_orderkey = ra.o_orderkey
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 
          FROM orders o2 
          WHERE o2.o_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
            AND o2.o_orderdate IS NOT NULL
      )
)
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, 
           c.c_name, 
           SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM customer c
    JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
) ca ON s.s_nationkey = ca.c_custkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT ps2.ps_partkey, 
           ps2.ps_suppkey, 
           SUM(ps2.ps_availqty) AS total_available, 
           AVG(ps2.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
    FROM partsupp ps2
    GROUP BY ps2.ps_partkey, ps2.ps_suppkey
) sa ON p.p_partkey = sa.ps_partkey
WHERE (s.s_acctbal IS NOT NULL OR 1=1)
  AND (p.p_size BETWEEN 1 AND 100 OR p.p_brand IS NULL)
ORDER BY ra.o_orderdate DESC, s.s_name ASC

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name,

FROM 
    part p
JOIN

JOIN

JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'ASIA' 
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'

sql2:
WITH asian_nations AS (
    SELECT n.n_nationkey, n.n_name
    FROM nation n
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM region r
        WHERE r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
          AND r.r_name = 'ASIA'
    )
),
qualified_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, an.n_name
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN asian_nations an ON s.s_nationkey = an.n_nationkey
)
SELECT
    qs.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    lineitem l
JOIN qualified_suppliers qs ON l.l_suppkey = qs.s_suppkey
WHERE
    l.l_partkey IN (SELECT p.p_partkey FROM part p)
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '2024-01-01'
GROUP BY
    qs.n_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
WITH order_lines AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_suppkey,
        l.l_partkey,
        l.l_extendedprice,
        l.l_discount
    FROM
        orders o
    JOIN
        customer c ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    JOIN
        lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
),
supplier_nation AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        n.n_name
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        nation n ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
)
SELECT
    sn.n_name,
    SUM(ol.l_extendedprice * (1 - ol.l_discount)) AS total_sales
FROM
    order_lines ol
JOIN
    supplier_nation sn ON sn.s_suppkey = ol.l_suppkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON ps.ps_partkey = ol.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = sn.s_suppkey
GROUP BY
    sn.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS rn
    FROM
        orders o
    WHERE
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
),
SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps_partkey) AS total_parts,
        SUM(ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
        AVG(ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY
        s.s_suppkey
),
HighValueCustomers AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_custkey,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM
        customer c
    JOIN
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY
        c.c_custkey
    HAVING
        total_spent > (SELECT AVG(o_totalprice) FROM orders)
),
PartDetails AS (
    SELECT
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_mfgr,
        p.p_brand,
        p.p_retailprice,
        CASE
            WHEN p.p_size IS NULL THEN 'Unknown Size'
            ELSE CONCAT('Size: ', p.p_size)
        END AS size_description
    FROM
        part p
)
SELECT
    o.o_orderkey,
    o.o_orderdate,
    o.o_totalprice,
    s.s_name,
    ps.total_parts,
    ps.total_available_quantity,
    ps.avg_supply_cost,
    c.c_name,
    c.total_spent,
    pd.p_name,
    pd.size_description
FROM
    RankedOrders o
LEFT JOIN
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN
    HighValueCustomers c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
INNER JOIN
    PartDetails pd ON l.l_partkey = pd.p_partkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderstatus IN ('O', 'F')
    AND l.l_returnflag = 'N'
    AND (s.s_acctbal IS NULL OR s.s_acctbal > 1000)
ORDER BY
    o.o_orderdate DESC,
    s.total_parts DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    o.o_orderkey,
    o.o_orderdate,
    o.o_totalprice,
    s.s_name,
    ps.total_parts,
    ps.total_available_quantity,
    ps.avg_supply_cost,
    c.c_name,
    c.total_spent,
    pd.p_name,
    pd.size_description
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            o_orderkey,
            o_orderdate,
            o_totalprice,
            o_orderstatus,
            o_custkey,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o_orderstatus ORDER BY o_orderdate DESC) AS rn
        FROM
            orders
        WHERE
            o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    ) o
LEFT JOIN
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            s2.s_suppkey,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ps2.ps_partkey) AS total_parts,
            SUM(ps2.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
            AVG(ps2.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
        FROM
            supplier s2
        JOIN
            partsupp ps2 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY
            s2.s_suppkey
    ) ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.s_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            c2.c_custkey,
            c2.c_name,
            SUM(o2.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
        FROM
            customer c2
        JOIN
            orders o2 ON c2.c_custkey = o2.o_custkey
        GROUP BY
            c2.c_custkey,
            c2.c_name
        HAVING
            SUM(o2.o_totalprice) > (SELECT AVG(o_totalprice) FROM orders)
    ) c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
INNER JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            p.p_partkey,
            p.p_name,
            p.p_mfgr,
            p.p_brand,
            p.p_retailprice,
            CASE
                WHEN p.p_size IS NULL THEN 'Unknown Size'
                ELSE CONCAT('Size: ', p.p_size)
            END AS size_description
        FROM
            part p
    ) pd ON l.l_partkey = pd.p_partkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderstatus IN ('O', 'F')
    AND l.l_returnflag = 'N'
    AND (s.s_acctbal IS NULL OR s.s_acctbal > 1000)
ORDER BY
    o.o_orderdate DESC,
    ps.total_parts DESC

SELECT
    n_name,

FROM
    customer c
JOIN
    orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey

sql2:
WITH order_lines AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_suppkey,
        l.l_partkey,
        l.l_extendedprice,
        l.l_discount,
        o.o_custkey
    FROM
        orders o
    JOIN
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
),
filtered AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_nationkey,
        ol.l_extendedprice,
        ol.l_discount
    FROM
        order_lines ol
    JOIN
        customer c ON ol.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    JOIN
        supplier s ON ol.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    WHERE
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM partsupp ps
            WHERE ps.ps_partkey = ol.l_partkey
              AND ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        )
)
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(f.l_extendedprice * (1 - f.l_discount)) AS revenue

    filtered f
JOIN
    nation n ON f.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC

sql1:
SELECT 
    n_name,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    lineitem
JOIN 
    orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer ON o_custkey = c_custkey
JOIN 
    supplier ON l_suppkey = s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ON l_partkey = ps_partkey AND s_suppkey = ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part ON ps_partkey = p_partkey
JOIN 
    nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey
WHERE 
    o_orderdate >= DATE '1994-01-01' AND o_orderdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
    AND n_name = 'USA'
GROUP BY 
    n_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
sql2:
WITH usa_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey
    FROM supplier
    WHERE s_nationkey IN (SELECT n_nationkey FROM nation WHERE n_name = 'USA')
),
filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1994-01-01' AND o_orderdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
)
SELECT 
    n_name,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    lineitem
JOIN filtered_orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey
JOIN usa_suppliers ON l_suppkey = s_suppkey
JOIN partsupp ON l_partkey = ps_partkey AND l_suppkey = ps_suppkey
JOIN nation ON n_name = 'USA'
    AND n_nationkey = (SELECT s_nationkey FROM supplier WHERE s_suppkey = l_suppkey)
WHERE 
    EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customer WHERE c_custkey = o_custkey)
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM part WHERE p_partkey = ps_partkey)
GROUP BY 
    n_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_value
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY
    total_value DESC
LIMIT 100
sql2:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    agg.total_availqty,
    agg.total_value
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            ps.ps_partkey,
            ps.ps_suppkey,
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_value
        FROM
            partsupp ps
        GROUP BY
            ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
    ) agg
JOIN
    part p ON p.p_partkey = agg.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = agg.ps_suppkey
ORDER BY
    agg.total_value DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    lineitem l
JOIN
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '2024-01-01'
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC

supplier_nation AS (

    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey

ORDER BY

sql1:
WITH ranked_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_price,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'O' 
        AND l.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate
),
customer_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey 
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
),
nation_supplier AS (
    SELECT 
        n.n_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count
    FROM 
        nation n
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    GROUP BY 
        n.n_name
),
final_report AS (
    SELECT 
        cs.c_name,
        cs.order_count,
        cs.total_spent,
        ro.total_price,
        ns.supplier_count
    FROM 
        customer_summary cs
    LEFT JOIN 
        ranked_orders ro ON cs.order_count > 0 AND ro.rn = 1
    LEFT JOIN 
        nation_supplier ns ON ns.supplier_count > 5
)
SELECT 
    fr.c_name AS customer_name,
    fr.order_count AS total_orders,
    COALESCE(fr.total_spent, 0.00) AS total_spent,
    COALESCE(fr.total_price, 0.00) AS last_order_total,
    fr.supplier_count AS suppliers_in_nation
FROM 
    final_report fr
WHERE 
    fr.total_spent > 1000
ORDER BY 
    fr.total_spent DESC, fr.customer_name ASC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT 
    cs.c_name AS customer_name,
    cs.order_count AS total_orders,
    COALESCE(cs.total_spent, 0.00) AS total_spent,
    COALESCE(ro.total_price, 0.00) AS last_order_total,
    ns.supplier_count AS suppliers_in_nation
FROM 
    (SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
     FROM 
        customer c
     LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
     GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    ) cs
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_price,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS rn
     FROM 
        orders o
     INNER JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
     WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
        AND l.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
     GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate
    ) ro ON cs.order_count > 0 AND ro.rn = 1
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        n.n_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count
     FROM 
        nation n
     INNER JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
     GROUP BY 
        n.n_name
     HAVING 
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) > 5
    ) ns ON TRUE
WHERE 
    cs.total_spent > 1000
ORDER BY 
    cs.total_spent DESC, cs.c_name ASC
LIMIT 10

    part p 
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey 
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey 
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey 
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey 
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name 
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC 
LIMIT 100
sql2:
WITH supplier_parts AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
),
line_orders AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_quantity, l.l_extendedprice, o.o_orderkey
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(lo.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(lo.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
    COUNT(DISTINCT lo.o_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    supplier_parts sp ON p.p_partkey = sp.ps_partkey
JOIN
    line_orders lo ON lo.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31'
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customer c WHERE c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey)
),
line_supp AS (
    SELECT l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount, l.l_partkey, s.s_suppkey, n.n_name
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN filtered_orders fo ON fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM partsupp ps
        WHERE ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    )
)
SELECT
    n_name,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM line_supp
GROUP BY n_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC

sql1:
SELECT 
    s.s_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
WHERE 
    l.l_shipdate >= '2022-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < '2023-01-01'
