sql2:
WITH revenue_by_part AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_partkey,
        l.l_suppkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS part_revenue
    FROM
        lineitem l
    WHERE
        l.l_shipdate >= '2022-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < '2023-01-01'
    GROUP BY
        l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey
)
SELECT
    s.s_name,
    SUM(r.part_revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM
    supplier s
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN
    revenue_by_part r ON p.p_partkey = r.l_partkey
WHERE
    ps.ps_suppkey = r.l_suppkey
GROUP BY
    s.s_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    part AS p
JOIN 
    lineitem AS l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    partsupp AS ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier AS s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation AS n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region AS r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'ASIA'
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name
ORDER BY

LIMIT 10

WITH asia_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA'
),
asia_partsupp AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN asia_suppliers asup ON ps.ps_suppkey = asup.s_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    asia_partsupp ap ON p.p_partkey = ap.ps_partkey
WHERE
    l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
GROUP BY
    p.p_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
SELECT s.s_name, COUNT(*) AS supplier_count, SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
FROM supplier s
JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
GROUP BY s.s_name
ORDER BY total_supply_cost DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:

    SELECT l.l_partkey
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM orders o
        WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
          AND o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
    )
)
SELECT s.s_name,
       COUNT(*) AS supplier_count,
       SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
FROM supplier s
JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN filtered_lineitems fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
GROUP BY s.s_name
ORDER BY total_supply_cost DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
SELECT p.p_brand, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM part p
JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE o.o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '2023-12-31'

WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01' AND o_orderdate < '2023-12-31'
),
order_lines AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey)
),
verified_supply AS (
    SELECT ol.l_partkey, ol.l_extendedprice, ol.l_discount
    FROM order_lines ol
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        WHERE ps.ps_partkey = ol.l_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ol.l_suppkey
    )
)
SELECT p.p_brand, SUM(vs.l_extendedprice * (1 - vs.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM part p
JOIN verified_supply vs ON p.p_partkey = vs.l_partkey
GROUP BY p.p_brand
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

      AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1996-01-01'

order_nation AS (

    FROM orders o

sql1:
WITH SupplierSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
        AVG(s.s_acctbal) AS avg_account_balance
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey
),
OrderSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_partkey) AS unique_parts_count
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'O' AND 
        l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate
),
RegionSupplier AS (
    SELECT 
        r.r_name,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_phone,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        region r
    JOIN 
        nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        r.r_name, s.s_name, s.s_phone
)
SELECT 
    rs.r_name,
    rs.s_name,
    rs.s_phone,
    COALESCE(ss.total_available_quantity, 0) AS available_qty,
    COALESCE(os.total_revenue, 0) AS order_revenue,
    ss.avg_account_balance,
    rs.total_supply_cost
FROM 
    RegionSupplier rs
LEFT JOIN 
    SupplierSummary ss ON rs.s_name = ss.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN 
    OrderSummary os ON os.o_orderkey = (SELECT MAX(o_orderkey) FROM orders)
ORDER BY 
    rs.r_name, ss.avg_account_balance DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    rs.r_name,
    rs.s_name,
    rs.s_phone,
    COALESCE(ss.total_available_quantity, 0) AS available_qty,
    COALESCE(os.total_revenue, 0) AS order_revenue,
    ss.avg_account_balance,
    rs.total_supply_cost
FROM 
    (SELECT 
        r.r_name,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_phone,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        region r
    JOIN 
        nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        r.r_name, s.s_name, s.s_phone) rs
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
        AVG(s.s_acctbal) AS avg_account_balance
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey) ss ON rs.s_name = ss.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_partkey) AS unique_parts_count
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'O' AND 
        l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate) os ON os.o_orderkey = (SELECT MAX(o_orderkey) FROM orders)
ORDER BY 
    rs.r_name, ss.avg_account_balance DESC

sql1:
WITH ranked_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderdate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year')
),
supplier_revenue AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 month')
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
nations AS (
    SELECT 
        n.n_nationkey,
        n.n_name,
        r.r_name AS region_name
    FROM nation n
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
)

SELECT 
    n.n_name,
    n.region_name,
    s.total_revenue AS supplier_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    COALESCE(RO.order_count, 0) AS high_value_order_count
FROM nations n
LEFT JOIN supplier_revenue s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        o.o_custkey,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM ranked_orders o
    WHERE o.order_rank <= 5
    GROUP BY o.o_custkey
) RO ON RO.o_custkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY n.n_name, n.region_name, s.total_revenue
ORDER BY supplier_revenue DESC, total_orders DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    n.n_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    sr.total_revenue AS supplier_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    COALESCE(RO.order_count, 0) AS high_value_order_count
FROM nation n
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_nationkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 month')
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
) sr ON n.n_nationkey = sr.s_nationkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        sub.o_custkey,
        COUNT(sub.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_custkey,
            o.o_orderstatus,
            o.o_totalprice,
            o.o_orderdate,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
        FROM orders o
        WHERE o.o_orderdate >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year')
    ) sub
    WHERE sub.order_rank <= 5
    GROUP BY sub.o_custkey
) RO ON RO.o_custkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY n.n_name, r.r_name, sr.total_revenue, RO.order_count
ORDER BY supplier_revenue DESC, total_orders DESC

sql1:
SELECT 
    n_name, 
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue 
FROM 
    lineitem 
JOIN 
    orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey 
JOIN 
    customer ON o_custkey = c_custkey 
JOIN 
    supplier ON l_suppkey = s_suppkey 
JOIN 
    partsupp ON l_partkey = ps_partkey AND s_suppkey = ps_suppkey 
JOIN 
    part ON ps_partkey = p_partkey 
JOIN 
    nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey 
WHERE 
    o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' 
    AND o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01' 
    AND s_nationkey IN (SELECT n_nationkey FROM nation WHERE n_name IN ('USA', 'Canada')) 
GROUP BY 
    n_name 
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
sql2:
WITH filtered_nations AS (
    SELECT n_nationkey, n_name
    FROM nation
    WHERE n_name IN ('USA', 'Canada')
),
filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
      AND o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
)
SELECT
    fn.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    filtered_nations fn
JOIN
    supplier s ON s.s_nationkey = fn.n_nationkey
JOIN
    lineitem l ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
JOIN
    customer c ON fo.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
GROUP BY
    fn.n_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC

WITH supplier_nation AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, n.n_name
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
),
line_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_orderkey,
        l.l_partkey,
        l.l_suppkey,
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM orders o
        JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    )
)
SELECT
    sn.n_name,
    SUM(lr.revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM
    line_revenue lr
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON lr.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND lr.l_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    supplier_nation sn ON lr.l_suppkey = sn.s_suppkey
GROUP BY
    sn.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
sql2:
WITH filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey, l.l_orderkey,
           l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS line_revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
      AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
),
valid_orders AS (
    SELECT fl.l_partkey, fl.l_suppkey, fl.line_revenue
    FROM filtered_lineitem fl
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM orders o
        JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        WHERE o.o_orderkey = fl.l_orderkey
    )
),
supplier_revenue AS (
    SELECT s.s_nationkey, vo.line_revenue
    FROM valid_orders vo
    JOIN supplier s ON vo.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = vo.l_suppkey
          AND p.p_partkey = vo.l_partkey
    )
)
SELECT n.n_name,
       SUM(sr.line_revenue) AS revenue
FROM supplier_revenue sr
JOIN nation n ON sr.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY n.n_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC

sql1:
SELECT 
    n_name, 
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    customer 
JOIN 
    orders ON c_custkey = o_custkey 
JOIN 
    lineitem ON o_orderkey = l_orderkey 
JOIN 
    supplier ON l_suppkey = s_suppkey 
JOIN 
    partsupp ON l_partkey = ps_partkey AND s_suppkey = ps_suppkey 
JOIN 
    part ON ps_partkey = p_partkey 
JOIN 
    nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey 
WHERE 
    o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1993-01-01' AND DATE '1993-12-31' 
    AND n_name = 'USA' 
GROUP BY 
    n_name 
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
sql2:
WITH usa_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey
    FROM supplier
    JOIN nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey AND n_name = 'USA'
),
filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1993-01-01' AND DATE '1993-12-31'
)
SELECT
    'USA' AS n_name,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    lineitem
JOIN
    usa_suppliers ON l_suppkey = s_suppkey
JOIN
    filtered_orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey
JOIN
    customer ON o_custkey = c_custkey
JOIN
    partsupp ON l_partkey = ps_partkey AND l_suppkey = ps_suppkey
JOIN
    part ON ps_partkey = p_partkey
GROUP BY
    n_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC

SELECT

sql1:
WITH customer_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
),
top_spenders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        co.total_spent,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY co.total_spent DESC) AS spend_rank
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        customer_orders co ON c.c_custkey = co.c_custkey
    WHERE 
        co.total_spent > 0
    HAVING 
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) > 2
),
part_supplier AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS unique_suppliers
    FROM 
        part p
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    GROUP BY 
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name
    HAVING 
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) > 100
)
SELECT 
    ts.c_name AS customer_name,
    ts.total_spent AS total_spent,
    ps.p_name AS part_name,
    ps.unique_suppliers AS unique_supplier_count,
    ps.total_supply_cost AS total_supply_cost,
    COALESCE(DATEDIFF(NOW(), MAX(l.l_shipdate)), 30) AS days_since_last_purchase,
    CASE 
        WHEN ts.spend_rank <= 10 THEN 'Top Spender'
        ELSE 'Regular Spender'
    END AS spender_category
FROM 
    top_spenders ts
JOIN 
    orders o ON ts.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN 
    part_supplier ps ON ps.unique_suppliers > 2
WHERE 
    l.l_discount BETWEEN 0.10 AND 0.20
GROUP BY 
    ts.c_custkey, ts.c_name, ps.p_name, ps.unique_suppliers, ps.total_supply_cost
ORDER BY 
    ts.total_spent DESC, ps.total_supply_cost ASC
LIMIT 50
sql2:
SELECT 
    ts.c_name AS customer_name,
    ts.total_spent AS total_spent,
    ps.p_name AS part_name,
    ps.unique_suppliers AS unique_supplier_count,
    ps.total_supply_cost AS total_supply_cost,
    COALESCE(DATEDIFF(NOW(), MAX(l.l_shipdate)), 30) AS days_since_last_purchase,
    CASE 
        WHEN ts.spend_rank <= 10 THEN 'Top Spender'
        ELSE 'Regular Spender'
    END AS spender_category
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            co.total_spent,
            RANK() OVER (ORDER BY co.total_spent DESC) AS spend_rank
        FROM 
            customer c
        JOIN 
            (
                SELECT 
                    c2.c_custkey,
                    c2.c_name,
                    SUM(o2.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
                FROM 
                    customer c2
                LEFT JOIN 
                    orders o2 ON c2.c_custkey = o2.o_custkey
                GROUP BY 
                    c2.c_custkey, c2.c_name
            ) co ON c.c_custkey = co.c_custkey
        WHERE 
            co.total_spent > 0
        HAVING 
            COUNT(o.o_orderkey) > 2
    ) ts
JOIN 
    orders o ON ts.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
CROSS JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            p.p_partkey,
            p.p_name,
            SUM(ps2.ps_supplycost * ps2.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ps2.ps_suppkey) AS unique_suppliers
        FROM 
            part p
        JOIN 
            partsupp ps2 ON p.p_partkey = ps2.ps_partkey
        GROUP BY 
            p.p_partkey, p.p_name
        HAVING 
            SUM(ps2.ps_availqty) > 100
    ) ps
WHERE 
    ps.unique_suppliers > 2
    AND l.l_discount >= 0.10 
    AND l.l_discount <= 0.20
GROUP BY 
    ts.c_custkey, ts.c_name, ps.p_name, ps.unique_suppliers, ps.total_supply_cost
ORDER BY 
    ts.total_spent DESC, ps.total_supply_cost ASC
LIMIT 50

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        supplier s
),
OrderSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_partkey) AS part_count
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate
),
CustomerSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
        MAX(o.o_orderdate) AS last_order_date
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
),
TopNations AS (
    SELECT 
        n.n_nationkey,
        n.n_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM 
        nation n
    LEFT JOIN 
        customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        n.n_nationkey, n.n_name
    ORDER BY 
        order_count DESC
    LIMIT 5
)
SELECT 
    ns.n_name AS nation_name,
    cs.c_name AS customer_name,
    cs.total_spent,
    cs.order_count,
    os.total_revenue,
    rs.s_name AS top_supplier
FROM 
    TopNations ns
JOIN 
    customer c ON c.c_nationkey = ns.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    CustomerSummary cs ON cs.c_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    OrderSummary os ON os.o_orderkey = (
        SELECT MIN(o_orderkey) 
        FROM orders 
        WHERE o_custkey = cs.c_custkey
    )
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSuppliers rs ON rs.rn = 1 AND rs.s_suppkey = (
        SELECT ps.ps_suppkey 
        FROM partsupp ps 
        JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey 
        WHERE p.p_brand LIKE 'Brand#%'
        ORDER BY ps.ps_supplycost ASC 
        LIMIT 1
    )
WHERE 
    cs.last_order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
ORDER BY 
    cs.total_spent DESC, cs.order_count DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    c.c_name AS customer_name,
    cs.total_spent,
    cs.order_count,
    os.total_revenue,
    rs.s_name AS top_supplier
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            n2.n_nationkey,
            n2.n_name,
            COUNT(DISTINCT o2.o_orderkey) AS nation_order_count
        FROM 
            nation n2
        LEFT JOIN 
            customer c2 ON n2.n_nationkey = c2.c_nationkey
        LEFT JOIN 
            orders o2 ON c2.c_custkey = o2.o_custkey
        GROUP BY 
            n2.n_nationkey, n2.n_name
        ORDER BY 
            nation_order_count DESC
        LIMIT 5
    ) ns
JOIN 
    customer c ON c.c_nationkey = ns.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            c3.c_custkey,
            c3.c_name,
            SUM(o3.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
            COUNT(o3.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
            MAX(o3.o_orderdate) AS last_order_date
        FROM 
            customer c3
        LEFT JOIN 
            orders o3 ON c3.c_custkey = o3.o_custkey
        GROUP BY 
            c3.c_custkey, c3.c_name
    ) cs ON cs.c_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            o4.o_custkey,
            MIN(o4.o_orderkey) AS min_orderkey
        FROM 
            orders o4
        GROUP BY 
            o4.o_custkey
    ) mo ON mo.o_custkey = cs.c_custkey
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            o5.o_orderkey,
            o5.o_orderdate,
            SUM(l5.l_extendedprice * (1 - l5.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
            COUNT(DISTINCT l5.l_partkey) AS part_count
        FROM 
            orders o5
        JOIN 
            lineitem l5 ON o5.o_orderkey = l5.l_orderkey
        WHERE 
            o5.o_orderstatus = 'F'
        GROUP BY 
            o5.o_orderkey, o5.o_orderdate
    ) os ON os.o_orderkey = mo.min_orderkey
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            s.s_suppkey, 
            s.s_name,
            s.s_acctbal,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rn
        FROM 
            supplier s
    ) rs ON rs.rn = 1 AND rs.s_suppkey = (
        SELECT ps.ps_suppkey 
        FROM partsupp ps 
        JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey 
        WHERE p.p_brand LIKE 'Brand#%'
        ORDER BY ps.ps_supplycost ASC 
        LIMIT 1
    )
WHERE 
    cs.last_order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
ORDER BY 
    cs.total_spent DESC, cs.order_count DESC

    WHERE EXISTS (

sql2:

FROM
    (
        SELECT
            l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS total_revenue
        FROM
            lineitem
        WHERE
            l_shipdate >= DATE '2021-01-01'
            AND l_shipdate < DATE '2021-02-01'
            AND l_returnflag = 'N'
    ) AS filtered_lines

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_custkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
),
CustomerSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
        AVG(o.o_totalprice) AS avg_order_value
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
),
PartSupplierInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supplycost
    FROM 
        part p
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    GROUP BY 
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name
)
SELECT 
    c.c_name,
    ps.p_name,
    ps.total_available,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) IS NULL THEN 'No Sales'
        ELSE 'Sales Exist'
    END AS sales_status,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_custkey ORDER BY SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) DESC) AS sales_rank
FROM 
    CustomerSummary c
LEFT JOIN 
    orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
LEFT JOIN 
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN 
    PartSupplierInfo ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.p_partkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(month, -6, CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY 
    c.c_name, ps.p_name, ps.total_available
HAVING 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) > 10
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.c_name,
    sub.p_name,
    sub.total_available,
    sub.total_quantity,
    sub.total_revenue,
    sub.sales_status,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sub.c_custkey ORDER BY sub.total_revenue DESC) AS sales_rank
FROM (
    SELECT
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        psi.p_name,
        psi.total_available,
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        CASE
            WHEN SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) IS NULL THEN 'No Sales'
            ELSE 'Sales Exist'
        END AS sales_status
    FROM
        customer c
    JOIN
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    JOIN
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    JOIN (
        SELECT
            ps.ps_partkey,
            p.p_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supplycost
        FROM
            part p
        JOIN
            partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
        GROUP BY
            ps.ps_partkey, p.p_name
    ) psi ON l.l_partkey = psi.ps_partkey
    WHERE
        o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(month, -6, CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name, psi.p_name, psi.total_available
    HAVING
        SUM(l.l_quantity) > 10
) sub
ORDER BY
    sub.total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
SELECT 
    l_returnflag,
    l_linestatus,
    SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty,
    SUM(l_extendedprice) AS sum_base_price,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS sum_disc_price,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) AS sum_chrg,
    AVG(l_quantity) AS avg_qty,
    AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
    AVG(l_discount) AS avg_disc,
    COUNT(*) AS count_order
FROM 
    lineitem
WHERE 
    l_shipdate <= DATE '2023-10-01'
GROUP BY 
    l_returnflag, l_linestatus
ORDER BY 
    l_returnflag, l_linestatus
sql2:
WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT
        l_returnflag,
        l_linestatus,
        l_quantity,
        l_extendedprice,
        l_discount,
        l_tax
    FROM
        lineitem
    WHERE
        l_shipdate <= DATE '2023-10-01'
)
SELECT
    l_returnflag,
    l_linestatus,
    SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty,
    SUM(l_extendedprice) AS sum_base_price,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS sum_disc_price,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) AS sum_chrg,
    SUM(l_quantity) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS avg_qty,
    SUM(l_extendedprice) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS avg_price,
    SUM(l_discount) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS avg_disc,
    COUNT(*) AS count_order
FROM
    filtered
GROUP BY
    l_returnflag, l_linestatus
ORDER BY
    l_returnflag, l_linestatus

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    customer c 
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey 
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey 
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey 
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey 
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey 
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey 
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND 
    o.o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01' 
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name 
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
      AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
),
supplier_nation AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, n.n_name
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
),
valid_lineitems AS (
    SELECT sn.n_name,
           l.l_extendedprice,
           l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
    JOIN supplier_nation sn ON l.l_suppkey = sn.s_suppkey
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        WHERE ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
          AND ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    )
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM customer c
        WHERE c.c_custkey = fo.o_custkey
    )
)
SELECT
    n_name,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM valid_lineitems
GROUP BY n_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01' AND 
    o.o_orderdate < DATE '2023-02-01' AND 
    n.n_name IN ('Germany', 'France')
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
      AND o_orderdate < DATE '2023-02-01'
),
filtered_nations AS (
    SELECT n_nationkey, n_name
    FROM nation
    WHERE n_name IN ('Germany', 'France')
)
SELECT
    fn.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    filtered_orders fo
JOIN
    customer c ON fo.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN
    lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    filtered_nations fn ON s.s_nationkey = fn.n_nationkey
WHERE
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp ps
        WHERE ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
          AND ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    )
GROUP BY
    fn.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC

SELECT n.r_name, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM lineitem l
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE o.o_orderdate >= '2021-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '2022-01-01'
GROUP BY n.r_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '2021-01-01' AND o_orderdate < '2022-01-01'
),
order_lines AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount, fo.o_custkey
    FROM lineitem l
    INNER JOIN filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
)
SELECT n.r_name, SUM(ol.l_extendedprice * (1 - ol.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM order_lines ol
INNER JOIN customer c ON ol.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
INNER JOIN supplier s ON ol.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON ol.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
INNER JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY n.r_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC

order_revenue AS (

order_lines AS (

sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01' AND o_orderdate < '2023-12-31'
),
revenue AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_nationkey,
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS rev
    FROM
        lineitem l,
        filtered_orders o,
        customer c,
        supplier s,
        partsupp ps
    WHERE
        l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        AND o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        AND l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        AND l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
        AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(r.rev) AS total_revenue
FROM
    revenue r
JOIN
    nation n ON r.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) AS distinct_parts_supplied,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey
),
CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey
),
HighValueCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        co.total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        CustomerOrders co ON c.c_custkey = co.c_custkey
    WHERE 
        co.total_spent > (SELECT AVG(total_spent) FROM CustomerOrders)
)
SELECT 
    ss.s_name AS supplier_name,
    ss.total_available_quantity,
    ss.avg_supply_cost,
    hvc.c_name AS high_value_customer,
    hvc.total_spent,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM lineitem l 
     WHERE l.l_suppkey = ss.s_suppkey 
       AND l.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year') AS recent_shipments
FROM 
    SupplierStats ss
LEFT JOIN 
    HighValueCustomers hvc ON hvc.total_spent > ss.avg_supply_cost
WHERE 
    ss.rn <= 5
ORDER BY 
    ss.total_available_quantity DESC, 
    hvc.total_spent DESC NULLS LAST
sql2:
SELECT 
    ss.s_name AS supplier_name,
    ss.total_available_quantity,
    ss.avg_supply_cost,
    hvc.c_name AS high_value_customer,
    hvc.total_spent,
    COALESCE(rs.recent_shipments, 0) AS recent_shipments
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
            AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost,
            COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) AS distinct_parts_supplied,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rn
        FROM 
            supplier s
        JOIN 
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        JOIN 
            part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        GROUP BY 
            s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
    ) ss
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            co.total_spent
        FROM 
            customer c
        JOIN 
            (
                SELECT 
                    c2.c_custkey,
                    SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
                FROM 
                    customer c2
                LEFT JOIN 
                    orders o ON c2.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
                GROUP BY 
                    c2.c_custkey
            ) co ON c.c_custkey = co.c_custkey
        WHERE 
            co.total_spent > (
                SELECT AVG(co2.total_spent)
                FROM (
                    SELECT 
                        c3.c_custkey,
                        SUM(o2.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
                    FROM 
                        customer c3
                    LEFT JOIN 
                        orders o2 ON c3.c_custkey = o2.o_custkey
                    GROUP BY 
                        c3.c_custkey
                ) co2
            )
    ) hvc ON hvc.total_spent > ss.avg_supply_cost
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            l.l_suppkey,
            COUNT(*) AS recent_shipments
        FROM 
            lineitem l
        WHERE 
            l.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
        GROUP BY 
            l.l_suppkey
    ) rs ON rs.l_suppkey = ss.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    ss.rn <= 5
ORDER BY 
    ss.total_available_quantity DESC, 
    hvc.total_spent DESC NULLS LAST

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue 
FROM 
    part p 
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey 
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey 
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey 
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey 
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey 
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'AMERICA' 
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name 
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC 
LIMIT 10
sql2:
WITH american_partsupp AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    WHERE ps.ps_suppkey IN (
        SELECT s.s_suppkey
        FROM supplier s
        JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE r.r_name = 'AMERICA'
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    american_partsupp aps ON p.p_partkey = aps.ps_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        supplier s
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        r.r_name,
        rs.s_suppkey,
        rs.s_name,
        rs.s_acctbal
    FROM 
        region r
    JOIN 
        nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    JOIN 
        RankedSuppliers rs ON n.n_nationkey = rs.s_nationkey
    WHERE 
        rs.rn <= 3
),
OrderSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_custkey,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
        MAX(o.o_orderdate) AS last_order_date
    FROM 
        orders o
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_custkey
)
SELECT 
    c.c_name,
    c.c_acctbal,
    COALESCE(ts.s_name, 'No Supplier') AS supplier_name,
    os.total_orders,
    os.total_spent,
    DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, os.last_order_date) AS days_since_last_order
FROM 
    customer c
LEFT JOIN 
    OrderSummary os ON c.c_custkey = os.o_custkey
LEFT JOIN 
    TopSuppliers ts ON c.c_nationkey = ts.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    (os.total_spent IS NULL OR os.total_spent > 1000)
    AND (c.c_acctbal < 1000 OR c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILD')
ORDER BY 
    c.c_name, os.total_spent DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    c.c_name,
    c.c_acctbal,
    COALESCE(ts.s_name, 'No Supplier') AS supplier_name,
    os.total_orders,
    os.total_spent,
    DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, os.last_order_date) AS days_since_last_order
FROM
    customer c
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        o.o_custkey,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
        MAX(o.o_orderdate) AS last_order_date
    FROM
        orders o
    GROUP BY
        o.o_custkey
) os ON c.c_custkey = os.o_custkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        r.r_name,
        rs.s_suppkey,
        rs.s_name,
        rs.s_acctbal
    FROM
        region r
    JOIN nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    JOIN (
        SELECT
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            s.s_acctbal,
            s.s_nationkey,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rn
        FROM
            supplier s
    ) rs ON n.n_nationkey = rs.s_nationkey
    WHERE
        rs.rn <= 3
) ts ON c.c_nationkey = ts.s_suppkey
WHERE
    (os.total_spent IS NULL OR os.total_spent > 1000)
    AND (c.c_acctbal < 1000 OR c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILD')
ORDER BY
    c.c_name, os.total_spent DESC

sql1:
WITH SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_nationkey,
        COUNT(s.s_suppkey) AS total_suppliers,
        SUM(s.s_acctbal) AS total_account_balance
    FROM 
        supplier s
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_nationkey
),
TopParts AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supplycost
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    WHERE 
        p.p_retailprice > 50
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_partkey
    HAVING 
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) > 100
),
OrderDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS order_revenue,
        COUNT(l.l_linenumber) AS item_count
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01'
        AND o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey
),
RegionSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        r.r_regionkey,
        r.r_name,
        n.n_name AS nation_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
        SUM(COALESCE(ss.total_account_balance, 0)) AS total_balance
    FROM 
        region r
    LEFT JOIN 
        nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        SupplierStats ss ON s.s_nationkey = ss.s_nationkey
    GROUP BY 
        r.r_regionkey, r.r_name, n.n_name
)
SELECT 
    r.r_name,
    r.nation_name,
    COALESCE(ts.total_supplycost, 0) AS total_part_supplycost,
    r.total_balance,
    os.order_revenue,
    os.item_count
FROM 
    RegionSummary r
LEFT JOIN 
    TopParts ts ON ts.ps_partkey IN (
        SELECT ps.ps_partkey
        FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
        WHERE l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 day'
    )
LEFT JOIN 
    OrderDetails os ON os.o_orderkey IN (
        SELECT o.o_orderkey
        FROM orders o 
        WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
        AND o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 day'
    )
WHERE 
    r.total_balance IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY 
    r.supplier_count DESC, 
    os.order_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100
sql2:
SELECT
    rs.r_name,
    rs.nation_name,
    COALESCE(ts.total_supplycost, 0) AS total_part_supplycost,
    rs.total_balance,
    os.order_revenue,
    os.item_count
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            r.r_regionkey,
            r.r_name,
            n.n_name AS nation_name,
            COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
            SUM(COALESCE(ss.total_account_balance, 0)) AS total_balance
        FROM
            region r
        LEFT JOIN
            nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
        LEFT JOIN
            supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
        LEFT JOIN
            (
                SELECT
                    s2.s_nationkey,
                    COUNT(s2.s_suppkey) AS total_suppliers,
                    SUM(s2.s_acctbal) AS total_account_balance
                FROM
                    supplier s2
                GROUP BY
                    s2.s_nationkey
            ) ss ON s.s_nationkey = ss.s_nationkey
        GROUP BY
            r.r_regionkey, r.r_name, n.n_name
    ) rs
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            ps.ps_partkey,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supplycost
        FROM
            partsupp ps
        JOIN
            part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        WHERE
            p.p_retailprice > 50
        GROUP BY
            ps.ps_partkey
        HAVING
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) > 100
    ) ts ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
        WHERE l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 day'
          AND ps.ps_partkey = ts.ps_partkey
    )
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            o.o_orderkey,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS order_revenue,
            COUNT(l.l_linenumber) AS item_count
        FROM
            orders o
        JOIN
            lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE
            o.o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01'
            AND o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
        GROUP BY
            o.o_orderkey
    ) os ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM orders o
        WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
          AND o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 day'
          AND o.o_orderkey = os.o_orderkey
    )
WHERE
    rs.total_balance IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    rs.supplier_count DESC,
    os.order_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS part_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
),
NationRegional AS (
    SELECT 
        n.n_nationkey,
        n.n_name,
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count
    FROM 
        nation n
    JOIN 
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    GROUP BY 
        n.n_nationkey, n.n_name, r.r_name
)
SELECT 
    ns.n_name,
    ns.region_name,
    ss.s_name,
    ss.total_supply_cost,
    ss.part_count,
    CASE 
        WHEN ss.total_supply_cost IS NULL OR ss.total_supply_cost = 0 THEN 'No Supply Cost'
        ELSE TO_CHAR(ss.total_supply_cost, 'FM$999,999,999.00')
    END AS formatted_total_supply_cost,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ns.n_nationkey ORDER BY ss.total_supply_cost DESC) AS supply_rank,
    (SELECT AVG(l_extendedprice) 
     FROM lineitem 
     WHERE l_orderkey IN (SELECT o.o_orderkey 
                          FROM orders o 
                          WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'O' 
                          AND o.o_orderdate < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year')) AS avg_extended_price
FROM 
    NationRegional ns
LEFT JOIN 
    SupplierStats ss ON ns.n_nationkey = ss.s_nationkey
WHERE 
    ns.supplier_count > 0 
    AND (ss.part_count IS NULL OR ss.part_count > 5)
ORDER BY 
    ns.region_name, ss.total_supply_cost DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    ss.s_name,
    ss.total_supply_cost,
    ss.part_count,
    CASE
        WHEN ss.total_supply_cost IS NULL OR ss.total_supply_cost = 0 THEN 'No Supply Cost'
        ELSE TO_CHAR(ss.total_supply_cost, 'FM$999,999,999.00')
    END AS formatted_total_supply_cost,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY n.n_nationkey ORDER BY ss.total_supply_cost DESC) AS supply_rank,
    aep.avg_extended_price
FROM
    nation n
JOIN
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_nationkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS part_count
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
) ss ON n.n_nationkey = ss.s_nationkey
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_extended_price
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
      AND o.o_orderdate < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
) aep
WHERE
    EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM supplier s2 WHERE s2.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey)
    AND (ss.part_count IS NULL OR ss.part_count > 5)
ORDER BY
    r.r_name, ss.total_supply_cost DESC

sql1:
WITH SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS part_count
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
OrderStats AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_totalprice,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS revenue_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice
),
CustomerWithOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_order_value
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
)
SELECT 
    s.s_name,
    ss.part_count,
    ss.total_cost,
    co.c_name,
    co.total_order_value,
    os.total_revenue,
    os.revenue_rank
FROM 
    SupplierStats ss
JOIN 
    customer_with_orders co ON ss.s_suppkey = (SELECT ps.ps_suppkey FROM partsupp ps 
                                                 WHERE ps.ps_partkey IN (SELECT p.p_partkey 
                                                                         FROM part p 
                                                                         WHERE p.p_size > 20))
LEFT JOIN 
    OrderStats os ON os.o_orderkey = (SELECT o.o_orderkey FROM orders o 
                                        WHERE o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year' 
                                        ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC LIMIT 1)
WHERE 
    ss.total_cost > (SELECT AVG(total_cost) FROM SupplierStats)
ORDER BY 
    ss.total_cost DESC, co.total_order_value DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    ss.s_name,
    ss.part_count,
    ss.total_cost,
    co.c_name,
    co.total_order_value,
    os.total_revenue,
    os.revenue_rank
FROM
    (SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS part_count
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name) ss
JOIN
    (SELECT
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_order_value
    FROM
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name) co
    ON ss.s_suppkey = (SELECT ps.ps_suppkey FROM partsupp ps
                       WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM part p
                                     WHERE p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
                                       AND p.p_size > 20))
LEFT JOIN
    (SELECT
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_totalprice,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS revenue_rank
    FROM
        orders o
    JOIN
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE
        o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
    GROUP BY
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice) os
    ON os.o_orderkey = (SELECT o.o_orderkey FROM orders o
                        WHERE o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
                        ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC LIMIT 1)
WHERE
    ss.total_cost > (SELECT AVG(SUM(ps2.ps_supplycost * ps2.ps_availqty))
                     FROM supplier s2
                     JOIN partsupp ps2 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
                     GROUP BY s2.s_suppkey)
ORDER BY
    ss.total_cost DESC, co.total_order_value DESC

sql1:
WITH CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM
        customer c
    JOIN
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
),
SupplierParts AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        ps.ps_availqty,
        ps.ps_supplycost
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
),
OrderDetails AS (
    SELECT
        o.o_orderkey,
        l.l_partkey,
        l.l_suppkey,
        l.l_quantity,
        l.l_extendedprice,
        l.l_discount,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderkey ORDER BY l.l_linenumber) AS line_item_rank
    FROM
        orders o
    JOIN
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE
        o.o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '2024-01-01'
)
SELECT
    c.c_name,
    coalesce(SUM(od.l_extendedprice * (1 - od.l_discount)), 0) AS total_order_value,
    COUNT(DISTINCT od.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
    AVG(sp.ps_supplycost) AS average_supply_cost,
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(od.l_extendedprice * (1 - od.l_discount)) > 1000 THEN 'High Value Customer'
        WHEN SUM(od.l_extendedprice * (1 - od.l_discount)) BETWEEN 500 AND 1000 THEN 'Medium Value Customer'
        ELSE 'Low Value Customer'
    END AS customer_value_category
FROM
    CustomerOrders co
LEFT JOIN
    OrderDetails od ON co.c_custkey = od.o_orderkey
LEFT JOIN
    SupplierParts sp ON od.l_suppkey = sp.s_suppkey
WHERE
    sp.ps_availqty IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    c.c_name
ORDER BY
    total_order_value DESC
sql2:
