        FROM
            supplier s
        JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        GROUP BY n.n_nationkey, n.n_name
    ) ss ON r.r_regionkey = ss.n_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            o.o_orderkey,
            SUM(li.l_extendedprice * (1 - li.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
            COUNT(DISTINCT li.l_partkey) AS number_of_parts
        FROM
            orders o
        JOIN lineitem li ON o.o_orderkey = li.l_orderkey
        WHERE li.l_shipdate >= '2023-01-01' AND li.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE
        GROUP BY o.o_orderkey
    ) oa ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM orders o2
        JOIN customer c ON o2.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        WHERE o2.o_orderkey = oa.o_orderkey
          AND c.c_nationkey = ss.n_nationkey
    )
    GROUP BY r.r_regionkey, r.r_name
) t
WHERE total_sales > 10000
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH RecursiveSupplierCTE AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal, 0 AS hierarchy_level
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE s.s_acctbal IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal, r.hierarchy_level + 1
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN RecursiveSupplierCTE r ON s.s_suppkey = (SELECT ps.ps_suppkey FROM partsupp ps WHERE ps.ps_partkey = r.s_suppkey LIMIT 1)
    WHERE r.hierarchy_level < 5
),
DistinctRegions AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT r.r_regionkey, r.r_name
    FROM region r
    WHERE r.r_comment LIKE '%' || (SELECT MAX(c.c_name) FROM customer c WHERE c.c_acctbal < 0) || '%'
),
EffectiveLineItem AS (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY l.l_orderkey) AS total_lines,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sale
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '2021-01-01' AND CURRENT_DATE
    AND l.l_discount IS NOT NULL
),
OrderCustomerSummary AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice, c.c_mktsegment, COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS line_count
    FROM orders o
    JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    LEFT JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE o.o_orderstatus IN ('O', 'F') 
    GROUP BY o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice, c.c_mktsegment
),
ComplexOuterJoin AS (
    SELECT 
        o.os_orderkey, 
        o.o_totalprice,
        r.r_name,
        CASE 
            WHEN o.o_totalprice IS NULL THEN 'Missing Price'
            ELSE 'Price Available'
        END AS price_status
    FROM OrderCustomerSummary o
    FULL OUTER JOIN DistinctRegions r ON o.line_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EffectiveLineItem) 
    WHERE o.o_totalprice > 1000 OR r.r_name IS NULL
)
SELECT 
    cs.c_name,
    cs.c_acctbal,
    COALESCE(cos.price_status, 'No Status') AS order_status,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.c_mktsegment ORDER BY cs.c_acctbal DESC) AS segment_ranking
FROM customer cs
LEFT JOIN ComplexOuterJoin cos ON cs.c_custkey = cos.o_orderkey
WHERE cs.c_acctbal BETWEEN 500.00 AND 10000.00
  AND cs.c_name IS NOT NULL
  AND (cs.c_comment IS NULL OR LENGTH(cs.c_comment) > 5)
ORDER BY segment_ranking, cs.c_acctbal DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    cs.c_name,
    cs.c_acctbal,
    COALESCE(cos.price_status, 'No Status') AS order_status,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.c_mktsegment ORDER BY cs.c_acctbal DESC) AS segment_ranking
FROM customer cs
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        o.os_orderkey,
        o.o_totalprice,
        r.r_name,
        CASE
            WHEN o.o_totalprice IS NULL THEN 'Missing Price'
            ELSE 'Price Available'
        END AS price_status
    FROM (
        SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice, c.c_mktsegment, COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS line_count
        FROM orders o
        JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        LEFT JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE o.o_orderstatus IN ('O', 'F')
        GROUP BY o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice, c.c_mktsegment
    ) o
    FULL OUTER JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT r.r_regionkey, r.r_name
        FROM region r
        WHERE r.r_comment LIKE '%' || (SELECT MAX(c.c_name) FROM customer c WHERE c.c_acctbal < 0) || '%'
    ) r ON o.line_count = (
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM (
            SELECT
                l.l_orderkey,
                COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY l.l_orderkey) AS total_lines,
                SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sale
            FROM lineitem l
            WHERE l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '2021-01-01' AND CURRENT_DATE
              AND l.l_discount IS NOT NULL
        ) eli
    )
    WHERE o.o_totalprice > 1000 OR r.r_name IS NULL
) cos ON cs.c_custkey = cos.o_orderkey
WHERE cs.c_acctbal BETWEEN 500.00 AND 10000.00
  AND cs.c_name IS NOT NULL
  AND (cs.c_comment IS NULL OR LENGTH(cs.c_comment) > 5)
ORDER BY segment_ranking, cs.c_acctbal DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedParts AS (
    SELECT p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_brand, p.p_retailprice, 
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS rnk
    FROM part p
    WHERE p.p_size IN (SELECT DISTINCT p_size FROM part WHERE p_container IS NOT NULL)
),
CustomerTotal AS (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM customer c
    JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY c.c_custkey
    HAVING SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 10000
),
SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_avail_qty,
           COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS unique_suppliers
    FROM partsupp ps
    GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey
    HAVING SUM(ps.ps_availqty) > 0
)
SELECT DISTINCT 
       r.r_name AS region_name,
       count(*) FILTER (WHERE lp.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE) AS shipped_items,
       SUM(lp.l_extendedprice * (1 - lp.l_discount)) AS net_revenue,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CustomerTotal ct WHERE ct.total_spent > 50000) AS high_value_customers,
       COUNT(DISTINCT rnk.p_partkey) AS top_parts_count
FROM RankedParts rnk
LEFT JOIN lineitem lp ON rnk.p_partkey = lp.l_partkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON ps.ps_partkey = rnk.p_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE rnk.rnk <= 5 AND (lp.l_returnflag IS NULL OR lp.l_returnflag = 'N')
GROUP BY r.r_name
ORDER BY net_revenue DESC, region_name ASC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT 
       r.r_name AS region_name,
       count(*) FILTER (WHERE lp.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE) AS shipped_items,
       SUM(lp.l_extendedprice * (1 - lp.l_discount)) AS net_revenue,
       (SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM (SELECT c.c_custkey
              FROM customer c
              JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
              GROUP BY c.c_custkey
              HAVING SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 50000) hvc
       ) AS high_value_customers,
       COUNT(DISTINCT rnk.p_partkey) AS top_parts_count
FROM (
    SELECT p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_brand, p.p_retailprice,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS rnk
    FROM part p
) rnk
LEFT JOIN lineitem lp ON rnk.p_partkey = lp.l_partkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON ps.ps_partkey = rnk.p_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE rnk.rnk <= 5 AND (lp.l_returnflag IS NULL OR lp.l_returnflag = 'N')
GROUP BY r.r_name
ORDER BY net_revenue DESC, region_name ASC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_totalprice > (SELECT AVG(o2.o_totalprice) FROM orders o2)
),
SupplierParts AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supplycost
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey
),
HighValueParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_retailprice,
        CASE 
            WHEN p.p_size IS NULL THEN 'Unknown Size'
            WHEN p.p_size >= 10 THEN 'Large'
            ELSE 'Small'
        END AS part_size_category
    FROM 
        part p
    WHERE 
        p.p_retailprice > (SELECT AVG(p2.p_retailprice) FROM part p2)
),
OrderDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        lo.l_orderkey,
        SUM(lo.l_extendedprice * (1 - lo.l_discount)) AS total_price_after_discount,
        AVG(lo.l_tax) AS avg_tax_rate,
        COUNT(lo.l_orderkey) AS item_count
    FROM 
        lineitem lo
    GROUP BY 
        lo.l_orderkey
)
SELECT 
    r_o.o_orderkey,
    r_o.o_orderdate,
    COALESCE(hvp.part_size_category, 'No Catalog') AS part_category,
    COALESCE(sp.total_availqty, 0) AS available_quantity,
    od.total_price_after_discount,
    od.avg_tax_rate,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supplier s WHERE s.s_nationkey = (SELECT n.n_nationkey FROM nation n WHERE n.n_name = 'USA')) AS usa_supplier_count
FROM 
    RankedOrders r_o
LEFT JOIN 
    OrderDetails od ON r_o.o_orderkey = od.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN 
    SupplierParts sp ON sp.ps_partkey IN (SELECT p.p_partkey FROM HighValueParts hvp WHERE hvp.p_name LIKE '%Steel%')
WHERE 
    (r_o.order_rank <= 5 OR r_o.o_orderdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days')
ORDER BY 
    r_o.o_orderdate DESC,
    available_quantity DESC
LIMIT 100
sql2:
SELECT 
    r_o.o_orderkey,
    r_o.o_orderdate,
    COALESCE(hvp.part_size_category, 'No Catalog') AS part_category,
    COALESCE(sp.total_availqty, 0) AS available_quantity,
    od.total_price_after_discount,
    od.avg_tax_rate,
    usa.usa_supplier_count
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_orderdate,
            o.o_totalprice,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
        FROM 
            orders o
            CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(o2.o_totalprice) AS avg_tp FROM orders o2) oa
        WHERE 
            o.o_totalprice > oa.avg_tp
    ) r_o
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            lo.l_orderkey,
            SUM(lo.l_extendedprice * (1 - lo.l_discount)) AS total_price_after_discount,
            AVG(lo.l_tax) AS avg_tax_rate,
            COUNT(lo.l_orderkey) AS item_count
        FROM 
            lineitem lo
        GROUP BY 
            lo.l_orderkey
    ) od ON r_o.o_orderkey = od.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            ps.ps_partkey,
            ps.ps_suppkey,
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty,
            AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supplycost
        FROM 
            partsupp ps
        GROUP BY 
            ps.ps_partkey,
            ps.ps_suppkey
    ) sp ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM part p
            CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(p3.p_retailprice) AS avg_rp FROM part p3) pa
        WHERE p.p_retailprice > pa.avg_rp
          AND p.p_name LIKE '%Steel%'
          AND sp.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    )
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            p.p_partkey,
            p.p_name,
            p.p_retailprice,
            CASE 
                WHEN p.p_size IS NULL THEN 'Unknown Size'
                WHEN p.p_size >= 10 THEN 'Large'
                ELSE 'Small'
            END AS part_size_category
        FROM 
            part p
            CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(p2.p_retailprice) AS avg_rp FROM part p2) pa2
        WHERE 
            p.p_retailprice > pa2.avg_rp
    ) hvp ON 1 = 1
CROSS JOIN 
    (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS usa_supplier_count
        FROM supplier s
            INNER JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        WHERE n.n_name = 'USA'
    ) usa
WHERE 
    r_o.order_rank <= 5 OR r_o.o_orderdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
ORDER BY 
    r_o.o_orderdate DESC,
    available_quantity DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH RankedCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        c.c_acctbal,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_mktsegment ORDER BY c.c_acctbal DESC) AS rank_within_segment
    FROM 
        customer c
),
SupplierPartData AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        COALESCE(SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)), 0) AS total_value
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    LEFT JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_partkey, s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
EligibleOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_totalprice,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
        AND o.o_orderstatus IN ('O', 'P')
),
FinalOutput AS (
    SELECT 
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        n.n_name AS nation_name,
        COALESCE(SUM(spd.total_value) / NULLIF(SUM(spd.total_value) FILTER (WHERE spd.s_name IS NOT NULL), 0), 1) AS part_average,
        AVG(RC.c_acctbal) FILTER(WHERE RC.rank_within_segment <= 10) AS top_customer_balance
    FROM 
        region r
    JOIN 
        nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        SupplierPartData spd ON EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM partsupp ps
            WHERE ps.ps_partkey = spd.ps_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey IN (
                SELECT s.s_suppkey
                FROM supplier s
                WHERE s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
            )
        )
    LEFT JOIN 
        RankedCustomers RC ON n.n_nationkey = RC.c_nationkey
    GROUP BY 
        r.region_name, n.n_name
)
SELECT 
    f.region_name,
    f.nation_name,
    CASE WHEN f.part_average IS NULL THEN 'No Data' ELSE CAST(f.part_average AS VARCHAR) END AS avg_part_value,
    CASE WHEN f.top_customer_balance IS NULL THEN 'No Top Customers' ELSE CAST(f.top_customer_balance AS VARCHAR) END AS avg_top_customer_balance
FROM 
    FinalOutput f 
WHERE 
    f.part_average IS NOT NULL OR f.top_customer_balance IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    f.region_name, f.nation_name DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    f.region_name,
    f.nation_name,
    CASE WHEN f.part_average IS NULL THEN 'No Data' ELSE CAST(f.part_average AS VARCHAR) END AS avg_part_value,
    CASE WHEN f.top_customer_balance IS NULL THEN 'No Top Customers' ELSE CAST(f.top_customer_balance AS VARCHAR) END AS avg_top_customer_balance
FROM (
    SELECT
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        n.n_name AS nation_name,
        COALESCE(SUM(spd.total_value) / NULLIF(SUM(spd.total_value) FILTER (WHERE spd.s_name IS NOT NULL), 0), 1) AS part_average,
        AVG(RC.c_acctbal) FILTER(WHERE RC.rank_within_segment <= 10) AS top_customer_balance
    FROM
        region r
    JOIN
        nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            ps.ps_partkey,
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            COALESCE(SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)), 0) AS total_value
        FROM
            partsupp ps
        LEFT JOIN
            supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        LEFT JOIN
            lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
        GROUP BY
            ps.ps_partkey, s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    ) spd ON spd.ps_partkey IN (
        SELECT ps2.ps_partkey
        FROM partsupp ps2
        JOIN supplier s2 ON ps2.ps_suppkey = s2.s_suppkey
        WHERE s2.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    )
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            c.c_acctbal,
            c.c_nationkey,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_mktsegment ORDER BY c.c_acctbal DESC) AS rank_within_segment
        FROM
            customer c
    ) RC ON n.n_nationkey = RC.c_nationkey
    GROUP BY
        r.r_name, n.n_name
) f
WHERE
    f.part_average IS NOT NULL OR f.top_customer_balance IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    f.region_name, f.nation_name DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_brand,
        p.p_retailprice,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS brand_rank
    FROM 
        part p
    WHERE 
        p.p_size IN (SELECT DISTINCT p_size FROM part WHERE p_retailprice > 100)
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS supplier_rank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(s_acctbal) FROM supplier)
),
NationRegion AS (
    SELECT 
        n.n_name,
        r.r_name,
        COUNT(*) AS country_count
    FROM 
        nation n
    JOIN 
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    GROUP BY 
        n.n_name, r.r_name
),
OrderSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS order_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_suppkey) AS unique_suppliers,
        CASE 
            WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN 'Finalized'
            ELSE 'Not Finalized'
        END AS status
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderstatus, o.o_orderdate
),
FilteredOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        os.order_year,
        SUM(os.total_revenue) AS yearly_revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT os.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM 
        OrderSummary os
    WHERE 
        os.total_revenue > 5000
    GROUP BY 
        os.order_year
)
SELECT 
    r.r_name,
    np.n_name,
    SUM(fp.yearly_revenue) AS total_revenue,
    AVG(fp.order_count) AS avg_orders_per_year,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS total_parts,
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) > 10 THEN 'Diverse Portfolio'
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) IS NULL THEN 'No Parts Available'
        ELSE 'Limited Selection'
    END AS portfolio_status
FROM 
    NationRegion np
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedParts rp ON np.n_name = rp.p_brand
LEFT JOIN 
    TopSuppliers ts ON ts.s_suppkey = rp.p_partkey
FULL OUTER JOIN 
    FilteredOrders fp ON EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) = fp.order_year
WHERE 
    np.country_count > 1
GROUP BY 
    r.r_name, np.n_name
HAVING 
    SUM(fp.yearly_revenue) > 10000
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC, avg_orders_per_year DESC
LIMIT 100 OFFSET 10
sql2:
SELECT 
    r.r_name,
    np.n_name,
    SUM(fp.yearly_revenue) AS total_revenue,
    AVG(fp.order_count) AS avg_orders_per_year,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS total_parts,
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) > 10 THEN 'Diverse Portfolio'
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) IS NULL THEN 'No Parts Available'
        ELSE 'Limited Selection'
    END AS portfolio_status
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            n.n_name,
            r.r_name,
            COUNT(*) AS country_count
        FROM 
            nation n
        JOIN 
            region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        GROUP BY 
            n.n_name, r.r_name
    ) np
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            p.p_partkey,
            p.p_name,
            p.p_brand,
            p.p_retailprice,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS brand_rank
        FROM 
            part p
        WHERE 
            EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM part p2 WHERE p2.p_retailprice > 100 AND p2.p_size = p.p_size)
    ) rp ON np.n_name = rp.p_brand
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            s.s_acctbal,
            RANK() OVER (ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS supplier_rank
        FROM 
            supplier s
        INNER JOIN 
            (SELECT AVG(s_acctbal) AS avg_bal FROM supplier) avg_s 
            ON s.s_acctbal > avg_s.avg_bal
    ) ts ON ts.s_suppkey = rp.p_partkey
FULL OUTER JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS order_year,
            SUM(sub_rev) AS yearly_revenue,
            COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
        FROM 
            orders o
        JOIN 
            (
                SELECT 
                    l.l_orderkey,
                    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS sub_rev
                FROM 
                    lineitem l
                GROUP BY 
                    l.l_orderkey
            ) lo ON o.o_orderkey = lo.l_orderkey
        WHERE 
            lo.sub_rev > 5000
        GROUP BY 
            EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate)
    ) fp ON EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) = fp.order_year
WHERE 
    np.country_count > 1
GROUP BY 
    r.r_name, np.n_name
HAVING 
    SUM(fp.yearly_revenue) > 10000
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC, avg_orders_per_year DESC
LIMIT 100 OFFSET 10

sql1:
WITH RankedParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey, 
        p.p_name, 
        p.p_retailprice, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS price_rank
    FROM 
        part p
    WHERE 
        p.p_size IN (SELECT DISTINCT p_size FROM part WHERE p_container = 'SMALL')
),
SupplierInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_acctbal,
        COALESCE((SELECT SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) FROM partsupp ps WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey), 0) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        supplier s
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal > 0 AND
        s.s_name LIKE '%Corp%'
),
QualifiedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_lineitem_value
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(YEAR, -1, CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey
),
FilteredSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        si.s_suppkey, 
        si.s_name, 
        si.total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        SupplierInfo si
    WHERE 
        si.total_supply_cost > (SELECT AVG(total_supply_cost) FROM SupplierInfo)
)
SELECT 
    rp.p_name, 
    rp.p_retailprice, 
    fs.s_name, 
    fs.total_supply_cost,
    qo.total_lineitem_value,
    CASE 
        WHEN qo.total_lineitem_value IS NULL THEN 'No Orders'
        ELSE 'Has Orders'
    END AS order_status
FROM 
    RankedParts rp
LEFT JOIN 
    FilteredSuppliers fs ON fs.s_suppkey IN (SELECT ps.ps_suppkey FROM partsupp ps WHERE ps.ps_partkey = rp.p_partkey)
LEFT JOIN 
    QualifiedOrders qo ON qo.o_orderkey IN (SELECT o.o_orderkey FROM orders o WHERE o.o_custkey IN (SELECT c.c_custkey FROM customer c WHERE c.c_nationkey = (SELECT n.n_nationkey FROM nation n WHERE n.n_name = 'CANADA')))
WHERE 
    rp.price_rank <= 5
ORDER BY 
    rp.p_retailprice DESC NULLS LAST
sql2:
SELECT
    rp.p_name,
    rp.p_retailprice,
    fs.s_name,
    fs.total_supply_cost,
    qo.total_lineitem_value,
    CASE
        WHEN qo.total_lineitem_value IS NULL THEN 'No Orders'
        ELSE 'Has Orders'
    END AS order_status
FROM (
    SELECT
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_retailprice,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS price_rank
    FROM part p
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM part p2 WHERE p2.p_container = 'SMALL' AND p2.p_size = p.p_size
    )
) rp
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        ps_link.ps_partkey,
        si.s_suppkey,
        si.s_name,
        si.total_supply_cost
    FROM (
        SELECT
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            COALESCE(psa.total_cost, 0) AS total_supply_cost
        FROM supplier s
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT ps.ps_suppkey, SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
            FROM partsupp ps
            GROUP BY ps.ps_suppkey
        ) psa ON psa.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        WHERE s.s_acctbal > 0
          AND s.s_name LIKE '%Corp%'
          AND COALESCE(psa.total_cost, 0) > (
              SELECT AVG(COALESCE(psa2.total_cost, 0))
              FROM supplier s2
              LEFT JOIN (
                  SELECT ps.ps_suppkey, SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
                  FROM partsupp ps
                  GROUP BY ps.ps_suppkey
              ) psa2 ON psa2.ps_suppkey = s2.s_suppkey
              WHERE s2.s_acctbal > 0
                AND s2.s_name LIKE '%Corp%'
          )
    ) si
    JOIN partsupp ps_link ON ps_link.ps_suppkey = si.s_suppkey
) fs ON fs.ps_partkey = rp.p_partkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        o.o_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_lineitem_value
    FROM orders o
    JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(YEAR, -1, CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY o.o_orderkey
) qo ON EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM orders o2
    JOIN customer c ON c.c_custkey = o2.o_custkey
    JOIN nation n ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey AND n.n_name = 'CANADA'
    WHERE o2.o_orderkey = qo.o_orderkey
)
WHERE rp.price_rank <= 5
ORDER BY rp.p_retailprice DESC NULLS LAST

sql1:
WITH SupplierCosts AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * l.l_quantity) AS total_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN 
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_suppkey
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        sc.total_cost,
        sc.order_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sc.total_cost DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        supplier s
    LEFT JOIN 
        SupplierCosts sc ON s.s_suppkey = sc.ps_suppkey
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal IS NOT NULL AND s.s_acctbal > 0
)
SELECT 
    t.s_suppkey,
    t.s_name,
    COALESCE(t.total_cost, 0) AS total_cost,
    COALESCE(t.order_count, 0) AS order_count,
    CASE 
        WHEN t.total_cost IS NULL THEN 'No Orders'
        WHEN t.order_count > 1 THEN 'High Volume'
        ELSE 'Low Volume'
    END AS order_type
FROM 
    TopSuppliers t
WHERE 
    t.rn <= 10
ORDER BY 
    total_cost DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    t.s_suppkey,
    t.s_name,
    COALESCE(t.total_cost, 0) AS total_cost,
    COALESCE(t.order_count, 0) AS order_count,
    CASE 
        WHEN t.total_cost IS NULL THEN 'No Orders'
        WHEN t.order_count > 1 THEN 'High Volume'
        ELSE 'Low Volume'
    END AS order_type
FROM (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        sc.total_cost,
        sc.order_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sc.total_cost DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        supplier s
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT 
            ps.ps_suppkey,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * l.l_quantity) AS total_cost,
            COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
        FROM 
            partsupp ps
        JOIN 
            lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
        JOIN 
            orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        WHERE 
            l.l_shipdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
        GROUP BY 
            ps.ps_suppkey
    ) sc ON s.s_suppkey = sc.ps_suppkey
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal IS NOT NULL AND s.s_acctbal > 0
) t
WHERE 
    t.rn <= 10
ORDER BY 
    total_cost DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_acctbal,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_partkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rank 
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal IS NOT NULL
), FilteredOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        CASE 
            WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN 'Finalized Order'
            WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'P' THEN 'Pending Order'
            ELSE 'Other'
        END AS status_description
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(month, -6, CURRENT_DATE)
    AND 
        o.o_totalprice > (
            SELECT AVG(o2.o_totalprice) FROM orders o2 WHERE o2.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(month, -12, CURRENT_DATE)
        )
), OrderLineItems AS (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey, 
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_partkey) AS part_count
    FROM 
        lineitem l
    GROUP BY 
        l.l_orderkey
), ResultSet AS (
    SELECT 
        fo.o_orderkey, 
        fo.o_orderdate, 
        fo.o_totalprice, 
        ol.total_sales, 
        ol.part_count, 
        rs.s_name AS top_supplier
    FROM 
        FilteredOrders fo
    LEFT JOIN 
        OrderLineItems ol ON fo.o_orderkey = ol.l_orderkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        RankedSuppliers rs ON ol.total_sales IS NOT NULL AND rs.rank = 1
    WHERE 
        fo.o_orderdate = (
            SELECT MAX(o_orderdate) FROM FilteredOrders
        )
)
SELECT 
    r.*,
    COALESCE(r.total_sales, 0) AS adjusted_sales,
    CASE 
        WHEN r.total_sales IS NULL THEN 'No Sales'
        ELSE 'Sales Exist'
    END AS sales_status
FROM 
    ResultSet r
WHERE 
    (r.o_totalprice - COALESCE(r.total_sales, 0)) / NULLIF(r.o_totalprice, 0) > 0.1
ORDER BY 
    r.o_orderdate DESC, r.o_orderkey
sql2:
SELECT 
    fo.o_orderkey,
    fo.o_orderdate,
    fo.o_totalprice,
    ol.total_sales,
    ol.part_count,
    rs.s_name AS top_supplier,
    COALESCE(ol.total_sales, 0) AS adjusted_sales,
    CASE 
        WHEN ol.total_sales IS NULL THEN 'No Sales'
        ELSE 'Sales Exist'
    END AS sales_status
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            o.o_orderkey, 
            o.o_orderdate,
            o.o_totalprice,
            CASE 
                WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN 'Finalized Order'
                WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'P' THEN 'Pending Order'
                ELSE 'Other'
            END AS status_description
        FROM 
            orders o
        CROSS JOIN (
            SELECT AVG(o2.o_totalprice) AS avg_price FROM orders o2 WHERE o2.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(month, -12, CURRENT_DATE)
        ) ap
        WHERE 
            o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(month, -6, CURRENT_DATE)
            AND o.o_totalprice > ap.avg_price
    ) fo
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT MAX(o3.o_orderdate) AS max_dt
    FROM orders o3
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT AVG(o4.o_totalprice) AS avg_price FROM orders o4 WHERE o4.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(month, -12, CURRENT_DATE)
    ) ap2
    WHERE o3.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(month, -6, CURRENT_DATE)
      AND o3.o_totalprice > ap2.avg_price
) md ON fo.o_orderdate = md.max_dt
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey, 
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_partkey) AS part_count
    FROM 
        lineitem l
    GROUP BY 
        l.l_orderkey
) ol ON fo.o_orderkey = ol.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_acctbal
    FROM 
        supplier s
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal IS NOT NULL
        AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM partsupp ps2
            JOIN part p2 ON ps2.ps_partkey = p2.p_partkey
            JOIN supplier s2 ON ps2.ps_suppkey = s2.s_suppkey
            WHERE s2.s_acctbal > s.s_acctbal
              AND s2.s_acctbal IS NOT NULL
              AND EXISTS (
                  SELECT 1 FROM partsupp ps3 
                  JOIN part p3 ON ps3.ps_partkey = p3.p_partkey
                  WHERE ps3.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
                    AND ps3.ps_partkey = ps2.ps_partkey
              )
        )
        AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM partsupp ps4 JOIN part p4 ON ps4.ps_partkey = p4.p_partkey WHERE ps4.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        )
) rs ON ol.total_sales IS NOT NULL
WHERE 
    (fo.o_totalprice - COALESCE(ol.total_sales, 0)) / NULLIF(fo.o_totalprice, 0) > 0.1
ORDER BY 
    fo.o_orderdate DESC, fo.o_orderkey

sql1:
WITH regional_supplier AS (
    SELECT 
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS total_parts,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supplycost,
        SUM(CASE WHEN s.s_acctbal IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE s.s_acctbal END) AS adjusted_acctbal
    FROM 
        region r
    JOIN 
        nation n ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        r.r_name, s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal
),
order_details AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        MIN(l.l_shipdate) AS first_ship_date,
        MAX(l.l_receiptdate) AS last_receipt_date,
        AVG(l.l_quantity) AS avg_quantity,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_suppkey) AS distinct_suppliers
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey
),
qualified_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        od.o_orderkey,
        od.total_revenue,
        od.first_ship_date,
        od.last_receipt_date,
        od.avg_quantity,
        od.distinct_suppliers,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY od.first_ship_date ORDER BY od.total_revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank
    FROM 
        order_details od
    WHERE 
        od.total_revenue >= (
            SELECT AVG(total_revenue) FROM order_details
        )
),
final_report AS (
    SELECT 
        rs.region_name,
        rs.s_name,
        q.total_revenue,
        q.first_ship_date,
        q.last_receipt_date,
        q.avg_quantity,
        q.distinct_suppliers,
        CASE 
            WHEN q.first_ship_date IS NULL THEN 'No Ship Date'
            WHEN q.first_ship_date > CURRENT_DATE THEN 'Future Ship'
            ELSE 'Valid Ship'
        END AS ship_status
    FROM 
        regional_supplier rs
    JOIN 
        qualified_orders q ON rs.s_suppkey = (
            SELECT ps.ps_suppkey 
            FROM partsupp ps 
            WHERE ps.ps_partkey IN (
                SELECT l.l_partkey 
                FROM lineitem l 
                WHERE l.l_orderkey IN (
                    SELECT o.o_orderkey 
                    FROM orders o 
                    WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
                )
            ) 
            LIMIT 1
        )
)
SELECT 
    fr.region_name,
    fr.s_name,
    fr.total_revenue,
    fr.first_ship_date,
    fr.last_receipt_date,
    fr.avg_quantity,
    fr.distinct_suppliers,
    fr.ship_status
FROM 
    final_report fr
WHERE 
    fr.total_revenue IS NOT NULL 
    AND fr.avg_quantity > (SELECT AVG(avg_quantity) FROM qualified_orders)
ORDER BY 
    fr.region_name, fr.total_revenue DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    rs.region_name,
    rs.s_name,
    q.total_revenue,
    q.first_ship_date,
    q.last_receipt_date,
    q.avg_quantity,
    q.distinct_suppliers,
    CASE 
        WHEN q.first_ship_date IS NULL THEN 'No Ship Date'
        WHEN q.first_ship_date > CURRENT_DATE THEN 'Future Ship'
        ELSE 'Valid Ship'
    END AS ship_status
FROM (
    SELECT 
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name
    FROM region r
    JOIN nation n ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    JOIN supplier s ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    GROUP BY r.r_name, s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
) rs
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT 
        od.o_orderkey,
        od.total_revenue,
        od.first_ship_date,
        od.last_receipt_date,
        od.avg_quantity,
        od.distinct_suppliers,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY od.first_ship_date ORDER BY od.total_revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            o.o_orderkey,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
            MIN(l.l_shipdate) AS first_ship_date,
            MAX(l.l_receiptdate) AS last_receipt_date,
            AVG(l.l_quantity) AS avg_quantity,
            COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_suppkey) AS distinct_suppliers
        FROM orders o
        JOIN lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
        GROUP BY o.o_orderkey
    ) od
    WHERE od.total_revenue >= (
        SELECT AVG(sub.total_revenue)
        FROM (
            SELECT SUM(l2.l_extendedprice * (1 - l2.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
            FROM orders o2
            JOIN lineitem l2 ON l2.l_orderkey = o2.o_orderkey
            WHERE o2.o_orderstatus = 'O'
            GROUP BY o2.o_orderkey
        ) sub
    )
) q
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT AVG(qo.avg_quantity) AS avg_avg_quantity
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            od3.avg_quantity
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                o3.o_orderkey,
                SUM(l3.l_extendedprice * (1 - l3.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
                AVG(l3.l_quantity) AS avg_quantity
            FROM orders o3
            JOIN lineitem l3 ON l3.l_orderkey = o3.o_orderkey
            WHERE o3.o_orderstatus = 'O'
            GROUP BY o3.o_orderkey
        ) od3
        WHERE od3.total_revenue >= (
            SELECT AVG(sub2.total_revenue)
            FROM (
                SELECT SUM(l4.l_extendedprice * (1 - l4.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
                FROM orders o4
                JOIN lineitem l4 ON l4.l_orderkey = o4.o_orderkey
                WHERE o4.o_orderstatus = 'O'
                GROUP BY o4.o_orderkey
            ) sub2
        )
    ) qo
) avg_qo
WHERE rs.s_suppkey = (
    SELECT ps.ps_suppkey 
    FROM partsupp ps 
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM lineitem l 
        JOIN orders o ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey AND o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
        WHERE l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    ) 
    LIMIT 1
)
AND q.total_revenue IS NOT NULL
AND q.avg_quantity > avg_qo.avg_avg_quantity
ORDER BY rs.region_name, q.total_revenue DESC

sql1:
WITH ranked_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
),
supplier_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS unique_parts,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supplycost,
        MAX(CASE 
            WHEN s.s_acctbal IS NULL THEN 0 
            ELSE s.s_acctbal 
        END) AS max_acctbal
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey
),
country_performance AS (
    SELECT 
        n.n_name,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
        AVG(l.l_quantity) AS avg_quantity_per_order
    FROM 
        nation n
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN 
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    GROUP BY 
        n.n_name
)
SELECT 
    r.r_name,
    COALESCE(cp.total_sales, 0) AS total_sales,
    COALESCE(cp.order_count, 0) AS order_count,
    ss.unique_parts,
    ss.total_supplycost,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ro.o_orderkey) AS high_value_orders,
    MAX(ro.o_totalprice) AS highest_order_value
FROM 
    region r
LEFT JOIN 
    country_performance cp ON r.r_name = cp.n_name
LEFT JOIN 
    supplier_summary ss ON ss.unique_parts > 2
LEFT JOIN 
    ranked_orders ro ON ro.o_orderdate < CURRENT_DATE AND ro.o_orderstatus = 'O'
GROUP BY 
    r.r_name, ss.unique_parts, ss.total_supplycost
HAVING 
    total_sales > 10000 OR order_count > 5
ORDER BY 
    r.r_name, total_sales DESC, unique_parts ASC
sql2:
SELECT
    q.r_name,
    q.total_sales,
    q.order_count,
    q.unique_parts,
    q.total_supplycost,
    q.high_value_orders,
    q.highest_order_value
FROM (
    SELECT
        r.r_name,
        COALESCE(cp.total_sales, 0) AS total_sales,
        COALESCE(cp.order_count, 0) AS order_count,
        ss.unique_parts,
        ss.total_supplycost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ro.o_orderkey) AS high_value_orders,
        MAX(ro.o_totalprice) AS highest_order_value
    FROM
        region r
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            n.n_name,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
            COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
            AVG(l.l_quantity) AS avg_quantity_per_order
        FROM
            nation n
        JOIN supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
        JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
        JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        GROUP BY
            n.n_name
    ) cp ON r.r_name = cp.n_name
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            s.s_suppkey,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS unique_parts,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supplycost,
            MAX(COALESCE(s.s_acctbal, 0)) AS max_acctbal
        FROM
            supplier s
        JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY
            s.s_suppkey
    ) ss ON ss.unique_parts > 2
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_orderdate,
            o.o_totalprice,
            o.o_orderstatus,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
        FROM
            orders o
        WHERE
            o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
    ) ro ON ro.o_orderdate < CURRENT_DATE AND ro.o_orderstatus = 'O'
    GROUP BY
        r.r_name, ss.unique_parts, ss.total_supplycost
) q
WHERE
    q.total_sales > 10000 OR q.order_count > 5
ORDER BY
    q.r_name, q.total_sales DESC, q.unique_parts ASC

sql1:
WITH ranked_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_orderdate, 
        o.o_totalprice, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_custkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        orders o
    INNER JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    WHERE 
        c.c_acctbal IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
),
supply_analysis AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey, 
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_avail_qty,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_partkey
    HAVING 
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) < (SELECT AVG(ps_availqty) FROM partsupp)
),
part_supplier_info AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey, 
        p.p_name, 
        p.p_brand, 
        COALESCE(ps.total_avail_qty, 0) AS total_avail_qty,
        COALESCE(ps.total_supply_cost, 0) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        part p
    LEFT JOIN supply_analysis ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
),
customer_order_info AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey AND o.o_orderstatus <> 'F'
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey
    HAVING 
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 10000
)
SELECT 
    c.c_name,
    COALESCE(p.part_supplier_info, 'Unknown') AS supplier_details,
    (SELECT AVG(total_spent) FROM customer_order_info) AS avg_spent,
    CAST(prn AS VARCHAR) AS rank_order_info
FROM 
    customer_order_info coi
JOIN 
    customer c ON c.c_custkey = coi.c_custkey
LEFT JOIN 
    part_supplier_info p ON p.total_avail_qty = (SELECT MAX(total_avail_qty) FROM part_supplier_info)
CROSS JOIN 
    (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS prn FROM ranked_orders) rank_info
WHERE 
    c.c_acctbal IS NOT NULL
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM orders o 
        WHERE o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey 
          AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND CURRENT_DATE
    )
ORDER BY 
    c.c_name, c.c_custkey
sql2:
SELECT
    c.c_name,
    COALESCE(p.part_supplier_info, 'Unknown') AS supplier_details,
    (SELECT AVG(total_spent) FROM (
        SELECT
            c2.c_custkey,
            SUM(o2.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
            COUNT(o2.o_orderkey) AS order_count
        FROM customer c2
        LEFT JOIN orders o2 ON c2.c_custkey = o2.o_custkey AND o2.o_orderstatus <> 'F'
        GROUP BY c2.c_custkey
        HAVING SUM(o2.o_totalprice) > 10000
    ) coi_avg) AS avg_spent,
    CAST(rank_info.prn AS VARCHAR) AS rank_order_info
FROM
    (SELECT
         c_custkey, SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent, COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
     FROM customer c
     LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey AND o.o_orderstatus <> 'F'
     GROUP BY c_custkey
     HAVING SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 10000
    ) coi
JOIN customer c ON c.c_custkey = coi.c_custkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_brand,
        COALESCE(sa.total_avail_qty, 0) AS total_avail_qty,
        COALESCE(sa.total_supply_cost, 0) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM part p
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            ps.ps_partkey,
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_avail_qty,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
        FROM partsupp ps
        GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey
        HAVING SUM(ps.ps_availqty) < (SELECT AVG(ps_availqty) FROM partsupp)
    ) sa ON p.p_partkey = sa.ps_partkey
) p ON p.total_avail_qty = (
    SELECT MAX(psi2.total_avail_qty)
    FROM (
        SELECT COALESCE(sa2.total_avail_qty, 0) AS total_avail_qty
        FROM part p2
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT ps2.ps_partkey, SUM(ps2.ps_availqty) AS total_avail_qty
            FROM partsupp ps2
            GROUP BY ps2.ps_partkey
            HAVING SUM(ps2.ps_availqty) < (SELECT AVG(ps_availqty) FROM partsupp)
        ) sa2 ON p2.p_partkey = sa2.ps_partkey
    ) psi2
)
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS prn
    FROM orders o
    INNER JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    WHERE c.c_acctbal IS NOT NULL
      AND c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
) rank_info
WHERE
    c.c_acctbal IS NOT NULL
    AND c.c_custkey IN (
        SELECT o3.o_custkey
        FROM orders o3
        WHERE o3.o_orderdate BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND CURRENT_DATE
    )
ORDER BY
    c.c_name, c.c_custkey

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        o.o_totalprice,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(MONTH, -12, CURRENT_DATE)
), 
HighValueSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey
    HAVING 
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) < (SELECT AVG(ps_supplycost) FROM partsupp) 
), 
CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
)
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    COALESCE(ps.ps_availqty, 0) AS available_quantity,
    o.o_orderkey,
    CASE 
        WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN 'Finished'
        WHEN o.o_orderstatus IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
        ELSE 'Pending'
    END AS order_status,
    CASE 
        WHEN orders_in_last_year.total_orders > 0 THEN 'Regular' 
        ELSE 'Occasional' 
    END AS customer_type,
    s.s_suppkey,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(l.l_discount) OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_suppkey ORDER BY l.l_extendedprice) AS cumulative_discount
FROM 
    part p
LEFT JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedOrders o ON ps.ps_supplycost = o.o_orderkey
LEFT JOIN 
    HighValueSuppliers s ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
LEFT JOIN 
    CustomerOrders orders_in_last_year ON orders_in_last_year.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    (p.p_size BETWEEN 10 AND 30 OR p.p_retailprice > 50) 
    AND (s.s_name LIKE '%Corp%' OR s.s_name IS NULL)
ORDER BY 
    p.p_name, o.o_orderkey DESC

SELECT
