sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_partkey ORDER BY ps.ps_supplycost ASC) AS supplier_rank,
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_retailprice,
        CASE 
            WHEN s.s_acctbal IS NULL THEN 0 
            ELSE s.s_acctbal 
        END as adjusted_acctbal
    FROM 
        supplier s 
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
), 
OrderSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_orders,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM 
        customer c 
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey
)
SELECT 
    ns.n_name,
    p.p_name,
    COALESCE(SUM(ls.l_extendedprice * (1 - ls.l_discount)), 0) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT os.c_custkey) AS customer_count, 
    AVG(rs.adjusted_acctbal) AS avg_supplier_balance
FROM 
    lineitem ls
LEFT JOIN 
    orders o ON ls.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
LEFT JOIN 
    customer os ON o.o_custkey = os.c_custkey
LEFT JOIN 
    part p ON ls.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    supplier rs ON ps.ps_suppkey = rs.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN 
    nation ns ON rs.s_nationkey = ns.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    rs.supp_rank = 1 AND 
    (ls.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' OR ls.l_returnflag = 'R')
GROUP BY 
    ns.n_name, p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT
    ns.n_name,
    p.p_name,
    COALESCE(SUM(ls.l_extendedprice * (1 - ls.l_discount)), 0) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT os.c_custkey) AS customer_count,
    AVG(rs.adjusted_acctbal) AS avg_supplier_balance
FROM
    lineitem ls
LEFT JOIN
    orders o ON ls.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
LEFT JOIN
    customer os ON o.o_custkey = os.c_custkey
LEFT JOIN
    part p ON ls.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        ps_inner.ps_partkey,
        ps_inner.ps_suppkey,
        s_inner.s_nationkey,
        COALESCE(s_inner.s_acctbal, 0) AS adjusted_acctbal,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY ps_inner.ps_partkey ORDER BY ps_inner.ps_supplycost ASC) AS supplier_rank
    FROM
        partsupp ps_inner
    JOIN
        supplier s_inner ON ps_inner.ps_suppkey = s_inner.s_suppkey
) rs ON p.p_partkey = rs.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN
    nation ns ON rs.s_nationkey = ns.n_nationkey
WHERE
    rs.supplier_rank = 1
    AND (ls.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' OR ls.l_returnflag = 'R')
GROUP BY
    ns.n_name, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
SELECT 
    SUBSTRING(p.p_name, 1, 10) AS short_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    CONCAT('Total price: $', FORMAT(SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)), 2)) AS total_price,
    MAX(l.l_shipdate) AS last_ship_date
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    p.p_type LIKE '%brass%'
    AND l.l_shipmode IN ('AIR', 'SHIP')
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
GROUP BY 
    short_name, region_name
HAVING 
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) > 100
ORDER BY 
    total_price DESC, short_name ASC
sql2:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        SUBSTRING(p.p_name, 1, 10) AS short_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost,
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS raw_total,
        MAX(l.l_shipdate) AS last_ship_date
    FROM 
        lineitem l
    JOIN 
        part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    JOIN 
        region r ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    WHERE 
        p.p_type LIKE '%brass%'
        AND l.l_shipmode IN ('AIR', 'SHIP')
        AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
    GROUP BY 
        SUBSTRING(p.p_name, 1, 10), r.r_name
)
SELECT 
    short_name,
    supplier_count,
    avg_supply_cost,
    region_name,
    CONCAT('Total price: $', FORMAT(raw_total, 2)) AS total_price,
    last_ship_date
FROM 
    base
WHERE 
    avg_supply_cost > 100
ORDER BY 
    total_price DESC, short_name ASC

sql1:
WITH supplier_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS part_count
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
region_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        n.n_regionkey,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS region_total
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    GROUP BY 
        n.n_regionkey
),
ranked_suppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.*, 
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_cost DESC) AS cost_rank
    FROM 
        supplier_summary s
),
lineitem_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey,
        COUNT(*) AS item_count,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM 
        lineitem l
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY 
        l.l_orderkey
)

SELECT 
    r.r_name,
    rs.s_name,
    rs.total_cost,
    rs.part_count,
    lo.item_count,
    lo.total_revenue
FROM 
    region r
LEFT JOIN 
    nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
LEFT JOIN 
    ranked_suppliers rs ON n.n_nationkey = (SELECT s_nationkey 
                                              FROM supplier 
                                              WHERE s_suppkey = rs.s_suppkey 
                                              LIMIT 1)
LEFT JOIN 
    lineitem_summary lo ON lo.l_orderkey = (SELECT o_orderkey 
                                             FROM orders 
                                             WHERE o_orderdate = (SELECT MAX(o_orderdate) 
                                                                  FROM orders 
                                                                  WHERE o_custkey = c.c_custkey)
                                             LIMIT 1)
WHERE 
    r.r_name IS NOT NULL AND 
    rs.cost_rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    r.r_name, rs.total_cost DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    r.r_name,
    rs.s_name,
    rs.total_cost,
    rs.part_count,
    lo.item_count,
    lo.total_revenue
FROM 
    region r
LEFT JOIN 
    nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
LEFT JOIN 
    supplier s2 ON n.n_nationkey = s2.s_nationkey
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            ss.s_suppkey,
            ss.s_name,
            ss.total_cost,
            ss.part_count,
            RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ss.total_cost DESC) AS cost_rank
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                s.s_suppkey,
                s.s_name,
                SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost,
                COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS part_count
            FROM 
                supplier s
            JOIN 
                partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
            GROUP BY 
                s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
        ) ss
    ) rs ON s2.s_suppkey = rs.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            l.l_orderkey,
            COUNT(*) AS item_count,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
        FROM 
            lineitem l
        WHERE 
            l.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
        GROUP BY 
            l.l_orderkey
    ) lo ON lo.l_orderkey = (SELECT o_orderkey 
                             FROM orders 
                             WHERE o_orderdate = (SELECT MAX(o_orderdate) 
                                                  FROM orders 
                                                  WHERE o_custkey = c.c_custkey)
                             LIMIT 1)
WHERE 
    r.r_name IS NOT NULL AND 
    rs.cost_rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    r.r_name, rs.total_cost DESC

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    c.c_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
    MAX(l.l_discount) AS max_discount,
    LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(p.p_name, ' ', 1)) AS first_word,
    CONCAT(UPPER(SUBSTRING(s.s_name, 1, 1)), LOWER(SUBSTRING(s.s_name, 2))) AS formatted_supplier_name
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE 
    l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND CURRENT_DATE
    AND c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, s.s_name, c.c_name
HAVING 
    total_orders > 5
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC, avg_price ASC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
WITH filtered_lines AS (
    SELECT l.l_orderkey, l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey, l.l_quantity, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND CURRENT_DATE
),
building_customers AS (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    FROM customer c
    WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        p.p_name,
        s.s_name,
        bc.c_name,
        o.o_orderkey,
        fl.l_quantity,
        fl.l_extendedprice,
        fl.l_discount
    FROM part p
    JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN filtered_lines fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
    JOIN orders o ON fl.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    JOIN building_customers bc ON o.o_custkey = bc.c_custkey
),
aggregated AS (
    SELECT
        p_name,
        s_name,
        c_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        SUM(l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
        MAX(l_discount) AS max_discount,
        LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(p_name, ' ', 1)) AS first_word,
        CONCAT(UPPER(SUBSTRING(s_name, 1, 1)), LOWER(SUBSTRING(s_name, 2))) AS formatted_supplier_name
    FROM base
    GROUP BY p_name, s_name, c_name
)
SELECT *
FROM aggregated
WHERE total_orders > 5
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC, avg_price ASC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH SupplierSales AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.acctbal,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM 
        SupplierSales s
    WHERE 
        s.total_sales > 1000000
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS order_total
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
)
SELECT 
    r.r_name,
    COALESCE(s.s_name, 'Unknown Supplier') AS supplier_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ro.o_orderkey) AS recent_order_count,
    SUM(ro.order_total) AS total_recent_sales,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(ro.order_total) IS NULL THEN 'No Sales'
        ELSE 'Sales Exist'
    END AS sale_status
FROM 
    region r
LEFT JOIN 
    nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
LEFT JOIN 
    supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSuppliers rs ON s.s_suppkey = rs.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN 
    RecentOrders ro ON rs.s_suppkey = ro.o_custkey
GROUP BY 
    r.r_name, s.s_name
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT ro.o_orderkey) > 0 OR rs.s_suppkey IS NULL
ORDER BY 
    r.r_name, recent_order_count DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    base.r_name,
    base.supplier_name,
    base.recent_order_count,
    base.total_recent_sales,
    base.sale_status
FROM (
    SELECT
        r.r_name,
        COALESCE(s.s_name, 'Unknown Supplier') AS supplier_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ro.o_orderkey) AS recent_order_count,
        SUM(ro.order_total) AS total_recent_sales,
        CASE
            WHEN SUM(ro.order_total) IS NULL THEN 'No Sales'
            ELSE 'Sales Exist'
        END AS sale_status,
        MAX(rs.s_suppkey) AS rs_suppkey
    FROM
        region r
    LEFT JOIN nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    LEFT JOIN supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            ss.s_suppkey,
            ss.s_name,
            ss.acctbal,
            RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ss.total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank
        FROM (
            SELECT
                s2.s_suppkey,
                s2.s_name,
                SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
            FROM
                supplier s2
            JOIN partsupp ps ON s2.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
            JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
            JOIN lineitem l ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
            GROUP BY s2.s_suppkey, s2.s_name
        ) ss
        WHERE ss.total_sales > 1000000
    ) rs ON s.s_suppkey = rs.s_suppkey
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_custkey,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS order_total
        FROM
            orders o
        JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
        GROUP BY o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    ) ro ON rs.s_suppkey = ro.o_custkey
    GROUP BY r.r_name, s.s_name
) base
WHERE base.recent_order_count > 0 OR base.rs_suppkey IS NULL
ORDER BY base.r_name, base.recent_order_count DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_type ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS SupplierRank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    WHERE 
        p.p_name LIKE '%' || 'steel' || '%'
),
ActiveOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS TotalPrice,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS ItemCount
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'O' 
        AND l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 day'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
)
SELECT 
    r.s_name AS SupplierName,
    r.s_acctbal AS AccountBalance,
    a.o_orderkey AS OrderKey,
    a.ItemCount AS NumberOfItems,
    CAST(a.TotalPrice AS DECIMAL(12, 2)) AS TotalOrderPrice
FROM 
    RankedSuppliers r
JOIN 
    ActiveOrders a ON r.SupplierRank = 1
ORDER BY 
    r.AccountBalance DESC, a.TotalOrderPrice DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT
    r.s_name AS SupplierName,
    r.s_acctbal AS AccountBalance,
    a.o_orderkey AS OrderKey,
    a.ItemCount AS NumberOfItems,
    CAST(a.TotalPrice AS DECIMAL(12, 2)) AS TotalOrderPrice
FROM
    (
        SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal
        FROM supplier s
        JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        WHERE p.p_name LIKE '%' || 'steel' || '%'
          AND NOT EXISTS (
              SELECT 1
              FROM supplier s2
              JOIN partsupp ps2 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
              JOIN part p2 ON ps2.ps_partkey = p2.p_partkey
              WHERE p2.p_name LIKE '%' || 'steel' || '%'
                AND p2.p_type = p.p_type
                AND s2.s_acctbal > s.s_acctbal
          )
    ) r
CROSS JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_custkey,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS TotalPrice,
            COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS ItemCount
        FROM
            orders o
        JOIN
            lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE
            o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
            AND l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 day'
        GROUP BY
            o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    ) a
ORDER BY
    r.s_acctbal DESC, CAST(a.TotalPrice AS DECIMAL(12, 2)) DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH CustomerDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        c.c_address,
        c.c_phone,
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        n.n_name AS nation_name,
        LEFT(c.c_comment, 40) AS short_comment
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN 
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    ORDER BY 
        total_supply_cost DESC
    LIMIT 10
),
OrderSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_price,
        COUNT(l.l_orderkey) AS line_item_count
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderstatus
),
FinalReport AS (
    SELECT 
        cd.c_name,
        cd.region_name,
        os.o_orderkey,
        os.total_price,
        ts.s_name AS top_supplier_name,
        os.line_item_count
    FROM 
        CustomerDetails cd
    JOIN 
        OrderSummary os ON cd.c_custkey IN (
            SELECT o.o_custkey 
            FROM orders o 
            WHERE o.o_orderkey = os.o_orderkey
        )
    JOIN 
        TopSuppliers ts ON ts.total_supply_cost = (
            SELECT MAX(total_supply_cost) 
            FROM TopSuppliers
        )
)
SELECT 
    *
FROM 
    FinalReport
ORDER BY 
    total_price DESC, line_item_count DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    c.c_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    os.o_orderkey,
    os.total_price,
    ts.s_name AS top_supplier_name,
    os.line_item_count
FROM
    customer c
    JOIN nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    JOIN orders o2 ON c.c_custkey = o2.o_custkey
    JOIN (
        SELECT
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_orderstatus,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_price,
            COUNT(l.l_orderkey) AS line_item_count
        FROM
            orders o
            JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE
            o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
        GROUP BY
            o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderstatus
    ) os ON o2.o_orderkey = os.o_orderkey
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT
            s.s_name
        FROM
            supplier s
            JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY
            s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
        ORDER BY
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC
        LIMIT 1
    ) ts
ORDER BY
    os.total_price DESC, os.line_item_count DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY ps.ps_partkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rank,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_brand,
        p.p_retailprice
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
), CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(o.o_totalprice) DESC) AS customer_rank
    FROM
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
), SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT
        rs.s_name,
        rs.p_name,
        CASE 
            WHEN rs.rank = 1 THEN 'Top Supplier'
            WHEN rs.rank IS NULL THEN 'No Supplier'
            ELSE 'Other Supplier'
        END AS supplier_status,
        cd.total_spent
    FROM
        RankedSuppliers rs
    LEFT JOIN
        CustomerOrders cd ON rs.s_suppkey = cd.c_custkey
)
SELECT 
    sd.s_name,
    sd.p_name,
    sd.supplier_status,
    COALESCE(sd.total_spent, 0) AS total_spent,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lineitem l WHERE l.l_suppkey = rs.s_suppkey AND l.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year') AS recent_shipments,
    (CASE 
         WHEN sd.total_spent IS NULL THEN 'No Orders'
         WHEN sd.total_spent > 10000 THEN 'High Value Customer'
         ELSE 'Standard Customer'
     END) AS customer_value
FROM 
    SupplierDetails sd
WHERE 
    sd.supplier_status <> 'No Supplier'
ORDER BY 
    sd.total_spent DESC, sd.supplier_status
sql2:
SELECT
    sd.s_name,
    sd.p_name,
    sd.supplier_status,
    COALESCE(sd.total_spent, 0) AS total_spent,
    COALESCE(rs_ship.recent_shipments, 0) AS recent_shipments,
    CASE
        WHEN sd.total_spent IS NULL THEN 'No Orders'
        WHEN sd.total_spent > 10000 THEN 'High Value Customer'
        ELSE 'Standard Customer'
    END AS customer_value
FROM (
    SELECT
        rs.s_suppkey,
        rs.s_name,
        rs.p_name,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.rnk = 1 THEN 'Top Supplier'
            WHEN rs.rnk IS NULL THEN 'No Supplier'
            ELSE 'Other Supplier'
        END AS supplier_status,
        cd.total_spent
    FROM (
        SELECT
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            s.s_acctbal,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY ps.ps_partkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rnk,
            p.p_name,
            p.p_brand,
            p.p_retailprice
        FROM supplier s
        JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    ) rs
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
            COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(o.o_totalprice) DESC) AS customer_rank
        FROM customer c
        LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
        GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    ) cd ON rs.s_suppkey = cd.c_custkey
) sd
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        l.l_suppkey,
        COUNT(*) AS recent_shipments
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY l.l_suppkey
) rs_ship ON sd.s_suppkey = rs_ship.l_suppkey
WHERE
    sd.supplier_status <> 'No Supplier'
ORDER BY
    sd.total_spent DESC, sd.supplier_status

sql1:
WITH SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) AS part_count
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal > 1000
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
), 
CustomerOrderStats AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    WHERE 
        c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
), 
QualifiedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        ss.s_suppkey,
        ss.s_name,
        ss.total_available,
        ss.avg_supply_cost,
        ss.part_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ss.part_count ORDER BY ss.avg_supply_cost DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        SupplierStats ss
    WHERE 
        ss.total_available > 500
)

SELECT 
    cs.c_name AS customer_name,
    cs.order_count,
    cs.total_spent,
    qs.s_name AS supplier_name,
    qs.avg_supply_cost,
    qs.total_available
FROM 
    CustomerOrderStats cs
LEFT JOIN 
    QualifiedSuppliers qs ON cs.order_count > 5
WHERE 
    qs.rn = 1
ORDER BY 
    cs.total_spent DESC, 
    qs.avg_supply_cost ASC
sql2:
SELECT 
    cs.c_name AS customer_name,
    cs.order_count,
    cs.total_spent,
    qs.s_name AS supplier_name,
    qs.avg_supply_cost,
    qs.total_available
FROM 
    (SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    WHERE 
        c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name) cs
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        ss.s_suppkey,
        ss.s_name,
        ss.total_available,
        ss.avg_supply_cost,
        ss.part_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ss.part_count ORDER BY ss.avg_supply_cost DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        (SELECT 
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available,
            AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost,
            COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) AS part_count
        FROM 
            supplier s
        JOIN 
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        JOIN 
            part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        WHERE 
            s.s_acctbal > 1000
        GROUP BY 
            s.s_suppkey, s.s_name) ss
    WHERE 
        ss.total_available > 500) qs ON cs.order_count > 5
WHERE 
    qs.rn = 1
ORDER BY 
    cs.total_spent DESC, 
    qs.avg_supply_cost ASC

sql1:
WITH PartSupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        s.s_name AS supplier_name,
        ps.ps_availqty,
        ps.ps_supplycost,
        CONCAT(p.p_name, ' (', s.s_name, ')') AS combined_name
    FROM 
        part p
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
),
CustomerOrderDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderdate,
        CONCAT(c.c_name, ' - Order #', o.o_orderkey) AS order_info
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
)
SELECT 
    psd.p_partkey,
    psd.p_name,
    psd.supplier_name,
    psd.ps_availqty,
    psd.ps_supplycost,
    psd.combined_name,
    cod.c_custkey,
    cod.c_name,
    cod.o_orderkey,
    cod.o_totalprice,
    cod.o_orderdate,
    cod.order_info
FROM 
    PartSupplierDetails psd
JOIN 
    CustomerOrderDetails cod ON psd.ps_supplycost < cod.o_totalprice
WHERE 
    TRIM(psd.combined_name) LIKE '%chain%' 
    AND YEAR(cod.o_orderdate) = 2023
ORDER BY 
    psd.ps_supplycost DESC, cod.o_totalprice ASC
sql2:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    ps.ps_availqty,
    ps.ps_supplycost,
    CONCAT(p.p_name, ' (', s.s_name, ')') AS combined_name,
    c.c_custkey,
    c.c_name,
    o.o_orderkey,
    o.o_totalprice,
    o.o_orderdate,
    CONCAT(c.c_name, ' - Order #', o.o_orderkey) AS order_info
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON ps.ps_supplycost < o.o_totalprice
JOIN 
    customer c ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
WHERE 
    TRIM(CONCAT(p.p_name, ' (', s.s_name, ')')) LIKE '%chain%'
    AND YEAR(o.o_orderdate) = 2023
ORDER BY 
    ps.ps_supplycost DESC, o.o_totalprice ASC

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        s.s_nationkey,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        supplier s
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal > (
            SELECT AVG(s2.s_acctbal) 
            FROM supplier s2
            WHERE s2.s_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
        )
),
OrderSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_partkey) AS part_count,
        o.o_orderdate
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipdate <= '2023-10-31'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate
),
SupplierPartCost AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_partkey
),
TopRegions AS (
    SELECT 
        r.r_regionkey,
        r.r_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS customer_count
    FROM 
        region r
    JOIN 
        nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    JOIN 
        customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
    GROUP BY 
        r.r_regionkey, r.r_name
    HAVING 
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) > 100
)
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    rs.s_name,
    os.total_revenue,
    spc.total_cost,
    tr.r_name,
    tr.customer_count
FROM 
    part p
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSuppliers rs ON p.p_partkey = rs.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    OrderSummary os ON os.o_orderkey IN (
        SELECT o.o_orderkey 
        FROM orders o 
        WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'O' AND o.o_orderdate > current_date - interval '30 days'
    )
JOIN 
    SupplierPartCost spc ON spc.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    TopRegions tr ON rs.s_nationkey = tr.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    p.p_retailprice > (
        SELECT AVG(p2.p_retailprice) 
        FROM part p2
        WHERE p2.p_size = p.p_size
    )
AND 
    rs.rn <= 3 
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC, customer_count ASC
sql2:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    rs.s_name,
    os.total_revenue,
    spc.total_cost,
    tr.r_name,
    tr.customer_count
FROM 
    part p
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT p2.p_size, AVG(p2.p_retailprice) AS avg_price
    FROM part p2
    GROUP BY p2.p_size
) pavg ON p.p_size = pavg.p_size AND p.p_retailprice > pavg.avg_price
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        s.s_nationkey,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        supplier s
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT s2.s_nationkey, AVG(s2.s_acctbal) AS avg_bal
        FROM supplier s2
        GROUP BY s2.s_nationkey
    ) sa ON s.s_nationkey = sa.s_nationkey AND s.s_acctbal > sa.avg_bal
) rs ON p.p_partkey = rs.s_suppkey AND rs.rn <= 3
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_partkey
) spc ON spc.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT 
        r.r_regionkey,
        r.r_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS customer_count
    FROM 
        region r
    INNER JOIN nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    INNER JOIN customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
    GROUP BY 
        r.r_regionkey, r.r_name
    HAVING 
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) > 100
) tr ON rs.s_nationkey = tr.r_regionkey
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_partkey) AS part_count,
        o.o_orderdate
    FROM 
        orders o
    INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipdate <= '2023-10-31'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate
) os ON EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM orders o 
    WHERE o.o_orderkey = os.o_orderkey 
      AND o.o_orderstatus = 'O' 
      AND o.o_orderdate > current_date - interval '30 days'
)
ORDER BY 
    os.total_revenue DESC, tr.customer_count ASC

sql1:
WITH CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
),
TopCustomers AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        co.order_count,
        co.total_spent,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY co.total_spent DESC) AS rank
    FROM
        CustomerOrders co
    JOIN
        customer c ON co.c_custkey = c.c_custkey
    WHERE
        co.total_spent > 1000
),
SupplierParts AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
)
SELECT
    tc.c_name,
    tc.order_count,
    tc.total_spent,
    sp.s_name,
    sp.total_supply_cost,
    CASE WHEN tc.order_count > 5 THEN 'Frequent Buyer' ELSE 'Occasional Buyer' END AS buyer_type,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT n.n_nationkey)
     FROM nation n
     WHERE n.n_nationkey = (SELECT c.c_nationkey FROM customer c WHERE c.c_custkey = tc.c_custkey)) AS nation_count
FROM
    TopCustomers tc
LEFT JOIN
    lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey IN (SELECT o.o_orderkey FROM orders o WHERE o.o_custkey = tc.c_custkey)
LEFT JOIN
    SupplierParts sp ON sp.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
WHERE
    l.l_returnflag = 'N' AND
    l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
ORDER BY
    tc.total_spent DESC,
    sp.total_supply_cost ASC
sql2:
SELECT
    tc.c_name,
    tc.order_count,
    tc.total_spent,
    sp.s_name,
    sp.total_supply_cost,
    CASE WHEN tc.order_count > 5 THEN 'Frequent Buyer' ELSE 'Occasional Buyer' END AS buyer_type,
    nc.nation_count
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
            SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
            RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(o.o_totalprice) DESC) AS rank
        FROM
            customer c
        LEFT JOIN
            orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
        GROUP BY
            c.c_custkey, c.c_name
        HAVING
            SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 1000
    ) tc
    INNER JOIN orders o2 ON o2.o_custkey = tc.c_custkey
    INNER JOIN lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey = o2.o_orderkey
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
        FROM
            supplier s
        INNER JOIN
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY
            s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    ) sp ON sp.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            c.c_custkey,
            COUNT(DISTINCT n.n_nationkey) AS nation_count
        FROM
            customer c
        INNER JOIN
            nation n ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
        GROUP BY
            c.c_custkey
    ) nc ON nc.c_custkey = tc.c_custkey
WHERE
    l.l_returnflag = 'N' AND
    l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
ORDER BY
    tc.total_spent DESC,
    sp.total_supply_cost ASC

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    CONCAT('Manufacturer: ', p.p_mfgr, ' - Brand: ', p.p_brand, ' - Type: ', p.p_type) AS description,
    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' THEN l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) 
        ELSE 0 
    END) AS recent_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS unique_customers
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE 
    p.p_comment LIKE '%brass%'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_mfgr, p.p_brand, p.p_type
ORDER BY 
    recent_sales DESC, unique_customers DESC
LIMIT 100
sql2:
WITH eligible_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name, p_mfgr, p_brand, p_type
    FROM part
    WHERE p_comment LIKE '%brass%'
),
detail AS (
    SELECT
        ep.p_partkey,
        ep.p_name,
        ep.p_mfgr,
        ep.p_brand,
        ep.p_type,
        l.l_extendedprice,
        l.l_discount,
        l.l_shipdate,
        c.c_custkey
    FROM eligible_parts ep
    JOIN partsupp ps ON ep.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN lineitem l ON ep.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
)
SELECT
    p_partkey,
    p_name,
    CONCAT('Manufacturer: ', p_mfgr, ' - Brand: ', p_brand, ' - Type: ', p_type) AS description,
    COALESCE(SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) FILTER (WHERE l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'), 0) AS recent_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c_custkey) AS unique_customers
FROM detail
GROUP BY p_partkey, p_name, p_mfgr, p_brand, p_type
ORDER BY recent_sales DESC, unique_customers DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH SupplierAggregate AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_name,
        sa.total_supply_cost,
        sa.total_orders,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY sa.total_supply_cost DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        SupplierAggregate sa
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON sa.s_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
)
SELECT 
    ts.s_name,
    ts.total_supply_cost,
    ts.total_orders,
    CASE 
        WHEN ts.total_orders > 100 THEN 'High volume'
        WHEN ts.total_orders BETWEEN 50 AND 100 THEN 'Medium volume'
        ELSE 'Low volume'
    END AS order_volume_category
FROM 
    TopSuppliers ts
WHERE 
    ts.rank <= 10 OR ts.total_supply_cost > 10000
ORDER BY 
    ts.total_supply_cost DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    s.s_name,
    sa.total_supply_cost,
    sa.total_orders,
    CASE
        WHEN sa.total_orders > 100 THEN 'High volume'
        WHEN sa.total_orders BETWEEN 50 AND 100 THEN 'Medium volume'
        ELSE 'Low volume'
    END AS order_volume_category
FROM
    supplier s
JOIN (
    SELECT
        s2.s_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders
    FROM
        supplier s2
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s2.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    LEFT JOIN
        lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    LEFT JOIN
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    GROUP BY
        s2.s_suppkey
) sa ON s.s_suppkey = sa.s_suppkey
WHERE
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY sa.total_supply_cost DESC) <= 10
    OR sa.total_supply_cost > 10000
ORDER BY
    sa.total_supply_cost DESC

sql1:
SELECT 
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', s_name, ', Nation: ', n_name, 
           ', Item: ', p_name, ', Quantity Available: ', ps_availqty, 
           ', Average Price: ', AVG(ps_supplycost) OVER(PARTITION BY ps_partkey)) AS supplier_info,
    TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(p_comment, 'sensitive|confidential', '***', 'i')) AS sanitized_comment
FROM
    supplier s
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE
    LENGTH(s_name) > 10
    AND DATE_PART('year', CURRENT_DATE) - DATE_PART('year', MAX(o_orderdate) OVER(PARTITION BY s.s_suppkey)) < 2
ORDER BY
    s_name, n_name DESC
sql2:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_name,
        n.n_name,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_comment,
        ps.ps_availqty,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) OVER (PARTITION BY ps.ps_partkey) AS avg_supplycost,
        MAX(o_orderdate) OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_suppkey) AS max_orderdate
    FROM
        supplier s,
        partsupp ps,
        part p,
        nation n
    WHERE
        s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        AND ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        AND s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        AND LENGTH(s.s_name) > 10
)
SELECT
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', s_name, ', Nation: ', n_name,
           ', Item: ', p_name, ', Quantity Available: ', ps_availqty,
           ', Average Price: ', avg_supplycost) AS supplier_info,
    TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(p_comment, 'sensitive|confidential', '***', 'i')) AS sanitized_comment
FROM
    base
WHERE
    DATE_PART('year', CURRENT_DATE) - DATE_PART('year', max_orderdate) < 2
ORDER BY
    s_name, n_name DESC

sql1:
SELECT 
    CONCAT(s.s_name, ' (', p.p_name, ')') AS supplier_part,
    SUM(lp.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(lp.l_discount) AS average_discount,
    MAX(lp.l_extendedprice) AS max_extended_price,
    MIN(lp.l_tax) AS min_tax,
    SUBSTRING_INDEX(p.p_comment, ' ', 3) AS part_comment_excerpt,
    r.r_name AS region_name
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem lp ON p.p_partkey = lp.l_partkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON lp.l_orderkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    lp.l_returnflag = 'N' AND 
    YEAR(lp.l_shipdate) = 2023
GROUP BY 
    supplier_part, region_name
HAVING 
    total_quantity > 100
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC, average_discount ASC
sql2:
WITH filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, l_orderkey, l_quantity, l_discount, l_extendedprice, l_tax
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_returnflag = 'N' AND YEAR(l_shipdate) = 2023
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        CONCAT(s.s_name, ' (', p.p_name, ')') AS supplier_part,
        SUM(fl.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        AVG(fl.l_discount) AS average_discount,
        MAX(fl.l_extendedprice) AS max_extended_price,
        MIN(fl.l_tax) AS min_tax,
        SUBSTRING_INDEX(p.p_comment, ' ', 3) AS part_comment_excerpt,
        r.r_name AS region_name
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN filtered_lineitem fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
    JOIN customer c ON fl.l_orderkey = c.c_custkey
    GROUP BY
        supplier_part, region_name
)
SELECT supplier_part, total_quantity, average_discount, max_extended_price,
       min_tax, part_comment_excerpt, region_name
FROM base
WHERE total_quantity > 100
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC, average_discount ASC

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_partkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate
),
CustomerSpending AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COALESCE(SUM(ro.total_revenue), 0) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        RecentOrders ro ON c.c_custkey = ro.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
)
SELECT 
    cs.c_name,
    cs.total_spent,
    rs.s_name AS top_supplier,
    rs.s_acctbal AS top_supplier_balance
FROM 
    CustomerSpending cs
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSuppliers rs ON cs.total_spent = (
        SELECT MAX(total_spent) 
        FROM CustomerSpending
    )
WHERE 
    cs.total_spent > (
        SELECT AVG(total_spent) 
        FROM CustomerSpending
    )
ORDER BY 
    cs.total_spent DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT 
    cs.c_name,
    cs.total_spent,
    rs.s_name AS top_supplier,
    rs.s_acctbal AS top_supplier_balance
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            COALESCE(SUM(ro.total_revenue), 0) AS total_spent
        FROM 
            customer c
        LEFT JOIN 
            (
                SELECT 
                    o.o_orderkey,
                    o.o_custkey,
                    o.o_orderdate,
                    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
                FROM 
                    orders o
                JOIN 
                    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
                WHERE 
                    l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
                GROUP BY 
                    o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate
            ) ro ON c.c_custkey = ro.o_custkey
        GROUP BY 
            c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    ) cs
CROSS JOIN 
    (
        SELECT AVG(t.total_spent) AS avg_spent, MAX(t.total_spent) AS max_spent
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                c.c_custkey,
                COALESCE(SUM(
                    sub.total_revenue
                ), 0) AS total_spent
            FROM 
                customer c
            LEFT JOIN 
                (
                    SELECT 
                        o.o_custkey,
                        o.o_orderkey,
                        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
                    FROM 
                        orders o
                    JOIN 
                        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
                    WHERE 
                        l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
                    GROUP BY 
                        o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
                ) sub ON c.c_custkey = sub.o_custkey
            GROUP BY 
                c.c_custkey
        ) t
    ) agg
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            s.s_acctbal,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_partkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rank
        FROM 
            supplier s
        JOIN 
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        JOIN 
            part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    ) rs ON cs.total_spent = agg.max_spent
WHERE 
    cs.total_spent > agg.avg_spent
ORDER BY 
    cs.total_spent DESC
LIMIT 10

WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey
    FROM part
    WHERE p_name LIKE '%wheel%'
),
building_customers AS (
    SELECT c_custkey, c_nationkey
    FROM customer
    WHERE c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
),
supplier_nation AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, n.n_name AS nation, r.r_name AS region
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
)
SELECT
    sn.nation,
    sn.region,
    SUM(CASE
        WHEN l.l_returnflag = 'R' THEN l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)
        ELSE 0
    END) AS revenue_returned,
    COUNT(DISTINCT bc.c_custkey) AS unique_customers
FROM
    lineitem l
JOIN
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN
    building_customers bc ON o.o_custkey = bc.c_custkey
JOIN
    supplier_nation sn ON l.l_suppkey = sn.s_suppkey
WHERE
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM filtered_parts fp
        JOIN partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
        WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
          AND ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    )
GROUP BY
    sn.nation, sn.region
ORDER BY
    revenue_returned DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM
        orders o
),
SupplierCosts AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_nationkey) AS unique_suppliers
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_partkey
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        r.r_name,
        p.p_name,
        sc.total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        region r
    JOIN 
        nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN 
        SupplierCosts sc ON p.p_partkey = sc.ps_partkey
    WHERE 
        sc.total_supply_cost > (SELECT AVG(total_supply_cost) FROM SupplierCosts)
)
SELECT 
    o.o_orderkey,
    o.o_orderdate,
    o.o_totalprice,
    ts.r_name,
    ts.p_name,
    ts.total_supply_cost,
    COALESCE(l.l_discount, 0) AS applied_discount,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) OVER (PARTITION BY ts.r_name) AS customer_count,
    CASE
        WHEN o.o_totalprice > 1000 THEN 'Large Order'
        ELSE 'Standard Order'
    END AS order_type
FROM 
    RankedOrders o
LEFT JOIN 
    lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    TopSuppliers ts ON l.l_partkey = ts.p_partkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 YEAR'
ORDER BY 
    ts.total_supply_cost DESC, 
    o.o_orderdate ASC

        WHEN o.o_totalprice > 1000 THEN 'Large Order'
        ELSE 'Standard Order'

    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN
