sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(p.p_retailprice) AS avg_retail_price,
    MAX(CASE WHEN l.l_returnflag = 'R' THEN l.l_extendedprice ELSE 0 END) AS max_return_price,
    MIN(CASE WHEN s.s_acctbal < 1000 THEN s.s_acctbal ELSE NULL END) AS min_account_balance
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    p.p_name LIKE '%widget%'
    AND s.s_comment NOT LIKE '%bad supplier%'
    AND l.l_shipdate >= '2023-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate <= CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) > 5
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC, avg_retail_price ASC
sql2:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_retailprice
    FROM part p
    WHERE p.p_name LIKE '%widget%'
),
filtered_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_acctbal
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE s.s_comment NOT LIKE '%bad supplier%'
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        fp.p_name,
        fs.s_suppkey,
        l.l_quantity,
        fp.p_retailprice,
        CASE WHEN l.l_returnflag = 'R' THEN l.l_extendedprice ELSE 0 END AS return_price,
        CASE WHEN fs.s_acctbal < 1000 THEN fs.s_acctbal ELSE NULL END AS low_acctbal
    FROM filtered_parts fp
    JOIN partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN filtered_suppliers fs ON ps.ps_suppkey = fs.s_suppkey
    JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
        AND l.l_shipdate >= '2023-01-01'
        AND l.l_shipdate <= CURRENT_DATE
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    )
),
aggregated AS (
    SELECT
        p_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT s_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
        SUM(l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        AVG(p_retailprice) AS avg_retail_price,
        MAX(return_price) AS max_return_price,
        MIN(low_acctbal) AS min_account_balance
    FROM base
    GROUP BY p_name
)
SELECT
    p_name,
    supplier_count,
    total_quantity,
    avg_retail_price,
    max_return_price,
    min_account_balance
FROM aggregated
WHERE supplier_count > 5
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC, avg_retail_price ASC

sql1:
WITH SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey, s.s_acctbal, n.n_name AS nation_name, 
           CASE 
               WHEN s.s_acctbal < 1000 THEN 'Low'
               WHEN s.s_acctbal BETWEEN 1000 AND 10000 THEN 'Medium'
               ELSE 'High'
           END AS acctbal_category
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
),
PartDetails AS (
    SELECT p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_brand, p.p_size, p.p_retailprice,
           LEFT(p.p_comment, 10) AS short_comment
    FROM part p
    WHERE p.p_retailprice > 50.00
),
OrderDetails AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate,
           DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, o.o_orderdate) AS days_since_order,
           SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_order_value
    FROM orders o
    JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    GROUP BY o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate
),
FinalBenchmark AS (
    SELECT sd.s_name, sd.acctbal_category, pd.p_name, od.total_order_value,
           od.days_since_order
    FROM SupplierDetails sd
    JOIN partsupp ps ON sd.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN PartDetails pd ON ps.ps_partkey = pd.p_partkey
    JOIN OrderDetails od ON sd.s_suppkey = od.o_custkey -- Assuming custkey aligns with suppkey for demo
    WHERE od.days_since_order < 30
    ORDER BY sd.acctbal_category DESC, od.total_order_value DESC
)
SELECT * FROM FinalBenchmark
LIMIT 100
sql2:
SELECT sub.s_name,
       sub.acctbal_category,
       sub.p_name,
       sub.total_order_value,
       sub.days_since_order
FROM (
    SELECT s.s_name,
           CASE
               WHEN s.s_acctbal < 1000 THEN 'Low'
               WHEN s.s_acctbal BETWEEN 1000 AND 10000 THEN 'Medium'
               ELSE 'High'
           END AS acctbal_category,
           p.p_name,
           od.total_order_value,
           od.days_since_order
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
         AND p.p_retailprice > 50.00
    JOIN (
        SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate,
               DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, o.o_orderdate) AS days_since_order,
               SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_order_value
        FROM orders o
        JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        GROUP BY o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate
    ) od ON s.s_suppkey = od.o_custkey
    WHERE od.days_since_order < 30
) sub
ORDER BY sub.acctbal_category DESC, sub.total_order_value DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_qty,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value,
        AVG(s.s_acctbal) AS avg_acct_balance
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_order_value,
        COUNT(l.l_orderkey) AS number_of_items,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_custkey ORDER BY SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
)
SELECT 
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    ss.s_name AS supplier_name,
    ss.total_available_qty AS supplier_available_qty,
    ss.total_supply_value AS supplier_total_value,
    ro.total_order_value AS recent_order_value,
    ro.number_of_items AS items_in_recent_order
FROM 
    SupplierStats ss
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
    supplier s ON ss.s_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
LEFT JOIN 
    RecentOrders ro ON s.s_suppkey = ro.o_custkey
WHERE 
    ss.avg_acct_balance IS NOT NULL
    AND (ss.total_available_qty > 0 OR ro.total_order_value IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY 
    ss.total_supply_value DESC, 
    ro.total_order_value DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 100
sql2:
SELECT
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    ss.s_name AS supplier_name,
    ss.total_available_qty AS supplier_available_qty,
    ss.total_supply_value AS supplier_total_value,
    ro.total_order_value AS recent_order_value,
    ro.number_of_items AS items_in_recent_order
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            s.s_nationkey,
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_qty,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value,
            AVG(s.s_acctbal) AS avg_acct_balance
        FROM
            supplier s
        JOIN
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY
            s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
    ) ss
JOIN
    nation n ON ss.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_custkey,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_order_value,
            COUNT(l.l_orderkey) AS number_of_items,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_custkey ORDER BY SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) DESC) AS order_rank
        FROM
            orders o
        JOIN
            lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE
            o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
        GROUP BY
            o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    ) ro ON ss.s_suppkey = ro.o_custkey
WHERE
    ss.avg_acct_balance IS NOT NULL
    AND (ss.total_available_qty > 0 OR ro.total_order_value IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY
    ss.total_supply_value DESC,
    ro.total_order_value DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
), 
TopCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    HAVING 
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 10000
), 
SupplierPerformance AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS supplier_sales
    FROM 
        lineitem l
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT 
    r.r_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT n.n_nationkey) AS nation_count,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost,
    AVG(s.s_acctbal) AS avg_supplier_acctbal,
    CASE 
        WHEN MAX(tp.total_spent) IS NULL THEN 'No Customers'
        ELSE MAX(tp.total_spent::decimal) 
    END AS max_customer_spent
FROM 
    region r
LEFT JOIN 
    nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
LEFT JOIN 
    supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
LEFT JOIN 
    SupplierPerformance sp ON s.s_suppkey = sp.ps_suppkey
LEFT JOIN 
    TopCustomers tp ON tp.c_custkey = s.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    s.s_acctbal IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    r.r_name
HAVING 
    SUM(sp.supplier_sales) > 50000 OR MAX(tp.total_spent) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    nation_count DESC, total_supply_cost ASC
sql2:
SELECT
    r_name,
    nation_count,
    total_supply_cost,
    avg_supplier_acctbal,
    max_customer_spent
FROM (
    SELECT 
        r.r_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT n.n_nationkey) AS nation_count,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost,
        AVG(s.s_acctbal) AS avg_supplier_acctbal,
        CASE 
            WHEN MAX(tp.total_spent) IS NULL THEN 'No Customers'
            ELSE MAX(tp.total_spent::decimal) 
        END AS max_customer_spent,
        SUM(sp.supplier_sales) AS _total_supplier_sales,
        MAX(tp.total_spent) AS _max_total_spent
    FROM 
        region r
    LEFT JOIN 
        nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        (SELECT 
            ps2.ps_suppkey,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS supplier_sales
        FROM 
            lineitem l
        JOIN 
            partsupp ps2 ON l.l_partkey = ps2.ps_partkey
        GROUP BY 
            ps2.ps_suppkey
        ) sp ON s.s_suppkey = sp.ps_suppkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        (SELECT 
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
        FROM 
            customer c
        JOIN 
            orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
        WHERE 
            o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
        GROUP BY 
            c.c_custkey, c.c_name
        HAVING 
            SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 10000
        ) tp ON tp.c_custkey = s.s_suppkey
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        r.r_name
) sub
WHERE 
    _total_supplier_sales > 50000 OR _max_total_spent IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    nation_count DESC, total_supply_cost ASC

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name AS part_name, 
    s.s_name AS supplier_name, 
    c.c_name AS customer_name, 
    o.o_orderkey AS order_number, 
    l.l_quantity AS quantity, 
    l.l_extendedprice AS extended_price, 
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', s.s_name, ', for Customer: ', c.c_name) AS supplier_customer_info,
    REPLACE(p.p_comment, 'boxes', 'containers') AS modified_comment,
    SUBSTRING_INDEX(p.p_mfgr, ' ', 1) AS manufacturer_first_word,
    CHAR_LENGTH(s.s_comment) AS supplier_comment_length
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE 
    p.p_name LIKE '%Wrench%' 
    AND o.o_orderdate >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
    AND l.l_discount > 0.1 
ORDER BY 
    l.l_extendedprice DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name, p_mfgr, p_comment
    FROM part
    WHERE p_name LIKE '%Wrench%'
),
filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l_orderkey, l_partkey, l_quantity, l_extendedprice, l_discount
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_discount > 0.1
),
recent_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey, o_orderdate
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
)
SELECT 
    fp.p_name AS part_name, 
    s.s_name AS supplier_name, 
    c.c_name AS customer_name, 
    ro.o_orderkey AS order_number, 
    fl.l_quantity AS quantity, 
    fl.l_extendedprice AS extended_price, 
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', s.s_name, ', for Customer: ', c.c_name) AS supplier_customer_info,
    REPLACE(fp.p_comment, 'boxes', 'containers') AS modified_comment,
    SUBSTRING_INDEX(fp.p_mfgr, ' ', 1) AS manufacturer_first_word,
    CHAR_LENGTH(s.s_comment) AS supplier_comment_length
FROM 
    filtered_lineitems fl
JOIN 
    filtered_parts fp ON fl.l_partkey = fp.p_partkey
JOIN 
    recent_orders ro ON fl.l_orderkey = ro.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON ro.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
ORDER BY 
    fl.l_extendedprice DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH RankedParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_brand,
        p.p_type,
        p.p_size,
        p.p_retailprice,
        p.p_comment,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        part p
    WHERE 
        p.p_size > 10
),
FilteredCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        c.c_address,
        c.c_phone,
        SUBSTRING(c.c_comment, 1, 25) AS short_comment
    FROM 
        customer c
    WHERE 
        c.c_acctbal > 5000
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_clerk,
        o.o_comment,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS order_year
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
)
SELECT 
    fp.p_name,
    fp.p_brand,
    fc.c_name,
    rc.r_name,
    ro.o_totalprice,
    CONCAT('Order ', ro.o_orderkey, ' from ', ro.o_orderdate::text) AS order_details
FROM 
    RankedParts fp
JOIN partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN region rc ON n.n_regionkey = rc.r_regionkey
JOIN RecentOrders ro ON ro.o_orderkey = (
    SELECT MIN(l.l_orderkey)
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_partkey = fp.p_partkey
)
JOIN FilteredCustomers fc ON fc.c_custkey = s.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    fp.rn <= 10
ORDER BY 
    fp.p_brand, rc.r_name, ro.o_orderdate
sql2:
SELECT 
    fp.p_name,
    fp.p_brand,
    fc.c_name,
    rc.r_name,
    ro.o_totalprice,
    CONCAT('Order ', ro.o_orderkey, ' from ', ro.o_orderdate::text) AS order_details
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            p.p_partkey,
            p.p_name,
            p.p_brand,
            p.p_type,
            p.p_size,
            p.p_retailprice,
            p.p_comment,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS rn
        FROM 
            part p
        WHERE 
            p.p_size > 10
    ) fp
JOIN partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN region rc ON n.n_regionkey = rc.r_regionkey
JOIN (
    SELECT l_partkey, MIN(l_orderkey) AS min_orderkey
    FROM lineitem
    GROUP BY l_partkey
) lm ON lm.l_partkey = fp.p_partkey
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_clerk,
        o.o_comment,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS order_year
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
) ro ON ro.o_orderkey = lm.min_orderkey
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        c.c_address,
        c.c_phone,
        SUBSTRING(c.c_comment, 1, 25) AS short_comment
    FROM 
        customer c
    WHERE 
        c.c_acctbal > 5000
) fc ON fc.c_custkey = s.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    fp.rn <= 10
ORDER BY 
    fp.p_brand, rc.r_name, ro.o_orderdate

sql1:
WITH TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    HAVING 
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) > 100000
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_custkey, 
        o.o_orderdate, 
        o.o_totalprice,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_custkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(day, -30, CURRENT_DATE)
),
LineItemSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS net_revenue
    FROM 
        lineitem l
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
    GROUP BY 
        l.l_orderkey
)
SELECT 
    c.c_custkey, 
    c.c_name,
    COALESCE(s.s_name, 'Unknown') AS supplier_name,
    COALESCE(l.net_revenue, 0) AS net_revenue,
    o.o_totalprice,
    r.r_name,
    CASE WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN 'Finalized' ELSE 'Pending' END AS order_status_description
FROM 
    customer c
LEFT JOIN 
    RecentOrders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey AND o.order_rank = 1
LEFT JOIN 
    LineItemSummary l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_orderkey IN (SELECT ps.ps_partkey FROM partsupp ps WHERE ps.ps_supplycost > 20000)
LEFT JOIN 
    nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
LEFT JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    c.c_acctbal IS NOT NULL AND c.c_acctbal > 5000
ORDER BY 
    c.c_custkey ASC
LIMIT 100
sql2:
SELECT 
    c.c_custkey, 
    c.c_name,
    COALESCE(s.s_name, 'Unknown') AS supplier_name,
    COALESCE(l.net_revenue, 0) AS net_revenue,
    o.o_totalprice,
    r.r_name,
    CASE WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN 'Finalized' ELSE 'Pending' END AS order_status_description
FROM 
    customer c
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        o2.o_orderkey, 
        o2.o_custkey, 
        o2.o_orderdate, 
        o2.o_totalprice,
        o2.o_orderstatus,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o2.o_custkey ORDER BY o2.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o2
    WHERE 
        o2.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(day, -30, CURRENT_DATE)
    ) o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey AND o.order_rank = 1
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        l2.l_orderkey,
        SUM(l2.l_extendedprice * (1 - l2.l_discount)) AS net_revenue
    FROM 
        lineitem l2
    WHERE 
        l2.l_shipdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
    GROUP BY 
        l2.l_orderkey
    ) l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN 
    supplier s ON EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM partsupp ps WHERE ps.ps_partkey = l.l_orderkey AND ps.ps_supplycost > 20000)
LEFT JOIN 
    nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
LEFT JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    c.c_acctbal > 5000
ORDER BY 
    c.c_custkey ASC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH SupplyDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_avail_qty,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_partkey
),
CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_totalprice,
        c.c_mktsegment,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_nationkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01' AND o.o_orderstatus IN ('O', 'F')
),
ProductSales AS (
    SELECT 
        l.l_partkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM 
        lineitem l
    JOIN 
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipmode = 'AIR' AND l.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY 
        l.l_partkey
)
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    COALESCE(sd.total_avail_qty, 0) AS total_avail_qty,
    COALESCE(sd.avg_supply_cost, 0) AS avg_supply_cost,
    ps.total_sales,
    ps.order_count,
    c.c_mktsegment,
    c.c_name
FROM 
    part p
LEFT JOIN 
    SupplyDetails sd ON p.p_partkey = sd.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    ProductSales ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.l_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    CustomerOrders c ON c.o_orderkey IN (
        SELECT o_orderkey FROM orders WHERE o_orderstatus = 'O'
    ) 
WHERE 
    p.p_retailprice > (SELECT AVG(p_retailprice) FROM part) 
    AND (ps.total_sales IS NOT NULL OR sd.avg_supply_cost < 50)
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC, avg_supply_cost ASC, p.p_name
sql2:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    COALESCE(sd.total_avail_qty, 0) AS total_avail_qty,
    COALESCE(sd.avg_supply_cost, 0) AS avg_supply_cost,
    ps.total_sales,
    ps.order_count,
    c.c_mktsegment,
    c.c_name
FROM 
    part p
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
         ps.ps_partkey,
         SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_avail_qty,
         AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
     FROM partsupp ps
     GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey
    ) sd ON p.p_partkey = sd.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
         l.l_partkey,
         SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
         COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS order_count
     FROM lineitem l
     WHERE l.l_shipmode = 'AIR'
       AND l.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE
       AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey)
     GROUP BY l.l_partkey
    ) ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.l_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
         o.o_orderkey,
         o.o_totalprice,
         cust.c_mktsegment,
         cust.c_name,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cust.c_nationkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
     FROM orders o
     JOIN customer cust ON o.o_custkey = cust.c_custkey
     WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
       AND o.o_orderstatus IN ('O', 'F')
    ) c ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM orders o2 
        WHERE o2.o_orderkey = c.o_orderkey AND o2.o_orderstatus = 'O'
    )
WHERE 
    p.p_retailprice > (SELECT AVG(p2.p_retailprice) FROM part p2)
    AND (ps.total_sales IS NOT NULL OR sd.avg_supply_cost < 50)
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC, avg_supply_cost ASC, p.p_name

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        r.r_name AS region,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.r_regionkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rank,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN 
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, r.r_regionkey
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_price,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_custkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
),
TopCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COALESCE(SUM(ro.total_price), 0) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        RecentOrders ro ON c.c_custkey = ro.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    HAVING 
        total_spent > (SELECT AVG(total_price) FROM RecentOrders)
)
SELECT 
    ts.c_custkey,
    ts.c_name,
    COALESCE(rs.s_name, 'N/A') AS supplier_name,
    rs.total_supply_cost,
    ts.total_spent
FROM 
    TopCustomers ts
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSuppliers rs ON ts.c_custkey = rs.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    rs.rank <= 5
ORDER BY 
    ts.total_spent DESC, rs.total_supply_cost DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    ts.c_custkey,
    ts.c_name,
    COALESCE(rs.s_name, 'N/A') AS supplier_name,
    rs.total_supply_cost,
    ts.total_spent
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            COALESCE(SUM(ro.total_price), 0) AS total_spent
        FROM
            customer c
        LEFT JOIN
            (
                SELECT
                    o.o_orderkey,
                    o.o_custkey,
                    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_price
                FROM
                    orders o
                INNER JOIN
                    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
                WHERE
                    o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
                GROUP BY
                    o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
            ) ro ON c.c_custkey = ro.o_custkey
        GROUP BY
            c.c_custkey, c.c_name
        HAVING
            COALESCE(SUM(ro.total_price), 0) >
            (
                SELECT AVG(sub.total_price)
                FROM (
                    SELECT SUM(l2.l_extendedprice * (1 - l2.l_discount)) AS total_price
                    FROM orders o2
                    INNER JOIN lineitem l2 ON o2.o_orderkey = l2.l_orderkey
                    WHERE o2.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
                    GROUP BY o2.o_orderkey, o2.o_custkey
                ) sub
            )
    ) ts
INNER JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.r_regionkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rank
        FROM
            supplier s
        INNER JOIN
            nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        INNER JOIN
            region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        INNER JOIN
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY
            s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, r.r_regionkey
    ) rs ON ts.c_custkey = rs.s_suppkey AND rs.rank <= 5
ORDER BY
    ts.total_spent DESC, rs.total_supply_cost DESC

sql1:
WITH FilteredParts AS (
    SELECT p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_brand, p.p_type, p.p_retailprice, p.p_comment
    FROM part p
    WHERE LENGTH(p.p_name) > 10 AND p.p_retailprice < 50
),
SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey, s.s_comment
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE s.s_acctbal > 1000 AND s.s_nationkey IN (SELECT n.n_nationkey FROM nation n WHERE n.n_name LIKE 'A%')
),
CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) = 2023
)
SELECT 
    fp.p_partkey,
    fp.p_name,
    fp.p_brand,
    COUNT(DISTINCT so.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    SUM(co.o_totalprice) AS total_revenue
FROM FilteredParts fp
JOIN lineitem li ON li.l_partkey = fp.p_partkey
JOIN CustomerOrders co ON li.l_orderkey = co.o_orderkey
JOIN SupplierDetails sd ON li.l_suppkey = sd.s_suppkey
GROUP BY fp.p_partkey, fp.p_name, fp.p_brand
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    p.p_brand,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_revenue
FROM part p
JOIN lineitem li ON li.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN orders o ON li.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    AND o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) = 2023
JOIN supplier s ON li.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    AND s.s_acctbal > 1000
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    AND n.n_name LIKE 'A%'
WHERE LENGTH(p.p_name) > 10
  AND p.p_retailprice < 50
GROUP BY p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_brand
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
SELECT 
    P.p_name AS part_name,
    CONCAT('Manufacturer: ', P.p_mfgr, ', Brand: ', P.p_brand, ', Type: ', P.p_type) AS part_details,
    S.s_name AS supplier_name,
    C.c_name AS customer_name,
    R.r_name AS region_name,
    O.o_orderstatus AS order_status,
    O.o_orderdate AS order_date,
    O.o_totalprice AS total_price,
    L.l_quantity AS quantity,
    L.l_extendedprice AS extended_price,
    L.l_discount AS discount,
    L.l_tax AS tax,
    LENGTH(P.p_comment) AS comment_length,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM P.p_comment) AS trimmed_comment
FROM 
    part P
JOIN 
    partsupp PS ON P.p_partkey = PS.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier S ON PS.ps_suppkey = S.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem L ON S.s_suppkey = L.l_suppkey
JOIN 
    orders O ON L.l_orderkey = O.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer C ON O.o_custkey = C.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation N ON S.s_nationkey = N.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region R ON N.n_regionkey = R.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    P.p_name LIKE '%Widget%'
    AND O.o_orderdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
ORDER BY 
    P.p_name, S.s_name
sql2:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name, p_mfgr, p_brand, p_type, p_comment
    FROM part
    WHERE p_name LIKE '%Widget%'
),
filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey, o_orderstatus, o_orderdate, o_totalprice
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
),
supplier_region AS (
    SELECT S.s_suppkey, S.s_name, S.s_nationkey, R.r_name
    FROM supplier S
    INNER JOIN nation N ON S.s_nationkey = N.n_nationkey
    INNER JOIN region R ON N.n_regionkey = R.r_regionkey
)
SELECT 
    fp.p_name AS part_name,
    CONCAT('Manufacturer: ', fp.p_mfgr, ', Brand: ', fp.p_brand, ', Type: ', fp.p_type) AS part_details,
    sr.s_name AS supplier_name,
    C.c_name AS customer_name,
    sr.r_name AS region_name,
    fo.o_orderstatus AS order_status,
    fo.o_orderdate AS order_date,
    fo.o_totalprice AS total_price,
    L.l_quantity AS quantity,
    L.l_extendedprice AS extended_price,
    L.l_discount AS discount,
    L.l_tax AS tax,
    LENGTH(fp.p_comment) AS comment_length,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM fp.p_comment) AS trimmed_comment
FROM 
    filtered_parts fp
JOIN 
    partsupp PS ON fp.p_partkey = PS.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier_region sr ON PS.ps_suppkey = sr.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem L ON sr.s_suppkey = L.l_suppkey
JOIN 
    filtered_orders fo ON L.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer C ON fo.o_custkey = C.c_custkey
ORDER BY 
    fp.p_name, sr.s_name

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_orderdate, 
        o.o_totalprice, 
        o.o_orderpriority, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        orders o 
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
),
SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available
    FROM 
        supplier s 
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey 
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        sd.s_suppkey, 
        sd.s_name 
    FROM 
        SupplierDetails sd 
    WHERE 
        sd.total_available > (
            SELECT AVG(total_available) FROM SupplierDetails
        )
),
OrderLineSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        lo.l_orderkey, 
        SUM(lo.l_extendedprice * (1 - lo.l_discount)) AS total_extended_price, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT lo.l_suppkey) AS supply_count
    FROM 
        lineitem lo 
    WHERE 
        lo.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30' DAY 
    GROUP BY 
        lo.l_orderkey
)
SELECT 
    o.o_orderkey, 
    o.o_orderdate, 
    ol.total_extended_price, 
    COALESCE(ts.s_name, 'No Supplier') AS supplier_name, 
    ol.supply_count
FROM 
    RankedOrders o
LEFT JOIN 
    OrderLineSummary ol ON o.o_orderkey = ol.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN 
    TopSuppliers ts ON ol.supply_count > 0
WHERE 
    o.rn <= 10 AND 
    (o.o_orderpriority LIKE 'high%' OR o.o_orderstatus = 'O')
ORDER BY 
    o.o_totalprice DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    o.o_orderkey,
    o.o_orderdate,
    ol.total_extended_price,
    COALESCE(ts.s_name, 'No Supplier') AS supplier_name,
    ol.supply_count
FROM (
    SELECT
        o2.o_orderkey,
        o2.o_orderdate,
        o2.o_totalprice,
        o2.o_orderpriority,
        o2.o_orderstatus,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o2.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o2.o_totalprice DESC) AS rn
    FROM orders o2
    WHERE o2.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
) o
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        lo.l_orderkey,
        SUM(lo.l_extendedprice * (1 - lo.l_discount)) AS total_extended_price,
        COUNT(DISTINCT lo.l_suppkey) AS supply_count
    FROM lineitem lo
    WHERE lo.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30' DAY
    GROUP BY lo.l_orderkey
) ol ON o.o_orderkey = ol.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    HAVING SUM(ps.ps_availqty) > (
        SELECT AVG(sd_avg.total_available)
        FROM (
            SELECT SUM(ps2.ps_availqty) AS total_available
            FROM supplier s2
            JOIN partsupp ps2 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
            GROUP BY s2.s_suppkey, s2.s_name
        ) sd_avg
    )
) ts ON ol.supply_count > 0
WHERE o.rn <= 10
  AND (o.o_orderpriority LIKE 'high%' OR o.o_orderstatus = 'O')
ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2022-01-01'
),
SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
CustomerSegment AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        CASE 
            WHEN c.c_acctbal > 10000 THEN 'High'
            WHEN c.c_acctbal BETWEEN 5000 AND 10000 THEN 'Medium'
            ELSE 'Low'
        END AS segment
    FROM 
        customer c
)
SELECT 
    ns.n_name AS nation,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS customer_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN l.l_returnflag = 'R' THEN l.l_quantity ELSE 0 END) AS total_returns,
    AVG(s.total_supply_value) AS avg_supply_value
FROM 
    nation ns
LEFT JOIN 
    customer c ON ns.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
LEFT JOIN 
    orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
LEFT JOIN 
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN 
    SupplierStats s ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderstatus IN ('O', 'F')
    AND l.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY 
    ns.n_name
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) > 5
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
UNION
SELECT 
    r.r_name AS region,
    NULL AS customer_count,
    NULL AS total_orders,
    NULL AS total_revenue,
    NULL AS total_returns,
    NULL AS avg_supply_value
FROM 
    region r
WHERE 
    r.r_regionkey NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT n.n_regionkey FROM nation n)
sql2:
SELECT
    nation,
    customer_count,
    total_orders,
    total_revenue,
    total_returns,
    avg_supply_value
FROM (
    SELECT
        ns.n_name AS nation,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS customer_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        SUM(CASE WHEN l.l_returnflag = 'R' THEN l.l_quantity ELSE 0 END) AS total_returns,
        AVG(s.total_supply_value) AS avg_supply_value
    FROM
        nation ns
    LEFT JOIN customer c ON ns.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    LEFT JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    JOIN (
        SELECT
            sup.s_suppkey,
            sup.s_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value
        FROM
            supplier sup
        JOIN partsupp ps ON sup.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY
            sup.s_suppkey, sup.s_name
    ) s ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    WHERE
        o.o_orderstatus IN ('O', 'F')
        AND l.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY
        ns.n_name
) agg
WHERE total_orders > 5

UNION

SELECT
    r.r_name AS nation,
    NULL AS customer_count,
    NULL AS total_orders,
    NULL AS total_revenue,
    NULL AS total_returns,
    NULL AS avg_supply_value
FROM
    region r
LEFT JOIN nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
WHERE n.n_nationkey IS NULL

ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_mfgr,
        p.p_brand,
        p.p_type,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_cost,
        SUBSTRING(p.p_comment, 1, 23) AS short_comment,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) DESC) AS brand_rank
    FROM 
        part p
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    GROUP BY 
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_mfgr, p.p_brand, p.p_type
),
ActiveCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        c.c_address,
        c.c_phone,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_address, c.c_phone
)
SELECT 
    rp.p_partkey,
    rp.p_name,
    rp.p_mfgr,
    rp.p_brand,
    rp.p_type,
    rp.supplier_count,
    rp.total_available,
    rp.total_cost,
    rp.short_comment,
    ac.c_custkey,
    ac.c_name,
    ac.c_address,
    ac.c_phone,
    ac.total_spent
FROM 
    RankedParts rp
JOIN 
    ActiveCustomers ac ON ac.total_spent >= rp.total_cost
WHERE 
    rp.brand_rank <= 3
ORDER BY 
    rp.supplier_count DESC, ac.total_spent DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    rp.p_partkey,
    rp.p_name,
    rp.p_mfgr,
    rp.p_brand,
    rp.p_type,
    rp.supplier_count,
    rp.total_available,
    rp.total_cost,
    rp.short_comment,
    ac.c_custkey,
    ac.c_name,
    ac.c_address,
    ac.c_phone,
    ac.total_spent
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            p.p_partkey,
            p.p_name,
            p.p_mfgr,
            p.p_brand,
            p.p_type,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_cost,
            SUBSTRING(p.p_comment, 1, 23) AS short_comment,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) DESC) AS brand_rank
        FROM 
            part p
        INNER JOIN 
            partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
        GROUP BY 
            p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_mfgr, p.p_brand, p.p_type
    ) rp
INNER JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            c.c_address,
            c.c_phone,
            SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
        FROM 
            customer c
        INNER JOIN 
            orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
        WHERE 
            o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
        GROUP BY 
            c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_address, c.c_phone
    ) ac ON ac.total_spent >= rp.total_cost
WHERE 
    rp.brand_rank <= 3
ORDER BY 
    rp.supplier_count DESC, ac.total_spent DESC

sql1:
WITH CustomerOrderSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
        AVG(o.o_totalprice) AS avg_order_value
    FROM customer c
    LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
),
SupplierPartDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        COALESCE(SUM(ps.ps_availqty), 0) AS total_available,
        COALESCE(SUM(ps.ps_supplycost), 0.00) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, p.p_partkey, p.p_name
),
HighValueCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        cus.c_custkey,
        cus.c_name,
        cus.total_orders,
        cus.total_spent,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cus.total_spent DESC) AS customer_rank
    FROM CustomerOrderSummary cus
    WHERE cus.total_spent > 10000
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        CASE 
            WHEN o.o_orderdate < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' THEN 'Older'
            ELSE 'Recent'
        END AS order_type
    FROM orders o
)
SELECT 
    cus.c_name AS customer_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    pp.p_name AS part_name,
    rp.total_available,
    rp.total_supply_cost,
    r.region_name,
    r.r_comment
FROM lineitem l
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN HighValueCustomers cus ON o.o_custkey = cus.c_custkey
JOIN SupplierPartDetails rp ON l.l_suppkey = rp.s_suppkey AND l.l_partkey = rp.p_partkey
JOIN nation n ON n.n_nationkey = cu.c_nationkey
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE l.l_returnflag = 'N' 
GROUP BY cus.c_name, s.s_name, p.p_name, rp.total_available, rp.total_supply_cost, r.region_name, r.r_comment
HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 50000
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100
sql2:
SELECT 
    cus.c_name AS customer_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    pp.p_name AS part_name,
    rp.total_available,
    rp.total_supply_cost,
    r.region_name,
    r.r_comment
FROM lineitem l
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        sub_cus.c_custkey,
        sub_cus.c_name,
        sub_cus.total_orders,
        sub_cus.total_spent,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sub_cus.total_spent DESC) AS customer_rank
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            COUNT(o2.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
            SUM(o2.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
            AVG(o2.o_totalprice) AS avg_order_value
        FROM customer c
        LEFT JOIN orders o2 ON c.c_custkey = o2.o_custkey
        GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    ) sub_cus
    WHERE sub_cus.total_spent > 10000
) cus ON o.o_custkey = cus.c_custkey
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        COALESCE(SUM(ps.ps_availqty), 0) AS total_available,
        COALESCE(SUM(ps.ps_supplycost), 0.00) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, p.p_partkey, p.p_name
) rp ON l.l_suppkey = rp.s_suppkey AND l.l_partkey = rp.p_partkey
JOIN nation n ON n.n_nationkey = cu.c_nationkey
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE l.l_returnflag = 'N' 
GROUP BY cus.c_name, s.s_name, p.p_name, rp.total_available, rp.total_supply_cost, r.region_name, r.r_comment
HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 50000
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH PartDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey, 
        p.p_name, 
        p.p_mfgr, 
        p.p_brand, 
        p.p_type, 
        p.p_container, 
        p.p_retailprice, 
        SUBSTR(p.p_comment, 1, 10) AS short_comment,
        LENGTH(p.p_comment) AS comment_length
    FROM 
        part p
    WHERE 
        p.p_size BETWEEN 5 AND 15
), 
SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_acctbal, 
        s.s_comment, 
        CHAR_LENGTH(s.s_comment) AS supplier_comment_length
    FROM 
        supplier s
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal > 5000
), 
OrderDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_orderstatus, 
        o.o_totalprice, 
        o.o_orderdate, 
        o.o_orderpriority, 
        SUBSTRING(o.o_comment FROM 1 FOR 20) AS short_order_comment
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
)
SELECT 
    pd.p_partkey, 
    pd.p_name, 
    pd.p_mfgr, 
    pd.p_brand, 
    sd.s_suppkey, 
    sd.s_name, 
    od.o_orderkey, 
    od.o_orderstatus, 
    od.o_totalprice,
    CONCAT(pd.short_comment, '...', ' (', pd.comment_length, ' chars)') AS formatted_comment,
    CONCAT(sd.s_comment, ' (Length: ', sd.supplier_comment_length, ' chars)') AS supplier_comment_info,
    CONCAT(od.short_order_comment, '...') AS order_comment_preview
FROM 
    PartDetails pd
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON pd.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    SupplierDetails sd ON ps.ps_suppkey = sd.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    OrderDetails od ON ps.ps_partkey = od.o_orderkey
ORDER BY 
    pd.p_retailprice DESC, 
    sd.s_acctbal DESC
LIMIT 100
sql2:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    p.p_mfgr, 
    p.p_brand, 
    s.s_suppkey, 
    s.s_name, 
    o.o_orderkey, 
    o.o_orderstatus, 
    o.o_totalprice,
    CONCAT(SUBSTR(p.p_comment, 1, 10), '...', ' (', LENGTH(p.p_comment), ' chars)') AS formatted_comment,
    CONCAT(s.s_comment, ' (Length: ', CHAR_LENGTH(s.s_comment), ' chars)') AS supplier_comment_info,
    CONCAT(SUBSTRING(o.o_comment FROM 1 FOR 20), '...') AS order_comment_preview
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON ps.ps_partkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    p.p_size BETWEEN 5 AND 15
    AND s.s_acctbal > 5000
    AND o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
ORDER BY 
    p.p_retailprice DESC, 
    s.s_acctbal DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        COUNT(l.l_orderkey) OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderkey) AS lineitem_count,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderkey) AS total_value,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM
        orders o
    LEFT JOIN
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
),
SupplierParts AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_partkey,
        s.s_name AS supplier_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    JOIN
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY
        ps.ps_partkey, s.s_name
),
CustomerInfo AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        c.c_acctbal,
        n.n_name AS nation_name,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY c.c_acctbal DESC) AS ranking
    FROM
        customer c
    JOIN
        nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE
        c.c_acctbal > 1000
)
SELECT
    o.o_orderkey,
    o.o_orderdate,
    o.lineitem_count,
    o.total_value,
    s.supplier_name,
    (CASE 
        WHEN o.lineitem_count IS NULL THEN 'No Line Items' 
        ELSE 'Has Line Items' 
    END) AS LineItem_Status,
    ci.c_name AS customer_name,
    ci.nation_name
FROM
    RankedOrders o
LEFT JOIN
    SupplierParts s ON o.o_orderkey = s.ps_partkey
JOIN
    CustomerInfo ci ON ci.c_custkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE
    o.order_rank <= 10
    AND (o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND CURRENT_DATE)
ORDER BY
    o.o_totalprice DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    o.o_orderkey,
    o.o_orderdate,
    o.lineitem_count,
    o.total_value,
    s.supplier_name,
    (CASE 
        WHEN o.lineitem_count IS NULL THEN 'No Line Items' 
        ELSE 'Has Line Items' 
    END) AS LineItem_Status,
    ci.c_name AS customer_name,
    ci.nation_name
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            sub.o_orderkey,
            sub.o_orderdate,
            sub.o_totalprice,
            sub.lineitem_count,
            sub.total_value,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sub.o_orderstatus ORDER BY sub.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
        FROM (
            SELECT
                o.o_orderkey,
                o.o_orderdate,
                o.o_totalprice,
                o.o_orderstatus,
                COUNT(l.l_orderkey) AS lineitem_count,
                SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_value
            FROM
                orders o
            LEFT JOIN
                lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
            GROUP BY
                o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice, o.o_orderstatus
        ) sub
    ) o
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            ps.ps_partkey,
            s.s_name AS supplier_name
        FROM
            partsupp ps
        INNER JOIN
            supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        GROUP BY
            ps.ps_partkey, s.s_name
        HAVING
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) IS NOT NULL
    ) s ON o.o_orderkey = s.ps_partkey
INNER JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            c.c_acctbal,
            n.n_name AS nation_name
        FROM
            customer c
        INNER JOIN
            nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        WHERE
            c.c_acctbal > 1000
    ) ci ON ci.c_custkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE
    o.order_rank <= 10
    AND o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
    AND o.o_orderdate <= CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY
    o.o_totalprice DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        orders AS o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'O' 
        AND o.o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01'
),
SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty * ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_value
    FROM 
        supplier AS s
    JOIN 
        partsupp AS ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
HighValueSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        sd.s_suppkey,
        sd.s_name
    FROM 
        SupplierDetails AS sd
    WHERE 
        sd.total_supply_value > (
            SELECT AVG(total_supply_value) FROM SupplierDetails
        )
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        ro.o_orderkey,
        ro.o_orderdate,
        ro.o_totalprice
    FROM 
        RankedOrders AS ro
    WHERE 
        ro.rn = 1
)
SELECT 
    coalesce(hvs.s_name, 'Unknown Supplier') AS supplier_name,
    SUM(lo.l_extendedprice * (1 - lo.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ro.o_orderkey) AS number_of_orders
FROM 
    lineitem AS lo
LEFT JOIN 
    RecentOrders AS ro ON lo.l_orderkey = ro.o_orderkey
LEFT JOIN 
    partsupp AS ps ON lo.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey 
LEFT JOIN 
    HighValueSuppliers AS hvs ON ps.ps_suppkey = hvs.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    lo.l_shipdate > current_date - interval '30 days'
    AND (lo.l_returnflag = 'R' OR lo.l_linestatus = 'F')
GROUP BY 
    hvs.s_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT 
    coalesce(hvs.s_name, 'Unknown Supplier') AS supplier_name,
    SUM(lo.l_extendedprice * (1 - lo.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ro.o_orderkey) AS number_of_orders
FROM 
    lineitem AS lo
LEFT JOIN 
    orders AS ro 
    ON lo.l_orderkey = ro.o_orderkey
    AND ro.o_orderstatus = 'O'
    AND ro.o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01'
LEFT JOIN 
    partsupp AS ps ON lo.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
        FROM supplier AS s
        JOIN partsupp AS ps2 ON s.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
        HAVING SUM(ps2.ps_availqty * ps2.ps_supplycost) >
            (SELECT SUM(ps3.ps_availqty * ps3.ps_supplycost) * 1.0
                    / COUNT(DISTINCT s2.s_suppkey)
             FROM supplier AS s2
             JOIN partsupp AS ps3 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps3.ps_suppkey)
    ) AS hvs ON ps.ps_suppkey = hvs.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    lo.l_shipdate > current_date - interval '30 days'
    AND (lo.l_returnflag = 'R' OR lo.l_linestatus = 'F')
GROUP BY 
    hvs.s_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH supplier_details AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey, s.s_acctbal,
           REPLACE(s.s_comment, 'excellent', 'superior') AS updated_comment,
           CONCAT('Supplier: ', s.s_name, ', Balance: ', CAST(s.s_acctbal AS VARCHAR(20))) AS summary
    FROM supplier s
),
part_details AS (
    SELECT p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_mfgr,
           TRIM(SUBSTRING(p.p_comment FROM 1 FOR 10)) AS short_comment,
           UPPER(p.p_type) AS uppercase_type,
           p.p_retailprice
    FROM part p
    WHERE p.p_retailprice > 50.00
),
order_info AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderstatus,
           COUNT(l.l_orderkey) AS item_count,
           SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM orders o
    JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days'
    GROUP BY o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderstatus
),
final_benchmark AS (
    SELECT pd.p_name, pd.uppercase_type, sd.summary,
           oi.total_revenue, oi.item_count, sd.updated_comment
    FROM part_details pd
    JOIN supplier_details sd ON pd.p_partkey MOD 10 = sd.s_suppkey MOD 10
    JOIN order_info oi ON oi.o_custkey % 100 = sd.s_nationkey
    WHERE oi.item_count > 5
    ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
)
SELECT *
FROM final_benchmark
LIMIT 100
sql2:
SELECT pd.p_name, pd.uppercase_type, sd.summary,
       oi.total_revenue, oi.item_count, sd.updated_comment
FROM (
    SELECT p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_mfgr,
           TRIM(SUBSTRING(p.p_comment FROM 1 FOR 10)) AS short_comment,
           UPPER(p.p_type) AS uppercase_type,
           p.p_retailprice
    FROM part p
    WHERE p.p_retailprice > 50.00
) pd
JOIN (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey, s.s_acctbal,
           REPLACE(s.s_comment, 'excellent', 'superior') AS updated_comment,
           CONCAT('Supplier: ', s.s_name, ', Balance: ', CAST(s.s_acctbal AS VARCHAR(20))) AS summary
    FROM supplier s
) sd ON pd.p_partkey MOD 10 = sd.s_suppkey MOD 10
JOIN (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderstatus,
           COUNT(l.l_orderkey) AS item_count,
           SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM orders o
    JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days'
    GROUP BY o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderstatus
    HAVING COUNT(l.l_orderkey) > 5
) oi ON oi.o_custkey % 100 = sd.s_nationkey
ORDER BY oi.total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS TotalSupplyCost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rank
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
),
CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS OrderCount,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS TotalSpent
    FROM customer c
    LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
),
LineItemSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS NetSales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_linenumber) AS LineCount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY l.l_orderkey
),
NationalStats AS (
    SELECT
        n.n_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS UniqueCustomers,
        SUM(lo.NetSales) AS TotalNetSales
    FROM nation n
    LEFT JOIN customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    LEFT JOIN LineItemSummary lo ON o.o_orderkey = lo.l_orderkey
    GROUP BY n.n_name
)
SELECT 
    rs.s_name AS SupplierName,
    ns.n_name AS NationName,
    ns.UniqueCustomers,
    ns.TotalNetSales,
    rs.TotalSupplyCost
FROM RankedSuppliers rs
JOIN NationalStats ns ON rs.s_nationkey = ns.n_nationkey
WHERE rs.rank = 1
  AND ns.TotalNetSales > (SELECT AVG(TotalNetSales) FROM NationalStats)
ORDER BY ns.TotalNetSales DESC, rs.TotalSupplyCost DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    rs.s_name AS SupplierName,
    ns.n_name AS NationName,
    ns.UniqueCustomers,
    ns.TotalNetSales,
    rs.TotalSupplyCost
FROM (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_nationkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS TotalSupplyCost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rank
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
) rs
JOIN (
    SELECT
        n.n_nationkey,
        n.n_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS UniqueCustomers,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS TotalNetSales
    FROM nation n
    LEFT JOIN customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    LEFT JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey AND l.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY n.n_nationkey, n.n_name
) ns ON rs.s_nationkey = ns.n_nationkey
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT AVG(nat_sales.TotalNetSales) AS AvgNetSales
    FROM (
        SELECT
            n.n_nationkey,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS TotalNetSales
        FROM nation n
        LEFT JOIN customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
        LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
        LEFT JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey AND l.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE
        GROUP BY n.n_nationkey, n.n_name
    ) nat_sales
) avg_filter
WHERE rs.rank = 1
  AND ns.TotalNetSales > avg_filter.AvgNetSales
ORDER BY ns.TotalNetSales DESC, rs.TotalSupplyCost DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_orderdate, 
        o.o_totalprice, 
        c.c_name,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_nationkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year')
),
SupplierCosts AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey, 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supplycost
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_partkey, s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
FilteredParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey, 
        p.p_name, 
        p.p_retailprice, 
        COALESCE(SC.total_supplycost, 0) AS total_supplycost
    FROM 
        part p
    LEFT JOIN 
        SupplierCosts SC ON p.p_partkey = SC.ps_partkey
    WHERE 
        p.p_retailprice > 50.00
),
HighValueOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        r.order_key, 
        r.order_date, 
        r.customer_name,
        p.p_partkey,
        SUM( li.l_extendedprice * (1 - li.l_discount) ) AS total_value
    FROM 
        RankedOrders r
    JOIN 
        lineitem li ON r.o_orderkey = li.l_orderkey
    JOIN 
        FilteredParts p ON li.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
    GROUP BY 
        r.o_orderkey, r.o_orderdate, r.c_name, p.p_partkey
    HAVING 
        SUM( li.l_extendedprice * (1 - li.l_discount) ) > 2000
)
SELECT 
    h.o_orderkey, 
    h.o_orderdate, 
    h.customer_name, 
    p.p_name,
    p.total_supplycost,
    CASE 
        WHEN h.total_value IS NULL THEN 'No Value'
        ELSE h.total_value::VARCHAR
    END AS order_value_text
FROM 
    HighValueOrders h
JOIN 
    FilteredParts p ON h.p_partkey = p.p_partkey
ORDER BY 
    h.o_orderdate DESC, 
    h.total_value DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    agg.o_orderkey,
    agg.o_orderdate,
    agg.customer_name,
    fp2.p_name,
    fp2.total_supplycost,
    CASE
        WHEN agg.total_value IS NULL THEN 'No Value'
        ELSE agg.total_value::VARCHAR
    END AS order_value_text
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            r.order_key,
            r.order_date,
            r.customer_name,
            fp.p_partkey,
            SUM(li.l_extendedprice * (1 - li.l_discount)) AS total_value
        FROM
            (
                SELECT
                    o.o_orderkey,
                    o.o_orderdate,
                    o.o_totalprice,
                    c.c_name,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_nationkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
                FROM
                    orders o
                    INNER JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
                WHERE
                    o.o_orderdate >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year')
            ) r
            INNER JOIN lineitem li ON r.o_orderkey = li.l_orderkey
            INNER JOIN (
                SELECT
                    p.p_partkey,
                    p.p_name,
                    p.p_retailprice,
                    COALESCE(sc.total_supplycost, 0) AS total_supplycost
                FROM
                    part p
                    LEFT JOIN (
                        SELECT
                            ps.ps_partkey,
                            s.s_suppkey,
                            s.s_name,
                            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supplycost
                        FROM
                            partsupp ps
                            INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
                        GROUP BY
                            ps.ps_partkey, s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
                    ) sc ON p.p_partkey = sc.ps_partkey
                WHERE
                    p.p_retailprice > 50.00
            ) fp ON li.l_partkey = fp.p_partkey
        GROUP BY
            r.o_orderkey, r.o_orderdate, r.c_name, fp.p_partkey
        HAVING
            SUM(li.l_extendedprice * (1 - li.l_discount)) > 2000
    ) agg
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT
            p.p_partkey,
            p.p_name,
            p.p_retailprice,
            COALESCE(sc.total_supplycost, 0) AS total_supplycost
        FROM
            part p
            LEFT JOIN (
                SELECT
                    ps.ps_partkey,
                    s.s_suppkey,
                    s.s_name,
                    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supplycost
                FROM
                    partsupp ps
                    INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
                GROUP BY
                    ps.ps_partkey, s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
            ) sc ON p.p_partkey = sc.ps_partkey
        WHERE
            p.p_retailprice > 50.00
    ) fp2 ON agg.p_partkey = fp2.p_partkey
ORDER BY
    agg.o_orderdate DESC,
    agg.total_value DESC

sql1:
WITH TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    HAVING SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) > (SELECT AVG(total_cost)
                                                      FROM (
                                                          SELECT SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) AS total_cost
                                                          FROM partsupp ps
                                                          GROUP BY ps.ps_suppkey
                                                      ) AS avg_costs)
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice, c.c_name, c.c_nationkey
    FROM orders o
    JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(month, -6, CURRENT_DATE)
),
LineItemSummary AS (
    SELECT l.l_orderkey, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS net_revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    GROUP BY l.l_orderkey
),
SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS part_count
    FROM supplier s
    LEFT JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
)
SELECT DISTINCT 
    r.r_name,
    COALESCE(c.c_name, 'Unknown') AS customer_name,
    COALESCE(p.p_name, 'Generic Part') AS part_name,
    SUM(l.net_revenue) AS total_revenue,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    sd.part_count
FROM region r
LEFT JOIN nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
LEFT JOIN customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
LEFT JOIN RecentOrders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
LEFT JOIN LineItemSummary l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN partsupp ps ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN TopSuppliers ts ON s.s_suppkey = ts.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN SupplierDetails sd ON s.s_suppkey = sd.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
WHERE s.s_suppkey IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY r.r_name, c.c_name, p.p_name, s.s_name, sd.part_count
HAVING SUM(l.net_revenue) > 1000
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, r.r_name, customer_name
sql2:
SELECT
    r.r_name,
    COALESCE(c.c_name, 'Unknown') AS customer_name,
    COALESCE(p.p_name, 'Generic Part') AS part_name,
    SUM(lis.net_revenue) AS total_revenue,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    sd.part_count
FROM region r
LEFT JOIN nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
LEFT JOIN customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice, c2.c_name, c2.c_nationkey
    FROM orders o
    JOIN customer c2 ON o.o_custkey = c2.c_custkey
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(month, -6, CURRENT_DATE)
) o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT l.l_orderkey, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS net_revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    GROUP BY l.l_orderkey
) lis ON o.o_orderkey = lis.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN partsupp ps ON ps.ps_partkey = lis.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT sub.s_suppkey
    FROM (
        SELECT s2.s_suppkey, SUM(ps2.ps_supplycost * ps2.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
        FROM supplier s2
        JOIN partsupp ps2 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY s2.s_suppkey
    ) sub
    WHERE sub.total_cost > (
        SELECT AVG(ag.total_cost)
        FROM (
            SELECT SUM(ps3.ps_supplycost * ps3.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
            FROM partsupp ps3
            GROUP BY ps3.ps_suppkey
        ) ag
    )
) ts ON s.s_suppkey = ts.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT s3.s_suppkey, COUNT(DISTINCT ps4.ps_partkey) AS part_count
    FROM supplier s3
    LEFT JOIN partsupp ps4 ON s3.s_suppkey = ps4.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s3.s_suppkey
) sd ON s.s_suppkey = sd.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
WHERE s.s_suppkey IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY r.r_name, c.c_name, p.p_name, s.s_name, sd.part_count
HAVING SUM(lis.net_revenue) > 1000
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, r.r_name, customer_name

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS supplier_rank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
), FilteredCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'F' OR o.o_orderstatus IS NULL
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
)
SELECT 
    r.r_name AS region,
    ns.n_name AS nation,
    fs.c_name AS customer_name,
    fs.total_spent,
    rs.s_name AS top_supplier,
    rs.total_cost
FROM 
    region r
JOIN 
    nation ns ON r.r_regionkey = ns.n_regionkey
LEFT JOIN 
    FilteredCustomers fs ON fs.c_custkey IS NOT NULL
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSuppliers rs ON rs.supp_key = (
        SELECT 
            s.s_suppkey 
        FROM 
            supplier s
        WHERE 
            s.s_nationkey = ns.n_nationkey
        ORDER BY 
            ps_supplycost * ps_availqty DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
LEFT JOIN
    partsupp ps ON ps.ps_partkey = (
        SELECT 
            l.l_partkey 
        FROM 
            lineitem l
        WHERE 
            l.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
        ORDER BY 
            l.l_extendedprice DESC 
        LIMIT 1
    )
WHERE 
    fs.total_spent > 1000
ORDER BY 
    total_spent DESC NULLS LAST
sql2:
SELECT
    r.r_name AS region,

) fs ON fs.c_custkey IS NOT NULL
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,

        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS supplier_rank
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey

    ORDER BY

)
LEFT JOIN

        SELECT
            l.l_partkey

        WHERE

        ORDER BY

    )

ORDER BY

sql1:
WITH SupplierPart AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_name AS supplier_name,
        p.p_name AS part_name,
        CONCAT(s.s_address, ', NationKey: ', s.s_nationkey) AS supplier_info,
        ps.ps_availqty AS available_quantity,
        ps.ps_supplycost AS supply_cost,
        ps.ps_comment AS part_supplier_comment
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
),
CustomerOrder AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_name AS customer_name,
        o.o_orderkey AS order_key,
        o.o_totalprice AS total_price,
        o.o_orderdate AS order_date,
        o.o_orderpriority AS order_priority,
        CONCAT(c.c_address, ', NationKey: ', c.c_nationkey) AS customer_info
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
),
JoinResult AS (
    SELECT 
        sp.supplier_name,
        sp.part_name,
        sp.supplier_info,
        co.customer_name,
        co.order_key,
        co.total_price,
        co.order_date,
        co.order_priority,
        sp.available_quantity,
        sp.supply_cost,
        sp.part_supplier_comment
    FROM 
        SupplierPart sp
    LEFT JOIN 
        lineitem l ON sp.part_name LIKE '%' || l.l_orderkey || '%'
    LEFT JOIN 
        CustomerOrder co ON l.l_orderkey = co.order_key
)
SELECT 
    supplier_name,
    part_name,
    supplier_info,
    customer_name,
    order_key,
    total_price,
    order_date,
    order_priority,
    available_quantity,
    supply_cost,
    CONCAT(part_supplier_comment, ' | Processed on: ', CURRENT_DATE) AS processed_comment
FROM 
    JoinResult
WHERE 
    available_quantity > 0
ORDER BY 
    total_price DESC, order_date DESC
LIMIT 100
sql2:
SELECT 
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    p.p_name AS part_name,
    CONCAT(s.s_address, ', NationKey: ', s.s_nationkey) AS supplier_info,
    c.c_name AS customer_name,
    o.o_orderkey AS order_key,
    o.o_totalprice AS total_price,
    o.o_orderdate AS order_date,
    o.o_orderpriority AS order_priority,
    ps.ps_availqty AS available_quantity,
    ps.ps_supplycost AS supply_cost,
    CONCAT(ps.ps_comment, ' | Processed on: ', CURRENT_DATE) AS processed_comment
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_name LIKE '%' || l.l_orderkey || '%'
LEFT JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
LEFT JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE 
    ps.ps_availqty > 0
ORDER BY 
    o.o_totalprice DESC, o.o_orderdate DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS TotalSupplyCost,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY ps.ps_partkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS SupplierRank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, ps.ps_partkey
), 
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS TotalRevenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS LineCount
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
), 
CustomerAggregates AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        AVG(o.TotalRevenue) AS AvgRevenue,
        SUM(o.LineCount) AS TotalLineCount,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(o.TotalRevenue) DESC) AS CustomerRank
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        RecentOrders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
)
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    rs.s_name,
    ca.c_name,
    ca.AvgRevenue,
    rs.TotalSupplyCost,
    COALESCE(rs.SupplierRank, 0) AS SupplierRank,
    COALESCE(ca.CustomerRank, 0) AS CustomerRank
FROM 
    part p
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSuppliers rs ON p.p_partkey = rs.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    CustomerAggregates ca ON ca.c_custkey = (
        SELECT c.c_custkey 
        FROM customer c 
        WHERE c.c_nationkey = (
            SELECT n.n_nationkey 
            FROM nation n 
            WHERE n.n_name = 'USA'
        )
        LIMIT 1
    )
WHERE 
    p.p_size = (
        SELECT MAX(p2.p_size) 
        FROM part p2 
        WHERE p2.p_type = p.p_type
    )
ORDER BY 
    p.p_partkey, rs.TotalSupplyCost DESC, ca.AvgRevenue DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    rs.s_name,
    ca.c_name,
    ca.AvgRevenue,
    rs.TotalSupplyCost,
    COALESCE(rs.SupplierRank, 0) AS SupplierRank,
    COALESCE(ca.CustomerRank, 0) AS CustomerRank
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    (SELECT p2.p_type, MAX(p2.p_size) AS max_size FROM part p2 GROUP BY p2.p_type) pmax
    ON p.p_type = pmax.p_type AND p.p_size = pmax.max_size
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            ps.ps_partkey,
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS TotalSupplyCost,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY ps.ps_partkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS SupplierRank
        FROM 
            supplier s
        JOIN 
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY 
            s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, ps.ps_partkey
    ) rs ON p.p_partkey = rs.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            AVG(ro.TotalRevenue) AS AvgRevenue,
            SUM(ro.LineCount) AS TotalLineCount,
            RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(ro.TotalRevenue) DESC) AS CustomerRank
        FROM 
            customer c
        JOIN 
            (
                SELECT 
                    o.o_orderkey,
                    o.o_custkey,
                    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS TotalRevenue,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS LineCount
                FROM 
                    orders o
                JOIN 
                    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
                WHERE 
                    o.o_orderdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
                GROUP BY 
                    o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
            ) ro ON c.c_custkey = ro.o_custkey
        GROUP BY 
            c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    ) ca ON ca.c_custkey = (
        SELECT c.c_custkey 
        FROM customer c 
        JOIN nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        WHERE n.n_name = 'USA'
        LIMIT 1
    )
ORDER BY 
    p.p_partkey, rs.TotalSupplyCost DESC, ca.AvgRevenue DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_comment, 
        SUBSTRING(s.s_name, 1, 10) AS short_name,
        CHAR_LENGTH(s.s_comment) AS comment_length,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        supplier s
),
FilteredOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_orderdate, 
        o.o_totalprice, 
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'F' 
        AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '2022-01-01' AND CURRENT_DATE 
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice
),
PartSupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey, 
        p.p_name, 
        ps.ps_availqty, 
        ps.ps_supplycost,
        CONCAT(p.p_name, ' - ', p.p_comment) AS part_info
    FROM 
        part p
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    WHERE 
        p.p_size > 10 
)
SELECT 
    rs.short_name AS supplier_short_name,
    rs.comment_length, 
    fo.o_orderkey, 
    fo.o_orderdate, 
    fo.o_totalprice, 
    ps.part_info
FROM 
    RankedSuppliers rs
JOIN 
    FilteredOrders fo ON rs.rank <= 5
JOIN 
    PartSupplierDetails ps ON ps.ps_supplycost < fo.o_totalprice
WHERE 
    rs.s_comment LIKE '%high priority%'
ORDER BY 
    fo.o_orderdate DESC, 
    rs.comment_length DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    SUBSTRING(s.s_name, 1, 10) AS supplier_short_name,
    CHAR_LENGTH(s.s_comment) AS comment_length,
    fo.o_orderkey,
    fo.o_orderdate,
    fo.o_totalprice,
    CONCAT(p.p_name, ' - ', p.p_comment) AS part_info
FROM
    supplier s
JOIN (
    SELECT
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity
    FROM
        orders o
    JOIN
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE
        o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
        AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '2022-01-01' AND CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice
) fo ON ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) <= 5
JOIN
    part p ON p.p_size > 10
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
        AND ps.ps_supplycost < fo.o_totalprice
WHERE
    s.s_comment LIKE '%high priority%'
ORDER BY
    fo.o_orderdate DESC,
    CHAR_LENGTH(s.s_comment) DESC

sql1:
WITH SupplierAvailability AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_qty,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderdate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_custkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS rn
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
),
CustomerOrderSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ro.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        SUM(ro.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM customer c
    LEFT JOIN RecentOrders ro ON c.c_custkey = ro.o_custkey
    GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
)
SELECT 
    c.c_name,
    COALESCE(c.total_orders, 0) AS total_orders,
    COALESCE(c.total_spent, 0) AS total_spent,
    COUNT(DISTINCT pa.p_partkey) AS distinct_parts_supplied,
    SUM(s.total_available_qty) AS total_available_qty,
    AVG(s.avg_supply_cost) AS avg_supply_cost
FROM CustomerOrderSummary c
