WITH RecursiveSupplierCTE AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey, s_name, s_nationkey, s_acctbal, 1 AS level
    FROM supplier
    WHERE s_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(s_acctbal) FROM supplier)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey, s.s_acctbal, r.level + 1
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN RecursiveSupplierCTE r ON s.s_nationkey = r.s_nationkey
    WHERE r.level < 3
),
AggLineItems AS (
    SELECT l.l_orderkey, 
           SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
           COUNT(*) AS item_count,
           AVG(l.l_tax) AS avg_tax
    FROM lineitem l 
    WHERE l.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
    GROUP BY l.l_orderkey
),
NationSummary AS (
    SELECT n.n_nationkey, 
           COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
           SUM(s.s_acctbal) AS total_acctbal
    FROM nation n
    LEFT JOIN supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    GROUP BY n.n_nationkey
),
FilteredOrders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, 
           o.o_orderstatus,
           o.o_totalprice,
           o.o_orderdate,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS status_rank
    FROM orders o
)
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    p.p_mfgr,
    p.p_retailprice,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    ns.supplier_count,
    ns.total_acctbal,
    SUM(ali.total_revenue) AS total_order_revenue,
    AVG(ali.avg_tax) AS avg_lineitem_tax,
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT fo.o_orderkey) > 0 THEN 'Has Orders'
        ELSE 'No Orders'
    END AS order_status
FROM part p
JOIN region r ON r.r_regionkey = (SELECT n.n_regionkey FROM nation n WHERE n.n_nationkey = (SELECT MIN(s_nationkey) FROM supplier WHERE s_suppkey = ANY(SELECT s_suppkey FROM RecursiveSupplierCTE)))
LEFT JOIN NationSummary ns ON ns.n_nationkey = (SELECT MIN(s_nationkey) FROM supplier WHERE s_suppkey = ANY(SELECT s_suppkey FROM RecursiveSupplierCTE))
LEFT JOIN AggLineItems ali ON ali.l_orderkey = (SELECT o.o_orderkey FROM FilteredOrders o WHERE o.status_rank = 1 AND o.o_orderkey NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT o.o_orderkey FROM orders o WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'F'))
LEFT JOIN FilteredOrders fo ON fo.o_orderkey = ali.l_orderkey
GROUP BY p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_mfgr, p.p_retailprice, r.r_name, ns.supplier_count, ns.total_acctbal
ORDER BY total_order_revenue DESC, p.p_partkey
sql2:
WITH RecursiveSupplierCTE AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey, s_name, s_nationkey, s_acctbal, 1 AS level
    FROM supplier
    WHERE s_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(s_acctbal) FROM supplier)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey, s.s_acctbal, r.level + 1
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN RecursiveSupplierCTE r ON s.s_nationkey = r.s_nationkey
    WHERE r.level < 3
),
TargetNation AS (
    SELECT MIN(s_nationkey) AS n_key
    FROM supplier
    WHERE s_suppkey IN (SELECT s_suppkey FROM RecursiveSupplierCTE)
),
TargetOrder AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey
    FROM orders o
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM orders o2 WHERE o2.o_orderstatus = 'F' AND o2.o_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    )
    AND o.o_orderkey = (
        SELECT o3.o_orderkey
        FROM orders o3
        WHERE ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o3.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o3.o_totalprice DESC) = 1
        LIMIT 1
    )
)
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    p.p_mfgr,
    p.p_retailprice,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    ns.supplier_count,
    ns.total_acctbal,
    SUM(ali.total_revenue) AS total_order_revenue,
    AVG(ali.avg_tax) AS avg_lineitem_tax,
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT fo.o_orderkey) > 0 THEN 'Has Orders'
        ELSE 'No Orders'
    END AS order_status
FROM part p
INNER JOIN TargetNation tn ON 1=1
INNER JOIN nation n2 ON n2.n_nationkey = tn.n_key
INNER JOIN region r ON r.r_regionkey = n2.n_regionkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT n.n_nationkey, 
           COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
           SUM(s.s_acctbal) AS total_acctbal
    FROM nation n
    LEFT JOIN supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    GROUP BY n.n_nationkey
) ns ON ns.n_nationkey = tn.n_key
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT l.l_orderkey, 
           SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
           COUNT(*) AS item_count,
           AVG(l.l_tax) AS avg_tax
    FROM lineitem l 
    WHERE l.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
    GROUP BY l.l_orderkey
) ali ON ali.l_orderkey = (
    SELECT sub_o.o_orderkey
    FROM (
        SELECT o.o_orderkey, 
               o.o_orderstatus,
               o.o_totalprice,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS status_rank
        FROM orders o
    ) sub_o
    WHERE sub_o.status_rank = 1
      AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM orders ox WHERE ox.o_orderstatus = 'F' AND ox.o_orderkey = sub_o.o_orderkey
      )
)
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, 
           o.o_orderstatus,
           o.o_totalprice,
           o.o_orderdate,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS status_rank
    FROM orders o
) fo ON fo.o_orderkey = ali.l_orderkey
GROUP BY p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_mfgr, p.p_retailprice, r.r_name, ns.supplier_count, ns.total_acctbal
ORDER BY total_order_revenue DESC, p.p_partkey

sql1:
WITH regional_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        n.n_name AS nation_name,
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM 
        region r
    JOIN 
        nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN 
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31'
    GROUP BY 
        n.n_name, r.r_name
),
ranked_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        nation_name,
        region_name,
        total_sales,
        order_count,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM 
        regional_sales
)

SELECT 
    rs.nation_name,
    rs.region_name,
    rs.total_sales,
    rs.order_count,
    CASE 
        WHEN rs.sales_rank = 1 THEN 'Highest Sales'
        ELSE NULL
    END AS sales_rank_comment
FROM 
    ranked_sales rs
WHERE 
    rs.total_sales > (
        SELECT 
            AVG(total_sales) 
        FROM 
            ranked_sales
    )
ORDER BY 
    rs.region_name, rs.total_sales DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.nation_name,
    sub.region_name,
    sub.total_sales,
    sub.order_count,
    CASE
        WHEN sub.sales_rank = 1 THEN 'Highest Sales'
        ELSE NULL
    END AS sales_rank_comment
FROM (
    SELECT
        rs.nation_name,
        rs.region_name,
        rs.total_sales,
        rs.order_count,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY rs.region_name ORDER BY rs.total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM (
        SELECT
            n.n_name AS nation_name,
            r.r_name AS region_name,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
            COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
        FROM
            nation n
        JOIN region r ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
        JOIN supplier s ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        JOIN partsupp ps ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        JOIN lineitem l ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
        JOIN orders o ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        JOIN part p ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
        WHERE
            o.o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate <= '2023-12-31'
        GROUP BY
            n.n_name, r.r_name
    ) rs
) sub
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT
        AVG(rs2.total_sales) AS avg_sales
    FROM (
        SELECT
            n.n_name AS nation_name,
            r.r_name AS region_name,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
        FROM
            nation n
        JOIN region r ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
        JOIN supplier s ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        JOIN partsupp ps ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        JOIN lineitem l ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
        JOIN orders o ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        JOIN part p ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
        WHERE
            o.o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate <= '2023-12-31'
        GROUP BY
            n.n_name, r.r_name
    ) rs2
) avg_tbl
WHERE
    sub.total_sales > avg_tbl.avg_sales
ORDER BY
    sub.region_name, sub.total_sales DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedSales AS (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey,
        l.l_partkey,
        l.l_suppkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY l.l_partkey ORDER BY SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM 
        lineitem l
    JOIN 
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2022-01-01' AND 
        o.o_orderdate < DATE '2023-01-01'
    GROUP BY 
        l.l_orderkey, l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey
), TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(s2.s_acctbal) FROM supplier s2 WHERE s2.s_comment IS NOT NULL)
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
)
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    COALESCE(r.total_sales, 0) AS total_sales_2022,
    ts.total_supply_cost,
    r.sales_rank
FROM 
    part p
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSales r ON p.p_partkey = r.l_partkey AND r.sales_rank = 1
INNER JOIN 
    TopSuppliers ts ON ts.s_suppkey = r.l_suppkey
WHERE 
    p.p_size BETWEEN 1 AND 50
    AND p.p_retailprice IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    total_sales_2022 DESC, 
    ts.total_supply_cost ASC 
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    COALESCE(r.total_sales, 0) AS total_sales_2022,
    ts.total_supply_cost,
    r.sales_rank
FROM 
    part p
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey,
        l.l_partkey,
        l.l_suppkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY l.l_partkey ORDER BY SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM 
        lineitem l
    WHERE 
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM orders o 
            WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey 
              AND o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2022-01-01' 
              AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '2023-01-01'
        )
    GROUP BY 
        l.l_orderkey, l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey
) r ON p.p_partkey = r.l_partkey AND r.sales_rank = 1
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT AVG(s2.s_acctbal) AS avg_acctbal 
        FROM supplier s2 
        WHERE s2.s_comment IS NOT NULL
    ) avg_s
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal > avg_s.avg_acctbal
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
) ts ON ts.s_suppkey = r.l_suppkey
WHERE 
    p.p_size BETWEEN 1 AND 50
    AND p.p_retailprice IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    total_sales_2022 DESC, 
    ts.total_supply_cost ASC 
LIMIT 10

    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_totalprice,
        SUM(l.l_discount * l.l_extendedprice) AS total_discounted_price,
        AVG(l.l_quantity) AS avg_quantity
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice
),
CustomerOrderSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
        MAX(CASE WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN o.o_totalprice ELSE NULL END) AS max_final_order_price
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    WHERE 
        c.c_acctbal > 0
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
)
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    COALESCE(s.s_name, 'No Supplier') AS supplier_name,
    COALESCE(cs.order_count, 0) AS total_orders,
    COALESCE(cs.total_spent, 0.00) AS total_spent,
    cs.max_final_order_price,
    p.p_retailprice * 1.1 AS adjusted_retail_price,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count
FROM 
    part p
LEFT JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSuppliers s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey AND s.supplier_rank <= 3
LEFT JOIN 
    OrderInfo o ON ps.ps_partkey = o.o_orderkey
LEFT JOIN 
    CustomerOrderSummary cs ON cs.customer_order_summary = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    (p.p_size > 10 AND p.p_type LIKE '%brass%') OR (p.p_container IS NULL)
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name, cs.order_count, cs.total_spent, cs.max_final_order_price
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) > 0
ORDER BY 
    adjusted_retail_price DESC, total_orders ASC
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.p_partkey,
    sub.p_name,
    sub.supplier_name,
    COALESCE(sub.order_count, 0) AS total_orders,
    COALESCE(sub.total_spent, 0.00) AS total_spent,
    sub.max_final_order_price,
    sub.adjusted_retail_price,
    sub.supplier_count
FROM (
    SELECT
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        COALESCE(s.s_name, 'No Supplier') AS supplier_name,
        cs.order_count,
        cs.total_spent,
        cs.max_final_order_price,
        p.p_retailprice * 1.1 AS adjusted_retail_price,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count
    FROM
        part p
    LEFT JOIN
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            s.s_acctbal,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS supplier_rank
        FROM
            supplier s
    ) s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey AND s.supplier_rank <= 3
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_totalprice,
            SUM(l.l_discount * l.l_extendedprice) AS total_discounted_price,
            AVG(l.l_quantity) AS avg_quantity
        FROM
            orders o
        JOIN
            lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE
            o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
        GROUP BY
            o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice
    ) o ON ps.ps_partkey = o.o_orderkey
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
            SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
            MAX(CASE WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN o.o_totalprice ELSE NULL END) AS max_final_order_price
        FROM
            customer c
        LEFT JOIN
            orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
        WHERE
            c.c_acctbal > 0
        GROUP BY
            c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    ) cs ON cs.customer_order_summary = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE
        (p.p_size > 10 AND p.p_type LIKE '%brass%') OR (p.p_container IS NULL)
    GROUP BY
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name, cs.order_count, cs.total_spent, cs.max_final_order_price
) sub
WHERE
    sub.supplier_count > 0
ORDER BY
    sub.adjusted_retail_price DESC, sub.total_orders ASC

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01' AND
        o.o_orderstatus IN ('O', 'F')
),
AggregatedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS part_count
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal > 10000.00
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_suppkey
),
CustomerOrderSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        AVG(o.o_totalprice) AS avg_order_value
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    HAVING 
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) > 5
)

SELECT 
    n.n_name,
    r.r_name,
    COALESCE(SUM(a.total_supply_value), 0) AS total_supply_value,
    COALESCE(SUM(cos.total_orders), 0) AS total_orders,
    COALESCE(AVG(cos.avg_order_value), 0) AS avg_order_value
FROM 
    nation n
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
LEFT JOIN 
    AggregatedSuppliers a ON n.n_nationkey = a.ps_suppkey
LEFT JOIN 
    CustomerOrderSummary cos ON n.n_nationkey = cos.c_custkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name LIKE 'Europe%' AND 
    n.n_comment IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY 
    total_supply_value DESC, total_orders DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT 
    n.n_name,
    r.r_name,
    COALESCE(SUM(a.total_supply_value), 0) AS total_supply_value,
    COALESCE(SUM(cos.total_orders), 0) AS total_orders,
    COALESCE(AVG(cos.avg_order_value), 0) AS avg_order_value
FROM 
    nation n
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS part_count
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    WHERE 
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM supplier s 
            WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey AND s.s_acctbal > 10000.00
        )
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_suppkey
) a ON n.n_nationkey = a.ps_suppkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        cnt.total_orders,
        cnt.avg_order_value
    FROM

        SELECT 
            o.o_custkey,
            COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
            AVG(o.o_totalprice) AS avg_order_value
        FROM 
            orders o
        GROUP BY 
            o.o_custkey
        HAVING 
            COUNT(o.o_orderkey) > 5
    ) cnt ON c.c_custkey = cnt.o_custkey
) cos ON n.n_nationkey = cos.c_custkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name LIKE 'Europe%' AND 
    n.n_comment IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name, r.r_name
