        s.s_acctbal,
        n.n_name AS nation_name,
        r.r_name AS region_name
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
),
PartSupply AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM partsupp ps
    GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
),
OrderDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_order_value,
        l.l_returnflag,
        l.l_linestatus
    FROM orders o
    JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE l.l_shipdate <= '2023-10-31'
    GROUP BY o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, l.l_returnflag, l.l_linestatus
)
SELECT 
    pd.p_partkey,
    pd.p_name,
    sd.nation_name,
    sd.region_name,
    sd.s_acctbal,
    SUM(od.total_order_value) AS total_value,
    ps.total_available_quantity,
    ps.total_supply_cost
FROM part pd
JOIN PartSupply ps ON pd.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN SupplierDetails sd ON ps.ps_suppkey = sd.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN OrderDetails od ON od.o_orderkey IN (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey 
    FROM orders o 
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >=  DATEADD(MONTH, -3, CURRENT_DATE)
)
GROUP BY 
    pd.p_partkey, 
    pd.p_name, 
    sd.nation_name, 
    sd.region_name, 
    sd.s_acctbal,
    ps.total_available_quantity,
    ps.total_supply_cost
ORDER BY total_value DESC, sd.s_acctbal DESC
LIMIT 100
sql2:
SELECT 
    pd.p_partkey,
    pd.p_name,
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    s.s_acctbal,
    SUM(od.total_order_value) AS total_value,
    ps.total_available_quantity,
    ps.total_supply_cost
FROM part pd
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        ps_partkey,
        ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
        SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM partsupp
    GROUP BY ps_partkey, ps_suppkey
) ps ON pd.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_order_value,
        l.l_returnflag,
        l.l_linestatus
    FROM orders o
    JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE l.l_shipdate <= '2023-10-31'
    GROUP BY o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, l.l_returnflag, l.l_linestatus
) od ON EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM orders o 
    WHERE o.o_orderkey = od.o_orderkey 
      AND o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(MONTH, -3, CURRENT_DATE)
)
GROUP BY 
    pd.p_partkey, 
    pd.p_name, 
    n.n_name, 
    r.r_name, 
    s.s_acctbal,
    ps.total_available_quantity,
    ps.total_supply_cost
ORDER BY total_value DESC, s.s_acctbal DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        n.n_name AS nation_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY n.n_regionkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rank_within_region
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, n.n_name, n.n_regionkey
),
HighValueSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        r.r_regionkey,
        SUM(total_supply_cost) AS total_cost_by_region
    FROM 
        RankedSuppliers rs
    JOIN 
        region r ON r.r_regionkey = (SELECT n.n_regionkey FROM nation n WHERE n.n_nationkey = rs.n_nationkey)
    WHERE 
        rs.rank_within_region <= 10
    GROUP BY 
        r.r_name, r.r_regionkey
)
SELECT 
    h.region_name,
    h.total_cost_by_region,
    COALESCE((
        SELECT 
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) 
        FROM 
            customer c 
        JOIN 
            orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey 
        WHERE 
            o.o_orderstatus = 'O' AND 
            o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    ), 0) AS active_customers_last_year
FROM 
    HighValueSuppliers h
ORDER BY 
    h.total_cost_by_region DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    SUM(ranked.total_supply_cost) AS total_cost_by_region,
    COALESCE(ac.active_customers_last_year, 0) AS active_customers_last_year
FROM (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        n.n_name AS nation_name,
        n.n_regionkey,
        n.n_nationkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY n.n_regionkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rank_within_region
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, n.n_name, n.n_regionkey, n.n_nationkey
) ranked
JOIN 
    region r ON r.r_regionkey = (SELECT n2.n_regionkey FROM nation n2 WHERE n2.n_nationkey = ranked.n_nationkey)
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS active_customers_last_year
    FROM 
        customer c 
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey 
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'O' AND 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
) ac
WHERE 
    ranked.rank_within_region <= 10
GROUP BY 
    r.r_name, r.r_regionkey, ac.active_customers_last_year
ORDER BY 
    total_cost_by_region DESC

sql1:
WITH ranked_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) as order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
),
customer_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
),
high_value_part AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        MAX(ps.ps_supplycost) AS max_supplycost,
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_partkey
    HAVING 
        MAX(ps.ps_supplycost) > (SELECT AVG(ps_supplycost) FROM partsupp)
)
SELECT 
    r.o_orderdate,
    co.c_name,
    hp.ps_partkey,
    hp.total_quantity_sold,
    COALESCE(co.total_spent, 0) AS total_spent,
    CASE 
        WHEN r.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN 'Finished'
        WHEN r.o_orderstatus = 'P' THEN 'Pending'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END AS order_status_description
FROM 
    ranked_orders r
JOIN 
    customer_orders co ON r.o_orderkey = (SELECT MAX(o.o_orderkey) FROM orders o WHERE o.o_custkey = co.c_custkey)
LEFT JOIN 
    high_value_part hp ON hp.total_quantity_sold > 1000
WHERE 
    r.order_rank = 1
ORDER BY 
    r.o_orderdate DESC, co.total_spent DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    r.o_orderdate,
    co.c_name,
    hp.ps_partkey,
    hp.total_quantity_sold,
    COALESCE(co.total_spent, 0) AS total_spent,
    CASE 
        WHEN r.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN 'Finished'
        WHEN r.o_orderstatus = 'P' THEN 'Pending'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END AS order_status_description
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice, o.o_orderstatus,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
        FROM orders o
        WHERE o.o_orderdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    ) r
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
        FROM customer c
        LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
        GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    ) co ON r.o_orderkey = (SELECT MAX(o.o_orderkey) FROM orders o WHERE o.o_custkey = co.c_custkey)
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT agg.ps_partkey, agg.max_supplycost, agg.total_quantity_sold
        FROM (
            SELECT ps.ps_partkey, MAX(ps.ps_supplycost) AS max_supplycost, SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
            FROM partsupp ps
            JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
            GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey
        ) agg
        WHERE agg.max_supplycost > (SELECT AVG(ps_supplycost) FROM partsupp)
    ) hp ON hp.total_quantity_sold > 1000
WHERE 
    r.order_rank = 1
ORDER BY 
    r.o_orderdate DESC, co.total_spent DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_partkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS supplier_rank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, p.p_partkey
),
CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
),
SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        n.n_name AS nation_name,
        s.s_name AS supplier_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        rs.total_cost,
        rs.supplier_rank
    FROM 
        region r
    JOIN 
        nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    JOIN 
        RankedSuppliers rs ON s.s_suppkey = rs.s_suppkey
)
SELECT 
    cd.c_name AS customer_name,
    cd.total_orders,
    cd.total_spent,
    sd.region_name,
    sd.nation_name,
    sd.supplier_name,
    sd.s_acctbal,
    sd.total_cost,
    sd.supplier_rank
FROM 
    CustomerOrders cd
JOIN 
    SupplierDetails sd ON cd.total_orders > 5 AND sd.supplier_rank = 1
ORDER BY 
    cd.total_spent DESC, sd.total_cost DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT
    co.c_name AS customer_name,
    co.total_orders,
    co.total_spent,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    s.s_acctbal,
    rs.total_cost,
    rs.supplier_rank
FROM
    (SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name,
            COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
            SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
     FROM customer c
     JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
     WHERE o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
     GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
     HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) > 5
    ) co
JOIN
    (SELECT s2.s_suppkey, s2.s_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_partkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS supplier_rank
     FROM supplier s2
     JOIN partsupp ps ON s2.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
     JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
     GROUP BY s2.s_suppkey, s2.s_name, p.p_partkey
    ) rs ON rs.supplier_rank = 1
JOIN supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = rs.s_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
JOIN region r ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
ORDER BY
    co.total_spent DESC, rs.total_cost DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        o.o_totalprice,
        c.c_name,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_nationkey ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
),
SupplierPartDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        s.s_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supplycost
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_partkey, s.s_suppkey
),
FilteredLineItems AS (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey,
        l.l_partkey,
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_extendedprice
    FROM 
        lineitem l
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30' DAY 
    GROUP BY 
        l.l_orderkey, l.l_partkey
),
FinalResult AS (
    SELECT 
        r.order_key,
        pp.p_name,
        pp.p_brand,
        pp.p_retailprice,
        li.total_quantity,
        li.avg_extendedprice,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.o_orderkey ORDER BY pp.p_retailprice DESC) AS product_rank
    FROM 
        RankedOrders r
    LEFT JOIN 
        FilteredLineItems li ON r.o_orderkey = li.l_orderkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        part pp ON li.l_partkey = pp.p_partkey
)
SELECT 
    r.o_orderkey,
    r.o_orderdate,
    r.c_name,
    COALESCE(r.p_name, 'Unknown Part') AS part_name,
    COALESCE(r.total_quantity, 0) AS total_quantity,
    COALESCE(r.avg_extendedprice, 0.00) AS avg_extendedprice,
    CASE 
        WHEN r.order_rank <= 5 THEN 'Top 5 Order'
        ELSE 'Other Orders'
    END AS order_priority
FROM 
    FinalResult r
WHERE 
    r.product_rank <= 3
ORDER BY 
    r.o_orderdate DESC, 
    r.o_orderkey
sql2:
SELECT 
    fr.o_orderkey,
    fr.o_orderdate,
    fr.c_name,
    COALESCE(fr.p_name, 'Unknown Part') AS part_name,
    COALESCE(fr.total_quantity, 0) AS total_quantity,
    COALESCE(fr.avg_extendedprice, 0.00) AS avg_extendedprice,
    CASE 
        WHEN fr.order_rank <= 5 THEN 'Top 5 Order'
        ELSE 'Other Orders'
    END AS order_priority
FROM (
    SELECT 
        ro.o_orderkey,
        ro.o_orderdate,
        ro.c_name,
        ro.order_rank,
        pp.p_name,
        pp.p_brand,
        pp.p_retailprice,
        li.total_quantity,
        li.avg_extendedprice,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ro.o_orderkey ORDER BY pp.p_retailprice DESC) AS product_rank
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_orderdate,
            o.o_totalprice,
            c.c_name,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_nationkey ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
        FROM 
            orders o
        JOIN 
            customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        WHERE 
            o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
    ) ro
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT 
            l.l_orderkey,
            l.l_partkey,
            SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
            AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_extendedprice
        FROM 
            lineitem l
        WHERE 
            l.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30' DAY
        GROUP BY 
            l.l_orderkey, l.l_partkey
    ) li ON ro.o_orderkey = li.l_orderkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        part pp ON li.l_partkey = pp.p_partkey
) fr
WHERE 
    fr.product_rank <= 3
ORDER BY 
    fr.o_orderdate DESC,
    fr.o_orderkey

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_acctbal, 
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS supplier_rank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_acctbal
    FROM 
        RankedSuppliers s
    WHERE 
        supplier_rank <= 10
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_custkey, 
        o.o_totalprice, 
        o.o_orderdate
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, CURRENT_DATE)
)
SELECT 
    rs.s_name, 
    rs.s_acctbal, 
    COUNT(ro.o_orderkey) AS order_count, 
    SUM(ro.o_totalprice) AS total_order_value
FROM 
    TopSuppliers rs
LEFT JOIN 
    lineitem li ON li.l_suppkey = rs.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN 
    RecentOrders ro ON li.l_orderkey = ro.o_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    rs.s_suppkey, rs.s_name, rs.s_acctbal
ORDER BY 
    total_order_value DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    ts.s_name,
    ts.s_acctbal,
    COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
    SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_order_value
FROM
    (
        SELECT s_suppkey, s_name, s_acctbal
        FROM (
            SELECT
                s.s_suppkey,
                s.s_name,
                s.s_acctbal,
                RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS supplier_rank
            FROM
                supplier s
            JOIN
                partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
            GROUP BY
                s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal
        ) ranked
        WHERE supplier_rank <= 10
    ) ts
LEFT JOIN
    lineitem li ON li.l_suppkey = ts.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN
    orders o ON li.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
              AND o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY
    ts.s_suppkey, ts.s_name, ts.s_acctbal
ORDER BY
    total_order_value DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        c.c_name,
        s.s_name AS supplier_name,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderkey ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    WHERE 
        YEAR(o.o_orderdate) = 2023
),
TopOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.c_name,
        o.supplier_name
    FROM 
        RankedOrders o
    WHERE 
        o.order_rank <= 5
)

SELECT 
    t.o_orderkey,
    t.o_orderdate,
    t.c_name AS customer_name,
    t.supplier_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) * l.l_tax) AS total_tax_collected
FROM 
    TopOrders t
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON t.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    t.o_orderkey, t.o_orderdate, t.c_name, t.supplier_name
ORDER BY 
    t.o_orderdate DESC, total_revenue DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    t.o_orderkey,
    t.o_orderdate,
    t.c_name AS customer_name,
    t.supplier_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) * l.l_tax) AS total_tax_collected
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            r.o_orderkey,
            r.o_orderdate,

                    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderkey ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
                FROM 
                    orders o
                JOIN 
                    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
                JOIN 
                    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
                JOIN 
                    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
                JOIN 
                    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
                WHERE 
                    o.o_orderdate >= '2023-01-01'
                    AND o.o_orderdate < '2024-01-01'
            ) r
        WHERE 
            r.order_rank <= 5
    ) t
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON t.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    t.o_orderkey, t.o_orderdate, t.c_name, t.supplier_name

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_orderstatus, 
        o.o_totalprice, 
        o.o_orderdate, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o 
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months'
),
SupplierParts AS (

    FROM 
        partsupp ps 
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey 
    WHERE

),
CustomerRegion AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey, 
        n.n_name AS nation_name, 
        r.r_name AS region_name, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM 
        customer c 
    JOIN 
        nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey 
    JOIN 
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey 
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey 
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, 
        n.n_name, 
        r.r_name
),
PartSupplierMax AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey, 
        MAX(ps.ps_supplycost) AS max_supply_cost
    FROM 
        partsupp ps 
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_partkey
)

SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    p.p_retailprice, 
    r.total_avail_qty, 
    r.min_supply_cost, 
    MAX(s.max_supply_cost) AS overall_max_cost,
    cr.region_name,
    cr.order_count
FROM 
    part p
LEFT JOIN 
    SupplierParts r ON p.p_partkey = r.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    PartSupplierMax s ON p.p_partkey = s.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    CustomerRegion cr ON cr.order_count > 0
WHERE 
    COALESCE(r.total_avail_qty, 0) > 0 
    AND p.p_retailprice > (SELECT AVG(p2.p_retailprice) FROM part p2) 
    OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM lineitem l
        WHERE l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey 
        AND l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    )
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    p.p_retailprice, 
    r.total_avail_qty, 
    r.min_supply_cost, 
    cr.region_name, 
    cr.order_count
ORDER BY 
    p.p_partkey
sql2:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    p.p_retailprice, 
    r.total_avail_qty, 
    r.min_supply_cost, 
    MAX(s.max_supply_cost) AS overall_max_cost,
    cr.region_name,
    cr.order_count
FROM 
    part p
CROSS JOIN 
    (SELECT AVG(p2.p_retailprice) AS avg_price FROM part p2) pavg
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            ps.ps_partkey, 
            ps.ps_suppkey, 
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_avail_qty, 
            MIN(ps.ps_supplycost) AS min_supply_cost
        FROM 
            partsupp ps 
        WHERE 
            ps.ps_suppkey IN (SELECT s.s_suppkey FROM supplier s WHERE s.s_acctbal > 1000)
        GROUP BY 
            ps.ps_partkey, 
            ps.ps_suppkey
    ) r ON p.p_partkey = r.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            ps.ps_partkey, 
            MAX(ps.ps_supplycost) AS max_supply_cost
        FROM 
            partsupp ps 
        GROUP BY 
            ps.ps_partkey
    ) s ON p.p_partkey = s.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            c.c_custkey, 
            n.n_name AS nation_name, 
            r.r_name AS region_name, 
            COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
        FROM 
            customer c 
        JOIN 
            nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey 
        JOIN 
            region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey 
        LEFT JOIN 
            orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey 
        GROUP BY 
            c.c_custkey, 
            n.n_name, 
            r.r_name
    ) cr ON cr.order_count > 0
WHERE 
    COALESCE(r.total_avail_qty, 0) > 0 
    AND p.p_retailprice > pavg.avg_price
    OR p.p_partkey IN (
        SELECT l.l_partkey
        FROM lineitem l
        WHERE l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    )
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    p.p_retailprice, 
    r.total_avail_qty, 
    r.min_supply_cost, 
    cr.region_name, 
    cr.order_count
ORDER BY 
    p.p_partkey

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS rank
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
),
HighValueLines AS (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
    GROUP BY l.l_orderkey
),
SupplierPartData AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        ps.ps_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_retailprice,
        ps.ps_availqty,
        (ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    WHERE s.s_acctbal > 1000.00
),
FilteredCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        c.c_acctbal,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY c.c_acctbal DESC) AS customer_rank
    FROM customer c
    WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
)
SELECT 
    r.o_orderkey,
    r.o_orderdate,
    r.o_totalprice,
    COALESCE(hv.total_revenue, 0) AS total_revenue,
    COALESCE(s.total_cost, 0) AS total_cost,
    f.c_name,
    f.c_acctbal
FROM RankedOrders r
LEFT JOIN HighValueLines hv ON r.o_orderkey = hv.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN SupplierPartData s ON s.ps_partkey = (SELECT ps.ps_partkey FROM partsupp ps WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey LIMIT 1)
JOIN FilteredCustomers f ON r.o_orderkey = f.c_custkey
WHERE r.rank <= 10
AND r.o_totalprice > (SELECT AVG(o_totalprice) FROM orders)
ORDER BY r.o_orderdate DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    r.o_orderkey,
    r.o_orderdate,
    r.o_totalprice,
    COALESCE(hv.total_revenue, 0) AS total_revenue,
    COALESCE(s.total_cost, 0) AS total_cost,
    f.c_name,
    f.c_acctbal
FROM (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS rank
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01'
) r
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
    GROUP BY l.l_orderkey
) hv ON r.o_orderkey = hv.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        ps.ps_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_retailprice,
        ps.ps_availqty,
        (ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    WHERE s.s_acctbal > 1000.00
) s ON s.ps_partkey = (SELECT ps.ps_partkey FROM partsupp ps WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey LIMIT 1)
CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(o_totalprice) AS avg_price FROM orders) oa
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        c.c_acctbal,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY c.c_acctbal DESC) AS customer_rank
    FROM customer c
    WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
) f ON r.o_orderkey = f.c_custkey
WHERE r.rank <= 10
AND r.o_totalprice > oa.avg_price
ORDER BY r.o_orderdate DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY ps.ps_partkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
), 
HighValueCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        c.c_acctbal,
        CASE 
            WHEN c.c_acctbal > 1000 THEN 'High'
            WHEN c.c_acctbal > 500 THEN 'Medium'
            ELSE 'Low' 
        END AS customer_value
    FROM 
        customer c
), 
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_order_value
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 days'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate
)

SELECT 
    n.n_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS customer_count,
    SUM(COALESCE(r.s_acctbal, 0)) AS total_supplier_acctbal,
    AVG(ro.total_order_value) AS avg_recent_order_value,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ro.o_orderkey) AS recent_order_count
FROM 
    nation n
LEFT JOIN 
    supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSuppliers r ON s.s_suppkey = r.s_suppkey AND r.rank = 1
LEFT JOIN 
    HighValueCustomers c ON s.s_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
LEFT JOIN 
    RecentOrders ro ON c.c_custkey = ro.o_custkey
WHERE 
    s.s_acctbal IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) > 0
ORDER BY 
    total_supplier_acctbal DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    q.n_name,
    q.customer_count,
    q.total_supplier_acctbal,
    q.avg_recent_order_value,
    q.recent_order_count
FROM (
    SELECT 
        n.n_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS customer_count,
        SUM(COALESCE(r.s_acctbal, 0)) AS total_supplier_acctbal,
        AVG(ro.total_order_value) AS avg_recent_order_value,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ro.o_orderkey) AS recent_order_count
    FROM 
        nation n
    INNER JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT 
            ps.ps_partkey,
            s2.s_suppkey,
            s2.s_acctbal AS s_acctbal,
            DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY ps.ps_partkey ORDER BY s2.s_acctbal DESC) AS rnk
        FROM 
            partsupp ps
        JOIN 
            supplier s2 ON ps.ps_suppkey = s2.s_suppkey
    ) r ON s.s_suppkey = r.s_suppkey AND r.rnk = 1
    LEFT JOIN 
        customer c ON s.s_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT 
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_custkey,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_order_value
        FROM 
            orders o
        JOIN 
            lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE 
            o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 days'
        GROUP BY 
            o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    ) ro ON c.c_custkey = ro.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        n.n_name
) q
WHERE q.customer_count > 0
ORDER BY 
    q.total_supplier_acctbal DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supplycost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ps.ps_partkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rank
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, ps.ps_partkey
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS order_total,
        o.o_orderdate
    FROM
        orders o
    JOIN
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE
        o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(month, -6, CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate
),
CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT r.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        SUM(r.order_total) AS total_spent
    FROM
        customer c
    JOIN
        RecentOrders r ON c.c_custkey = r.o_custkey
    GROUP BY
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
)
SELECT
    co.c_custkey,
    co.c_name,
    co.total_orders,
    co.total_spent,
    rs.s_name AS top_supplier,
    rs.total_supplycost
FROM
    CustomerOrders co
LEFT JOIN
    RankedSuppliers rs ON co.c_custkey IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey
        FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
        WHERE l.l_orderkey IN (
            SELECT o.o_orderkey
            FROM orders o
            WHERE o.o_custkey = co.c_custkey
        )
    )
WHERE
    co.total_spent > 10000
ORDER BY
    co.total_spent DESC
LIMIT 100
sql2:
SELECT
    co.c_custkey,
    co.c_name,
    co.total_orders,
    co.total_spent,
    rs.s_name AS top_supplier,
    rs.total_supplycost
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ro.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
            SUM(ro.order_total) AS total_spent
        FROM
            customer c
        JOIN
            (
                SELECT
                    o.o_orderkey,
                    o.o_custkey,
                    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS order_total,
                    o.o_orderdate
                FROM
                    orders o
                JOIN
                    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
                WHERE
                    o.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(month, -6, CURRENT_DATE)
                GROUP BY
                    o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate
            ) ro ON c.c_custkey = ro.o_custkey
        GROUP BY
            c.c_custkey, c.c_name
        HAVING
            SUM(ro.order_total) > 10000
    ) co
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supplycost,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ps.ps_partkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rank
        FROM
            supplier s
        JOIN
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY
            s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, ps.ps_partkey
    ) rs ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
        JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        WHERE o.o_custkey = co.c_custkey
          AND ps.ps_partkey = co.c_custkey
    )
ORDER BY
    co.total_spent DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH Rich_Customers AS (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_acctbal, n.n_name AS nation_name
    FROM customer c
    JOIN nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE c.c_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(c2.c_acctbal) FROM customer c2)
),
Top_Suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    ORDER BY total_supply_cost DESC
    LIMIT 5
),
Recent_Orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice, c.c_name, o.o_orderdate, l.l_shipdate
    FROM orders o
    JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= DATEADD(month, -3, CURRENT_DATE)
)
SELECT rc.nation_name, rc.c_name AS customer_name, rc.c_acctbal, 
       ts.s_name AS supplier_name, ts.total_supply_cost,
       ro.o_orderkey, ro.o_totalprice, ro.o_orderdate, ro.l_shipdate
FROM Rich_Customers rc
JOIN Top_Suppliers ts ON ts.total_supply_cost > 10000
JOIN Recent_Orders ro ON rc.c_name = ro.c_name
WHERE rc.c_acctbal > 1000
ORDER BY rc.nation_name, rc.c_acctbal DESC, ro.o_orderdate DESC
sql2:
SELECT n.n_name AS nation_name, c.c_name AS customer_name, c.c_acctbal,
       ts.s_name AS supplier_name, ts.total_supply_cost,
       o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice, o.o_orderdate, l.l_shipdate
FROM customer c
JOIN nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN orders o ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    ORDER BY total_supply_cost DESC
    LIMIT 5
) ts
WHERE c.c_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(c2.c_acctbal) FROM customer c2)
  AND c.c_acctbal > 1000
  AND ts.total_supply_cost > 10000
  AND l.l_shipdate >= DATEADD(month, -3, CURRENT_DATE)
ORDER BY n.n_name, c.c_acctbal DESC, o.o_orderdate DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY o.o_custkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS rn,
        c.c_name,
        n.n_name AS customer_nation
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
),
HighValueSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    HAVING 
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) > 50000
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        ro.o_orderkey,
        ro.o_totalprice,
        ro.o_orderdate,
        ro.c_name,
        ro.customer_nation
    FROM 
        RankedOrders ro
    WHERE 
        ro.rn = 1
)
SELECT 
    ro.o_orderkey,
    ro.o_totalprice,
    ro.o_orderdate,
    ro.c_name,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    s.total_supply_cost,
    CASE 
        WHEN ro.o_totalprice > s.total_supply_cost THEN 'High Margin'
        ELSE 'Low Margin'
    END AS margin_status
FROM 
    RecentOrders ro
LEFT JOIN 
    HighValueSuppliers s ON s.s_suppkey = (
        SELECT ps.ps_suppkey
        FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
        WHERE l.l_orderkey = ro.o_orderkey
        ORDER BY ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
WHERE 
    ro.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(DAY, -30, CURRENT_DATE)
ORDER BY 
    ro.o_orderdate DESC, ro.o_totalprice DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    ro.o_orderkey,
    ro.o_totalprice,
    ro.o_orderdate,
    ro.c_name,
    hvs.s_name AS supplier_name,
    hvs.total_supply_cost,
    CASE 
        WHEN ro.o_totalprice > hvs.total_supply_cost THEN 'High Margin'
        ELSE 'Low Margin'
    END AS margin_status
FROM (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderdate,
        c.c_name,
        n.n_name AS customer_nation
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
        AND ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY o.o_custkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) = 1
) ro
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        supply_agg.total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN (
        SELECT 
            ps.ps_suppkey,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
        FROM 
            partsupp ps
        GROUP BY 
            ps.ps_suppkey
    ) supply_agg ON s.s_suppkey = supply_agg.ps_suppkey
    WHERE 
        supply_agg.total_supply_cost > 50000
) hvs ON hvs.s_suppkey = (
    SELECT ps2.ps_suppkey
    FROM lineitem l2
    JOIN partsupp ps2 ON ps2.ps_partkey = l2.l_partkey
    WHERE l2.l_orderkey = ro.o_orderkey
    ORDER BY ps2.ps_supplycost * ps2.ps_availqty DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
WHERE 
    ro.o_orderdate >= DATEADD(DAY, -30, CURRENT_DATE)
ORDER BY 
    ro.o_orderdate DESC, ro.o_totalprice DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_customerkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS rn
    FROM orders o
),
SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supplycost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS total_parts
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
LineItemStats AS (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_price_after_discount,
        AVG(l.l_tax) AS avg_tax_rate
    FROM lineitem l
    GROUP BY l.l_orderkey
)
SELECT 
    o.o_orderkey,
    o.o_orderdate,
    COALESCE(li.total_price_after_discount, 0) AS total_price_after_discount,
    COALESCE(si.total_supplycost, 0) AS supplier_total_cost,
    r.r_name AS region_name
FROM RankedOrders o
LEFT JOIN LineItemStats li ON o.o_orderkey = li.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN SupplierStats si ON o.o_orderkey IN (
    SELECT li.l_orderkey 
    FROM lineitem li 
    WHERE li.l_returnflag = 'R'
) 
JOIN nation n ON n.n_nationkey = (SELECT c.c_nationkey FROM customer c WHERE c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey)
JOIN region r ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
WHERE o.o_totalprice > (
    SELECT AVG(o2.o_totalprice) FROM orders o2 WHERE o2.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
) AND n.n_name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC, o.o_orderkey
sql2:
SELECT 
    o.o_orderkey,
    o.o_orderdate,
    COALESCE(li.total_price_after_discount, 0) AS total_price_after_discount,
    COALESCE(si.total_supplycost, 0) AS supplier_total_cost,
    r.r_name AS region_name
FROM (
    SELECT 
        o2.o_orderkey,
        o2.o_orderdate,
        o2.o_totalprice,
        o2.o_orderstatus,
        o2.o_custkey,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o2.o_custkey ORDER BY o2.o_orderdate DESC) AS rn
    FROM orders o2
) o
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_price_after_discount,
        AVG(l.l_tax) AS avg_tax_rate
    FROM lineitem l
    GROUP BY l.l_orderkey
) li ON o.o_orderkey = li.l_orderkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supplycost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS total_parts
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
) si ON EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM lineitem li2
    WHERE li2.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
      AND li2.l_returnflag = 'R'
)
JOIN customer c ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN nation n ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
JOIN region r ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT AVG(o3.o_totalprice) AS avg_price
    FROM orders o3
    WHERE o3.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
) avg_ord
WHERE o.o_totalprice > avg_ord.avg_price
  AND n.n_name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC, o.o_orderkey

WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        c.c_mktsegment,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_mktsegment ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
),
TopOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        ro.o_orderkey,
        ro.o_orderdate,
        ro.o_totalprice,
        ro.c_mktsegment
    FROM 
        RankedOrders ro
    WHERE 
        ro.rn <= 5
),
PartSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_partkey
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.total_supply_cost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ps.total_supply_cost DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        PartSuppliers ps
)

SELECT 
    to.o_orderkey,
    to.o_orderdate,
    to.o_totalprice,
    to.c_mktsegment,
    ts.ps_partkey,
    ts.total_supply_cost
FROM 
    TopOrders to
JOIN 
    TopSuppliers ts ON ts.rn <= 10
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey = to.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    l.l_partkey = ts.ps_partkey
ORDER BY 
    to.o_orderdate DESC, 
    to.o_totalprice DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    to2.o_orderkey,
    to2.o_orderdate,
    to2.o_totalprice,
    to2.c_mktsegment,
    ts2.ps_partkey,
    ts2.total_supply_cost
FROM 
    (
        SELECT o_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_totalprice, c_mktsegment
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                o.o_orderkey,
                o.o_orderdate,
                o.o_totalprice,
                c.c_mktsegment,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_mktsegment ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS rn
            FROM orders o
            JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
            WHERE o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
        ) ranked
        WHERE rn <= 5
    ) to2
    JOIN lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey = to2.o_orderkey
    JOIN (
        SELECT ps_partkey, total_supply_cost
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                ps_partkey,
                SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) DESC) AS rn
            FROM partsupp
            GROUP BY ps_partkey
        ) ranked_suppliers
        WHERE rn <= 10
    ) ts2 ON l.l_partkey = ts2.ps_partkey
ORDER BY 
    to2.o_orderdate DESC, 
    to2.o_totalprice DESC

sql1:
WITH SupplierPartData AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        p.p_partkey, 
        p.p_name, 
        ps.ps_availqty, 
        ps.ps_supplycost 
    FROM 
        supplier s 
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey 
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
), 
CustomerOrderData AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey, 
        c.c_name, 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_totalprice, 
        o.o_orderdate 
    FROM 
        customer c 
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
), 
ActiveOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        COUNT(l.l_linenumber) AS total_lines, 
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_value 
    FROM 
        orders o 
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey 
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year' 
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey
) 
SELECT 
    spd.s_name, 
    spd.p_name, 
    spd.ps_availqty, 
    cod.c_name AS customer_name, 
    ao.total_lines, 
    ao.total_value 
FROM 
    SupplierPartData spd 
JOIN 
    ActiveOrders ao ON spd.ps_partkey IN (SELECT ps_partkey FROM partsupp WHERE ps_suppkey = spd.s_suppkey) 
JOIN 
    CustomerOrderData cod ON ao.o_orderkey IN (SELECT o.o_orderkey FROM orders o WHERE o.o_custkey = cod.c_custkey) 
WHERE 
    spd.ps_supplycost < 1000 
ORDER BY 
    ao.total_value DESC 
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT
    s.s_name,
    p.p_name,
    ps.ps_availqty,
    c.c_name AS customer_name,
    ao.total_lines,
    ao.total_value
FROM
    supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT
            o.o_orderkey,
            COUNT(l.l_linenumber) AS total_lines,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_value
        FROM
            orders o
            JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE
            o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
        GROUP BY
            o.o_orderkey
    ) ao
    JOIN customer c ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM orders ox
        WHERE ox.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
          AND ox.o_orderkey = ao.o_orderkey
    )
    JOIN orders o2 ON o2.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE
    ps.ps_supplycost < 1000
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM partsupp ps2
        WHERE ps2.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
          AND ps2.ps_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    )
ORDER BY
    ao.total_value DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rnk
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal
),
HighValueCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        c.c_acctbal
    FROM 
        customer c
    WHERE 
        c.c_acctbal > 50000
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderdate,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_custkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
)
SELECT 
    rnk,
    hs.s_suppkey,
    hs.s_name,
    hvc.c_custkey,
    hvc.c_name,
    COUNT(rod.o_orderkey) AS recent_order_count,
    SUM(rod.o_totalprice) AS total_recent_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN l.l_returnflag = 'R' THEN l.l_extendedprice ELSE 0 END) AS total_returns,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
FROM 
    RankedSuppliers hs
JOIN 
    RecentOrders rod ON hs.s_suppkey IN (SELECT ps.ps_suppkey FROM partsupp ps WHERE ps.ps_partkey IN (SELECT l.l_partkey FROM lineitem l WHERE l.l_orderkey = rod.o_orderkey))
JOIN 
    HighValueCustomers hvc ON rod.o_custkey = hvc.c_custkey
LEFT JOIN 
    lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey = rod.o_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    rnk, hs.s_suppkey, hs.s_name, hvc.c_custkey, hvc.c_name
ORDER BY 
    recent_order_count DESC, total_recent_sales DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    rnk,
    hs.s_suppkey,
    hs.s_name,
    hvc.c_custkey,
    hvc.c_name,
    COUNT(rod.o_orderkey) AS recent_order_count,
    SUM(rod.o_totalprice) AS total_recent_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN l.l_returnflag = 'R' THEN l.l_extendedprice ELSE 0 END) AS total_returns,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
FROM
    (SELECT
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal,
        SUM(ps2.ps_supplycost * ps2.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(ps2.ps_supplycost * ps2.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rnk
     FROM supplier s
     JOIN partsupp ps2 ON s.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
     GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal
    ) hs
JOIN
    (SELECT
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_totalprice, o.o_orderdate,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_custkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
     FROM orders o
     WHERE o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    ) rod
    ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp ps3
        JOIN lineitem l2 ON ps3.ps_partkey = l2.l_partkey AND l2.l_orderkey = rod.o_orderkey
        WHERE ps3.ps_suppkey = hs.s_suppkey
    )
JOIN
    customer hvc ON rod.o_custkey = hvc.c_custkey AND hvc.c_acctbal > 50000
LEFT JOIN
    lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey = rod.o_orderkey
GROUP BY
    rnk, hs.s_suppkey, hs.s_name, hvc.c_custkey, hvc.c_name
ORDER BY
    recent_order_count DESC, total_recent_sales DESC

sql1:
WITH SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
OrderDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipdate <= CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate
),
RegionRanking AS (
    SELECT 
        n.n_nationkey,
        r.r_regionkey,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY r.r_regionkey ORDER BY SUM(l.l_extendedprice) DESC) AS region_rank
    FROM 
        nation n
    JOIN 
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    GROUP BY 
        n.n_nationkey, r.r_regionkey
)
SELECT 
    ss.s_name,
    ss.total_available_quantity,
    ss.avg_supply_cost,
    od.o_orderdate,
    od.total_revenue,
    rr.region_rank
FROM 
    SupplierStats ss
LEFT JOIN 
    OrderDetails od ON ss.s_suppkey = (SELECT ps.ps_suppkey FROM partsupp ps WHERE ps.ps_partkey IN (SELECT p.p_partkey FROM part p WHERE p.p_size > 20) LIMIT 1)
LEFT JOIN 
    RegionRanking rr ON ss.s_suppkey = (SELECT DISTINCT s2.s_suppkey FROM supplier s2 WHERE s2.s_nationkey = rr.n_nationkey)
WHERE 
    ss.total_available_quantity IS NOT NULL AND
    od.total_revenue > (SELECT AVG(total_revenue) FROM OrderDetails) 
ORDER BY 
    ss.total_available_quantity DESC, od.total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100
sql2:
SELECT
    ss.s_name,
    ss.total_available_quantity,
    ss.avg_supply_cost,
    od.o_orderdate,
    od.total_revenue,
    rr.region_rank
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
            AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
        FROM
            supplier s
        JOIN
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY
            s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    ) ss
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_orderdate,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
        FROM
            orders o
        JOIN
            lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE
            l.l_shipdate <= CURRENT_DATE
        GROUP BY
            o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate
    ) od ON ss.s_suppkey = (
        SELECT ps.ps_suppkey
        FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        WHERE p.p_size > 20
        LIMIT 1
    )
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            n.n_nationkey,
            r.r_regionkey,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY r.r_regionkey ORDER BY SUM(l.l_extendedprice) DESC) AS region_rank
        FROM
            nation n
        JOIN
            region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        JOIN
            supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
        JOIN
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        JOIN
            lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
        GROUP BY
            n.n_nationkey, r.r_regionkey
    ) rr ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM supplier s2
        WHERE s2.s_suppkey = ss.s_suppkey
          AND s2.s_nationkey = rr.n_nationkey
    )
WHERE
    ss.total_available_quantity IS NOT NULL
    AND od.total_revenue > (
        SELECT AVG(od2.total_revenue)
        FROM (
            SELECT
                SUM(l2.l_extendedprice * (1 - l2.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
            FROM
                orders o2
            JOIN
                lineitem l2 ON o2.o_orderkey = l2.l_orderkey
            WHERE
                l2.l_shipdate <= CURRENT_DATE
            GROUP BY
                o2.o_orderkey, o2.o_orderdate
        ) od2
    )
ORDER BY
    ss.total_available_quantity DESC, od.total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_acctbal,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        supplier s
),
HighValueCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey, 
        c.c_name, 
        c.c_acctbal
    FROM 
        customer c
    WHERE 
        c.c_acctbal > 50000
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_totalprice, 
        o.o_orderdate, 
        l.l_partkey
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
),
NationsWithHighValueSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        n.n_nationkey, 
        n.n_name, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS high_value_suppliers_count
    FROM 
        nation n
    JOIN 
        RankedSuppliers rs ON n.n_nationkey = rs.s_nationkey
    WHERE 
        rs.rn <= 5
    GROUP BY 
        n.n_nationkey, n.n_name
),
OrderDetails AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT 
        r.n_nationkey, 
        r.n_name, 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_totalprice,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM 
        RecentOrders r
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON r.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE 
        n.n_nationkey IN (SELECT n_nationkey FROM NationsWithHighValueSuppliers)
    GROUP BY 
        r.n_nationkey, r.n_name, o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice
)
SELECT 
    od.n_nationkey, 
    od.n_name, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT od.o_orderkey) AS order_count, 
    SUM(od.total_revenue) AS total_revenue_generated
FROM 
    OrderDetails od
JOIN 
    HighValueCustomers hvc ON od.o_orderkey IN (SELECT o.o_orderkey FROM orders o WHERE o.o_custkey = hvc.c_custkey)
GROUP BY 
    od.n_nationkey, od.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue_generated DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    n.n_nationkey,
    n.n_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT li.l_orderkey) AS order_count,
    SUM(li.l_extendedprice * (1 - li.l_discount)) AS total_revenue_generated
FROM
    lineitem li
    JOIN orders o ON li.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    JOIN supplier s ON li.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM customer c
        WHERE c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
          AND c.c_acctbal > 50000
    )
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM (
            SELECT
                s2.s_suppkey,
                s2.s_nationkey,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s2.s_nationkey ORDER BY s2.s_acctbal DESC) AS rn
            FROM supplier s2
        ) rs
        WHERE rs.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
          AND rs.rn <= 5
    )
GROUP BY
    n.n_nationkey, n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue_generated DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_orderpriority,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '2023-01-01' AND DATE '2023-12-31'
), 
TopCustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    ORDER BY 
        total_spent DESC
    LIMIT 10
),
SupplierPartDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        p.p_name,
        ps.ps_supplycost,
        ps.ps_availqty
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    WHERE 
        p.p_retailprice > 100
)
SELECT 
    TOC.c_name,
    TOC.total_spent,
    SO.p_name,
    SO.ps_supplycost,
    SO.ps_availqty
FROM 
    TopCustomerOrders TOC
LEFT JOIN 
    SupplierPartDetails SO ON TOC.c_custkey IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT 
            c.c_custkey 
        FROM 
            customer c 
        JOIN 
            orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey 
        JOIN 
            lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey 
        WHERE 
            l.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30' DAY
    )
WHERE 
    TOC.total_spent > 1000
ORDER BY 
    TOC.total_spent DESC, SO.ps_supplycost ASC
LIMIT 50
sql2:

        JOIN

sql1:
WITH ranked_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderdate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '2024-01-01'
),
supplier_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name
),
customer_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name
),
detailed_lineitems AS (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey,
        l.l_partkey,
        l.l_suppkey,
        l.l_quantity,
        l.l_extendedprice,
        l.l_discount,
        l.l_tax,
        (l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS net_price,
        CASE 
            WHEN l.l_returnflag = 'R' THEN 'Returned'
            ELSE 'Sold'
        END AS sale_status
    FROM 
        lineitem l
)
SELECT 
    co.c_name,
    co.total_orders,
    co.total_spent,
    ss.total_available,
    ss.avg_supply_cost,
    ro.o_totalprice,
    ro.o_orderdate
FROM 
    customer_orders co
LEFT JOIN 
    supplier_summary ss ON co.total_orders > 0
JOIN 
    ranked_orders ro ON co.total_orders = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE o.o_custkey = co.c_custkey)
WHERE 
    co.total_spent > 10000
ORDER BY 
    co.total_spent DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT 
    co.c_name,
    co.total_orders,
    co.total_spent,
    ss.total_available,
    ss.avg_supply_cost,
    ro.o_totalprice,
    ro.o_orderdate
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
            SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
        FROM 
            customer c
        LEFT JOIN 
            orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
        GROUP BY 
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name
    ) co
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available,
            AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
        FROM 
            supplier s
        JOIN 
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY 
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name
    ) ss ON co.total_orders > 0
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_custkey,
            o.o_totalprice,
            o.o_orderdate,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
        FROM 
            orders o
        WHERE 
            o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2023-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '2024-01-01'
    ) ro ON co.total_orders = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE o.o_custkey = co.c_custkey)
WHERE 
    co.total_spent > 10000
ORDER BY 
    co.total_spent DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH OrderSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
        MAX(o.o_orderdate) AS last_order_date
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
),
TopSpenders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.custkey,
        c.name,
        os.total_spent,
        os.order_count,
        os.last_order_date
    FROM 
        (SELECT * FROM OrderSummary ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 10) os
    JOIN 
        customer c ON os.c_custkey = c.c_custkey
),
ProductDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        ps.ps_supplycost,
        ps.ps_availqty,
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
    FROM 
        part p
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name, ps.ps_supplycost, ps.ps_availqty
)
SELECT 
    ts.c_name,
    ts.total_spent,
    ts.order_count,
    ts.last_order_date,
    pd.p_name,
    pd.total_quantity_sold,
    pd.ps_supplycost,
    pd.ps_availqty
FROM 
    TopSpenders ts
JOIN 
    ProductDetails pd ON ts.c_custkey IN (
        SELECT o.o_custkey FROM orders o
        JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE l.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    )
ORDER BY 
    ts.total_spent DESC, pd.total_quantity_sold DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    ts.c_name,
    ts.total_spent,
    ts.order_count,
    ts.last_order_date,
    pd.p_name,
    pd.total_quantity_sold,
    pd.ps_supplycost,
    pd.ps_availqty
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent,
            COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
            MAX(o.o_orderdate) AS last_order_date
        FROM 
            customer c
        JOIN 
            orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
        GROUP BY 
            c.c_custkey, c.c_name
        ORDER BY total_spent DESC
        LIMIT 10
    ) ts
CROSS JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            p.p_partkey,
            p.p_name,
            ps.ps_supplycost,
            ps.ps_availqty,
            SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
        FROM 
            part p
        JOIN 
            partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
        JOIN 
            lineitem l ON ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
        GROUP BY 
            p.p_partkey, p.p_name, ps.ps_supplycost, ps.ps_availqty
    ) pd
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM orders o
    JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE o.o_custkey = ts.c_custkey
      AND l.l_shipdate > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
)
ORDER BY 
    ts.total_spent DESC, pd.total_quantity_sold DESC

sql1:
WITH SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        n.n_name AS supplier_nation,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, n.n_name
),
OrderDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue,
        SUM(l.l_discount) AS total_discount
    FROM orders o
    JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '2022-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '2023-01-01'
    GROUP BY o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate
),
Revenues AS (
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS order_year,
        SUM(o.revenue) AS total_revenue,
        AVG(o.total_discount) AS average_discount
    FROM OrderDetails o
    GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate)
)
SELECT 
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    SUM(s.total_supply_value) AS total_supply_value,
    r.r_comment,
    rev.order_year,
    rev.total_revenue,
    rev.average_discount
FROM region r
JOIN nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
JOIN supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
JOIN SupplierStats ss ON s.s_suppkey = ss.s_suppkey
JOIN Revenues rev ON rev.order_year = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1
GROUP BY r.r_name, r.r_comment, rev.order_year, rev.total_revenue, rev.average_discount
ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC, rev.total_revenue DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    SUM(ss.total_supply_value) AS total_supply_value,
    r.r_comment,
    rev.order_year,
    rev.total_revenue,
    rev.average_discount
FROM region r
JOIN nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
JOIN supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value
    FROM partsupp ps
    GROUP BY ps.ps_suppkey
) ss ON s.s_suppkey = ss.ps_suppkey
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS order_year,
        SUM(o.rev) AS total_revenue,
        AVG(o.tot_disc) AS average_discount
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            ord.o_orderkey,
            ord.o_orderdate,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS rev,
            SUM(l.l_discount) AS tot_disc
        FROM orders ord
        JOIN lineitem l ON ord.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE ord.o_orderdate >= DATE '2022-01-01' AND ord.o_orderdate < DATE '2023-01-01'
        GROUP BY ord.o_orderkey, ord.o_orderdate
    ) o
    GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate)
    HAVING EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1
) rev
GROUP BY r.r_name, r.r_comment, rev.order_year, rev.total_revenue, rev.average_discount
ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC, rev.total_revenue DESC

sql1:
WITH supplier_parts AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_brand,
        p.p_type,
        ps.ps_availqty,
        ps.ps_supplycost,
        (ps.ps_availqty * ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_value
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
),
ranked_parts AS (
    SELECT 
        *,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY s_suppkey ORDER BY total_value DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        supplier_parts
),
top_parts AS (
    SELECT 
        s_suppkey,
        s_name,
        p_partkey,
        p_name,
        p_brand,
        p_type,
        ps_availqty,
        ps_supplycost
    FROM 
        ranked_parts
    WHERE 
        rank <= 5
),
customer_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_orderpriority,
        o.o_clerk,
        o.o_shippriority
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'F' AND o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
)
SELECT 
    co.c_custkey,
    co.c_name,
    co.o_orderkey,
    co.o_totalprice,
    tp.p_partkey,
    tp.p_name,
    tp.p_brand,
    tp.p_type,
    tp.ps_availqty,
    tp.ps_supplycost,
    (co.o_totalprice * tp.ps_supplycost) AS order_value
FROM 
    customer_orders co
JOIN 
    top_parts tp ON tp.s_suppkey IN (SELECT s.s_suppkey FROM supplier s WHERE s.s_nationkey = (SELECT n.n_nationkey FROM nation n WHERE n.n_name = 'USA'))
ORDER BY 
    order_value DESC, co.o_totalprice DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    c.c_custkey,
    c.c_name,
    o.o_orderkey,
    o.o_totalprice,
    rp.p_partkey,
    rp.p_name,
    rp.p_brand,
    rp.p_type,
    rp.ps_availqty,
    rp.ps_supplycost,
    (o.o_totalprice * rp.ps_supplycost) AS order_value
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            p.p_partkey,
            p.p_name,
            p.p_brand,
            p.p_type,
            ps.ps_availqty,
            ps.ps_supplycost,
            DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_suppkey ORDER BY (ps.ps_availqty * ps.ps_supplycost) DESC) AS rnk
        FROM 
            supplier s
        JOIN 
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        JOIN 
            part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    ) rp ON rp.rnk <= 5
JOIN 
    supplier s2 ON rp.s_suppkey = s2.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s2.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey AND n.n_name = 'USA'
WHERE 
    o.o_orderstatus = 'F' 
    AND o.o_orderdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
ORDER BY 
    order_value DESC, o.o_totalprice DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supplycost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rank_nation
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
), 
HighValueCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY c.c_acctbal DESC) AS rank_cust
    FROM 
        customer c
    WHERE 
        c.c_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(c2.c_acctbal) FROM customer c2)
), 
OrderDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        l.l_partkey,
        l.l_extendedprice,
        l.l_discount,
        l.l_quantity,
        l.l_returnflag,
        l.l_linestatus,
        DATE_PART('year', l.l_shipdate) AS ship_year
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
), 
AggregateOrderData AS (
    SELECT 
        od.ship_year,
        SUM(od.l_extendedprice * (1 - od.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT od.l_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM 
        OrderDetails od
    GROUP BY 
        od.ship_year
)
SELECT 
    r.r_name,
    ns.total_supplycost AS total_supplier_cost,
    hv.c_name AS high_value_customer,
    agd.total_revenue,
    agd.order_count
FROM 
    region r
LEFT JOIN 
    nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSuppliers ns ON n.n_nationkey = ns.s_nationkey AND ns.rank_nation = 1
FULL OUTER JOIN 
    HighValueCustomers hv ON n.n_nationkey = (SELECT c2.c_nationkey FROM customer c2 WHERE c2.c_custkey = hv.c_custkey)
JOIN 
    AggregateOrderData agd ON agd.ship_year = DATE_PART('year', CURRENT_DATE)
WHERE 
    (ns.total_supplycost IS NOT NULL OR hv.c_name IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY 
    r.r_name, total_supplier_cost DESC, agd.total_revenue DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    r.r_name,
    ns.total_supplycost AS total_supplier_cost,
    hv.c_name AS high_value_customer,
    agd.total_revenue,
    agd.order_count
FROM
    region r
LEFT JOIN
    nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_nationkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supplycost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rank_nation
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
) ns ON n.n_nationkey = ns.s_nationkey AND ns.rank_nation = 1
FULL OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        c.c_nationkey,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY c.c_acctbal DESC) AS rank_cust
    FROM
        customer c
    WHERE
        c.c_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(c2.c_acctbal) FROM customer c2)
) hv ON n.n_nationkey = hv.c_nationkey
JOIN (
    SELECT
        DATE_PART('year', l.l_shipdate) AS ship_year,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM
        orders o
    JOIN
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE
        l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY
        DATE_PART('year', l.l_shipdate)
) agd ON agd.ship_year = DATE_PART('year', CURRENT_DATE)
WHERE
    (ns.total_supplycost IS NOT NULL OR hv.c_name IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY
    r.r_name, total_supplier_cost DESC, agd.total_revenue DESC

sql1:
WITH PartSupplier AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey, p.p_name, s.s_name, ps.ps_availqty, ps.ps_supplycost
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
),
RegionNation AS (
    SELECT n.n_nationkey, n.n_name, r.r_regionkey, r.r_name
    FROM nation n
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
),
CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, c.c_custkey, c.c_mktsegment
    FROM orders o
    JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
)
SELECT 
    rn.r_name AS region_name,
    pn.p_name AS part_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT co.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS average_supply_cost,
    SUM(CASE WHEN co.o_orderdate < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS orders_last_year
FROM PartSupplier ps
JOIN RegionNation rn ON ps.ps_suppkey IN (SELECT s.s_suppkey FROM supplier s JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey WHERE n.n_nationkey = rn.n_nationkey)
JOIN CustomerOrders co ON ps.ps_partkey IN (SELECT li.l_partkey FROM lineitem li JOIN orders o ON li.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey WHERE o.o_orderkey = co.o_orderkey)
GROUP BY rn.r_name, pn.p_name
ORDER BY total_orders DESC, average_supply_cost ASC
sql2:
SELECT
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    p.p_name AS part_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS average_supply_cost,
    SUM(CASE WHEN o.o_orderdate < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS orders_last_year
FROM partsupp ps
JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
JOIN customer c ON c.c_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
JOIN orders o ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM lineitem li
        WHERE li.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
          AND li.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    )
GROUP BY r.r_name, p.p_name
ORDER BY total_orders DESC, average_supply_cost ASC

sql1:
WITH SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        COUNT(ps.ps_partkey) AS part_count, 
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
CustomerStats AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey, 
        c.c_name, 
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent, 
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name 
    FROM 
        SupplierStats s
    WHERE 
        s.total_supply_value > (SELECT AVG(total_supply_value) FROM SupplierStats)
),
TopCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey, 
        c.c_name 
    FROM 
        CustomerStats c
    WHERE 
        c.total_spent > (SELECT AVG(total_spent) FROM CustomerStats)
)
SELECT 
    ts.s_name AS Supplier_Name,
    tc.c_name AS Customer_Name,
    ps.p_name AS Part_Name,
    ps.ps_supplycost AS Supply_Cost,
    ls.l_quantity AS Quantity_Sold
FROM 
    TopSuppliers ts
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON ts.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem ls ON ps.ps_partkey = ls.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON ls.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    TopCustomers tc ON o.o_custkey = tc.c_custkey
WHERE 
    ls.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY 
    ts.s_name, tc.c_name
sql2:
SELECT 
    ts.s_name AS Supplier_Name,
    tc.c_name AS Customer_Name,
    ps.p_name AS Part_Name,
    ps.ps_supplycost AS Supply_Cost,
    ls.l_quantity AS Quantity_Sold
FROM 
    (SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
     FROM supplier s
     JOIN partsupp ps2 ON s.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
     GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
     HAVING SUM(ps2.ps_supplycost * ps2.ps_availqty) >
        (SELECT AVG(sv.total_supply_value)
         FROM (SELECT SUM(ps3.ps_supplycost * ps3.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value
               FROM supplier s2 JOIN partsupp ps3 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps3.ps_suppkey
               GROUP BY s2.s_suppkey) sv)
    ) ts
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON ts.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem ls ON ps.ps_partkey = ls.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON ls.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    (SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name
     FROM customer c
     JOIN orders o2 ON c.c_custkey = o2.o_custkey
     GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
     HAVING SUM(o2.o_totalprice) >
        (SELECT AVG(cs.total_spent)
         FROM (SELECT SUM(o3.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
               FROM customer c2 JOIN orders o3 ON c2.c_custkey = o3.o_custkey
               GROUP BY c2.c_custkey) cs)
    ) tc ON o.o_custkey = tc.c_custkey
WHERE 
    ls.l_shipdate < CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY 
    ts.s_name, tc.c_name

sql1:
WITH SupplierData AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_acctbal, 
        n.n_name AS nation_name
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(s_acctbal) FROM supplier)
),
TopParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey, 
        p.p_name, 
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_qty
    FROM 
        part p
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    GROUP BY 
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name
    ORDER BY 
        total_available_qty DESC
    LIMIT 10
),
OrderSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_orderdate, 
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipdate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate
)
